items.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵-矩阵乘法 (SpGEMM) 广泛应用于许多科学和深度学习应用中。 SpGEMM 的高度不规则结构限制了其在传统计算平台上的性能和效率，从而激发了大量专门的硬件设计。现有的 SpGEMM 加速器仅支持特定类型的严格执行数据流，例如内部/输出产品或基于行的方案。每个数据流仅针对某些稀疏模式进行了优化，并且无法以强大的性能泛化到跨不同领域的广泛多样化的 SpGEMM 工作负载。我们提出了 Spada，它是 SpGEMM 加速器的三种新技术的组合，可以有效地适应各种稀疏模式。首先，我们描述了一种基于窗口的自适应数据流，它可以灵活地适应不同的模式，以最好地匹配数据分布并实现不同的重用效益。然后，我们的硬件架构有效地支持这种数据流模板，具有灵活、快速、低成本的可重构性和有效的负载平衡功能。最后，我们使用分析引导的方法来检测稀疏模式，并根据附近矩阵区域稀疏模式相似性的关键观察确定要使用的优化数据流模式。我们的评估结果表明，Spada 能够匹配或超过三种最先进的 SpGEMM 加速器中最好的加速器，并避免数据分布和数据流不匹配时其他加速器的性能下降。它在各种稀疏矩阵和压缩神经网络模型中实现了平均 1.44 倍的加速。

items.title: Ditto: End-to-End Application Cloning for Networked Cloud Services.
items.abstract:
The lack of representative, publicly-available cloud services has been a recurring problem in the architecture and systems communities. While open-source benchmarks exist, they do not capture the full complexity of cloud services. Application cloning is a promising way to address this, however, prior work is limited to CPU-/cache-centric, single-node services, operating at user level.

We present Ditto, an automated framework for cloning end-to-end cloud applications, both monolithic and microservices, which captures I/O and network activity, as well as kernel operations, in addition to application logic. Ditto takes a hierarchical approach to application cloning, starting with capturing the dependency graph across distributed services, to recreating each tier's control/data flow, and finally generating system calls and assembly that mimics the individual applications. Ditto does not reveal the logic of the original application, facilitating publicly sharing clones of production services with hardware vendors, cloud providers, and the research community.

We show that across a diverse set of single- and multi-tier applications, Ditto accurately captures their CPU and memory characteristics as well as their high-level performance metrics, is portable across platforms, and facilitates a wide range of system studies.
items.abstract_zh:
缺乏有代表性的、公开可用的云服务一直是架构和系统社区中反复出现的问题。尽管存在开源基准测试，但它们并不能全面反映云服务的复杂性。应用程序克隆是解决此问题的一种很有前途的方法，但是，之前的工作仅限于在用户级别运行的以 CPU/缓存为中心的单节点服务。

我们推出了 Ditto，这是一个用于克隆端到端云应用程序（包括单体应用程序和微服务）的自动化框架，除了应用程序逻辑之外，它还捕获 I/O 和网络活动以及内核操作。 Ditto 采用分层方法来克隆应用程序，从捕获分布式服务之间的依赖关系图开始，到重新创建每一层的控制/数据流，最后生成模仿各个应用程序的系统调用和程序集。 Ditto 没有透露原始应用程序的逻辑，有助于与硬件供应商、云提供商和研究社区公开共享生产服务的克隆。

我们表明，在各种单层和多层应用程序中，Ditto 可以准确捕获它们的 CPU 和内存特性以及高级性能指标，可以跨平台移植，并促进广泛的系统研究。

items.title: Qompress: Efficient Compilation for Ququarts Exploiting Partial and Mixed Radix Operations for Communication Reduction.
items.abstract:
Quantum computing is in an era of limited resources. Current hardware lacks high fidelity gates, long coherence times, and the number of computational units required to perform meaningful computation. Contemporary quantum devices typically use a binary system, where each qubit exists in a superposition of the 0 and 1 states. However, it is often possible to access the 2 or even 3 states in the same physical unit by manipulating the system in different ways. In this work, we consider automatically encoding two qubits into one four-state ququart via a compression scheme. We use quantum optimal control to design efficient proof-of-concept gates that fully replicate standard qubit computation on these encoded qubits.

We extend qubit compilation schemes to efficiently route qubits on an arbitrary mixed-radix system consisting of both qubits and ququarts, reducing communication and minimizing excess circuit execution time introduced by longer-duration ququart gates. In conjunction with these compilation strategies, we introduce several methods to find beneficial compressions, reducing circuit error due to computation and communication by up to 50
items.abstract_zh:
量子计算正处于资源有限的时代。当前的硬件缺乏高保真门、长相干时间以及执行有意义的计算所需的计算单元的数量。当代量子设备通常使用二进制系统，其中每个量子位都存在于 0 和 1 状态的叠加中。然而，通常可以通过以不同方式操纵系统来访问同一物理单元中的 2 种甚至 3 种状态。在这项工作中，我们考虑通过压缩方案将两个量子位自动编码为一个四态 ququart。我们使用量子最优控制来设计高效的概念验证门，在这些编码的量子位上完全复制标准量子位计算。

我们扩展了量子位编译方案，以在由量子位和 ququart 组成的任意混合基系统上有效地路由量子位，从而减少通信并最大限度地减少由较长持续时间的 ququart 门引入的多余电路执行时间。结合这些编译策略，我们引入了几种方法来找到有益的压缩，将由于计算和通信而导致的电路错误减少多达 50

items.title: KIT: Testing OS-Level Virtualization for Functional Interference Bugs.
items.abstract:
Container isolation is implemented through OS-level virtualization, such as Linux namespaces. Unfortunately, these mechanisms are extremely challenging to implement correctly and, in practice, suffer from functional interference bugs, which compromise container security. In particular, functional interference bugs allow an attacker to extract information from another container running on the same machine or impact its integrity by modifying kernel resources that are incorrectly isolated. Despite their impact, functional interference bugs in OS-level virtualization have received limited attention in part due to the challenges in detecting them. Instead of causing memory errors or crashes, many functional interference bugs involve hard-to-catch logic errors that silently produce semantically incorrect results.

This paper proposes KIT, a dynamic testing framework that discovers functional interference bugs in OS-level virtualization mechanisms, such as Linux namespaces. The key idea of KIT is to detect inter-container functional interference by comparing the system call traces of a container across two executions, where it runs with and without the preceding execution of another container. To achieve high efficiency and accuracy, KIT includes two critical components: an efficient algorithm to generate test cases that exercise inter-container data flows and a system call trace analysis framework that detects functional interference bugs and clusters bug reports. KIT discovered 9 functional interference bugs in Linux kernel 5.13, of which 6 have been confirmed. All bugs are caused by logic errors, showing that this approach is able to detect hard-to-catch semantic bugs.
items.abstract_zh:
容器隔离是通过操作系统级别的虚拟化来实现的，例如Linux命名空间。不幸的是，这些机制的正确实施极具挑战性，并且在实践中会遇到功能干扰错误，从而危及容器安全。特别是，功能干扰错误允许攻击者从同一计算机上运行的另一个容器中提取信息，或通过修改不正确隔离的内核资源来影响其完整性。尽管存在影响，但操作系统级虚拟化中的功能干扰错误受到的关注有限，部分原因在于检测它们的挑战。许多功能干扰错误不会导致内存错误或崩溃，而是涉及难以捕获的逻辑错误，这些错误会默默地产生语义上不正确的结果。

本文提出了 KIT，这是一个动态测试框架，可以发现操作系统级虚拟化机制（例如 Linux 命名空间）中的功能干扰错误。 KIT 的关键思想是通过比较容器在两次执行中的系统调用跟踪来检测容器间的功能干扰，其中容器在之前执行过另一个容器的情况下运行。为了实现高效率和准确性，KIT 包括两个关键组件：一个用于生成测试用例的高效算法，用于执行容器间数据流；以及一个用于检测功能干扰错误和集群错误报告的系统调用跟踪分析框架。 KIT在Linux内核5.13中发现了9个功能干扰bug，其中6个已得到确认。所有错误都是由逻辑错误引起的，表明这种方法能够检测难以捕获的语义错误。

items.title: NNSmith: Generating Diverse and Valid Test Cases for Deep Learning Compilers.
items.abstract: Deep-learning (DL) compilers such as TVM and TensorRT are increasingly being used to optimize deep neural network (DNN) models to meet performance, resource utilization and other requirements. Bugs in these compilers can result in models whose semantics differ from the original ones, producing incorrect results that corrupt the correctness of downstream applications. However, finding bugs in these compilers is challenging due to their complexity. In this work, we propose a new fuzz testing approach for finding bugs in deep-learning compilers. Our core approach consists of (i) generating diverse yet valid DNN test models that can exercise a large part of the compiler's transformation logic using light-weight operator specifications; (ii) performing gradient-based search to find model inputs that avoid any floating-point exceptional values during model execution, reducing the chance of missed bugs or false alarms; and (iii) using differential testing to identify bugs. We implemented this approach in NNSmith which has found 72 new bugs for TVM, TensorRT, ONNXRuntime, and PyTorch to date. Of these 58 have been confirmed and 51 have been fixed by their respective project maintainers.
items.abstract_zh: TVM 和 TensorRT 等深度学习 (DL) 编译器越来越多地用于优化深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型，以满足性能、资源利用率和其他要求。这些编译器中的错误可能会导致模型的语义与原始模型不同，从而产生不正确的结果，从而破坏下游应用程序的正确性。然而，由于这些编译器的复杂性，在这些编译器中查找错误具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的模糊测试方法，用于查找深度学习编译器中的错误。我们的核心方法包括 (i) 生成多样化且有效的 DNN 测试模型，这些模型可以使用轻量级运算符规范来执行编译器的大部分转换逻辑； (ii) 执行基于梯度的搜索来查找模型输入，避免模型执行期间出现任何浮点异常值，从而减少错过错误或误报的机会； (iii) 使用差异测试来识别错误。我们在 NNSmith 中实现了这种方法，迄今为止，该方法已发现 TVM、TensorRT、ONNXRuntime 和 PyTorch 的 72 个新错误。其中 58 个已得到确认，51 个已由各自的项目维护人员修复。

items.title: GZKP: A GPU Accelerated Zero-Knowledge Proof System.
items.abstract:
Zero-knowledge proof (ZKP) is a cryptographic protocol that allows one party to prove the correctness of a statement to another party without revealing any information beyond the correctness of the statement itself. It guarantees computation integrity and confidentiality, and is therefore increasingly adopted in industry for a variety of privacy-preserving applications, such as verifiable outsource computing and digital currency.

A significant obstacle in using ZKP for online applications is the performance overhead of its proof generation. We develop GZKP, a GPU accelerated zero-knowledge proof system that supports different levels of security requirements and brings significant speedup toward making ZKP truly usable. For polynomial computation over a large finite field, GZKP promotes a cache-friendly memory access pattern while eliminating the costly external shuffle in existing solutions. For multi-scalar multiplication, GZKP adopts a new parallelization strategy, which aggressively combines integer elliptic curve point operations and exploits fine-grained task parallelism with load balancing for sparse integer distribution. GZKP outperforms the state-of-the-art ZKP systems by an order of magnitude, achieving up to 48.1× and 17.6× speedup with standard cryptographic benchmarks and a real-world application workload, respectively.
items.abstract_zh:
零知识证明（ZKP）是一种密码协议，允许一方向另一方证明语句的正确性，而不会泄露除语句本身正确性之外的任何信息。它保证了计算的完整性和机密性，因此在工业界越来越多地应用于各种隐私保护应用，例如可验证的外包计算和数字货币。

将 ZKP 用于在线应用程序的一个重大障碍是其证明生成的性能开销。我们开发了 GZKP，这是一种 GPU 加速的零知识证明系统，支持不同级别的安全要求，并为使 ZKP 真正可用带来显着的加速。对于大型有限域上的多项式计算，GZKP 提倡缓存友好的内存访问模式，同时消除现有解决方案中昂贵的外部洗牌。对于多标量乘法，GZKP 采用了一种新的并行化策略，积极结合整数椭圆曲线点运算，并利用细粒度任务并行性和稀疏整数分布的负载平衡。 GZKP 的性能优于最先进的 ZKP 系统一个数量级，在标准加密基准和实际应用程序工作负载下分别实现高达 48.1 倍和 17.6 倍的加速。

items.title: Scoped Buffered Persistency Model for GPUs.
items.abstract:
While the implications of persistent memory (PM) on CPU hardware and software are well-explored, the same is not true for GPUs (Graphics Processing Units). A recent work, GPM, demonstrated how GPU programs can benefit from the fine-grain persistence of PM. However, in the absence of a persistency model, one cannot reason about the correctness of PM-aware GPU programs. Persistency models define the order in which writes to PM are persisted. We explore persistency models for GPUs.

We explore persistency models for GPUs. We demonstrate that CPU persistency models fall short for GPUs. We qualitatively and quantitatively argue that GPU persistency models should support scopes and buffering of writes to PM to leverage parallelism while adapting to higher NVM latencies. We formally specify a GPU persistency model that supports both scopes and buffers. We detail how GPU architecture can efficiently realize such a model. Finally, we quantitatively demonstrate the usefulness of scopes and buffers for PM-aware GPU programs.
items.abstract_zh:
虽然持久内存 (PM) 对 CPU 硬件和软件的影响已得到充分探讨，但对于 GPU（图形处理单元）而言却并非如此。最近的一项工作 GPM 展示了 GPU 程序如何从 PM 的细粒度持久性中受益。然而，在缺乏持久性模型的情况下，人们无法推断 PM 感知的 GPU 程序的正确性。持久性模型定义了 PM 写入的持久性顺序。我们探索 GPU 的持久性模型。

我们探索 GPU 的持久性模型。我们证明 CPU 持久性模型不适合 GPU。我们定性和定量地认为 GPU 持久性模型应该支持 PM 写入的范围和缓冲，以利用并行性，同时适应更高的 NVM 延迟。我们正式指定了支持范围和缓冲区的 GPU 持久性模型。我们详细介绍了 GPU 架构如何有效地实现这样的模型。最后，我们定量地展示了范围和缓冲区对于 PM 感知 GPU 程序的有用性。

items.title: Decker: Attack Surface Reduction via On-Demand Code Mapping.
items.abstract:
Modern code reuse attacks take full advantage of bloated software. Attackers piece together short sequences of instructions in otherwise benign code to carry out malicious actions. Mitigating these reusable code snippets, known as gadgets, has become one of the prime focuses of attack surface reduction research. While some debloating techniques remove parts of software that contain such gadgets, other methods focus on making them unusable by breaking up chains of them, thereby substantially diminishing the possibility of code reuse attacks. Third-party libraries are another main focus, because they exhibit a high number of vulnerabilities, but recently, techniques have emerged that deal with whole applications. Attack surface reduction efforts have typically tried to eliminate such attacks by subsetting (debloating) the application, e.g. via user-specified inputs, configurations, or features to achieve high gadget reductions. However, such techniques suffer from the limitations of soundness, i.e. the software might crash during no-attack executions on regular inputs, or they may be conservative and leave a large amount of attack surface untackled.

In this work we present a general, whole-program attack surface reduction technique called Decker that significantly reduces gadgets which are accessible to an attacker during an execution phase (called a deck) and has minor performance degradation. Decker requires no user inputs and leaves all features intact. It uses static analysis to determine key function sets that should be enabled/disabled at runtime. The runtime system then enables these function sets at the specified program points during execution. On SPEC CPU 2017, our framework achieves 73.2% total gadget reduction with 5.2% average slowdown. On 10 GNU coreutils applications, it achieves 87.2% reduction and negligible slowdown. On the nginx server it achieves 80.3% reduction with 2% slowdown. We also provide a gadget chain-breaking case study, including detailed JOP gadget metrics on both Linux and Windows, and show that our framework breaks the shell-spawning chain in all cases.
items.abstract_zh:
现代代码重用攻击充分利用了臃肿的软件。攻击者将原本良性代码中的短指令序列拼凑在一起，以执行恶意操作。减少这些可重用代码片段（称为小工具）已成为减少攻击面研究的主要焦点之一。虽然一些去膨胀技术会删除包含此类小工具的软件部分，但其他方法则侧重于通过破坏它们的链来使它们变得不可用，从而大大减少代码重用攻击的可能性。第三方库是另一个主要焦点，因为它们存在大量漏洞，但最近出现了处理整个应用程序的技术。减少攻击面的工作通常试图通过对应用程序进行子集化（消胀）来消除此类攻击，例如通过用户指定的输入、配置或功能来实现高设备减少。然而，此类技术受到健全性的限制，即软件可能在常规输入的无攻击执行期间崩溃，或者它们可能是保守的并且留下大量的攻击面未被解决。

在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为 Decker 的通用、全程序攻击面减少技术，该技术可显着减少攻击者在执行阶段可访问的小工具（称为套牌），并且性能下降较小。 Decker 不需要用户输入，并且所有功能都完好无损。它使用静态分析来确定应在运行时启用/禁用的关键功能集。然后，运行时系统在执行期间在指定的程序点启用这些函数集。在 SPEC CPU 2017 上，我们的框架实现了 73.2% 的总设备减少，平均速度降低 5.2%。在 10 个 GNU coreutils 应用程序上，它实现了 87.2% 的减少，并且速度下降可以忽略不计。在 nginx 服务器上，它实现了 80.3% 的减少和 2% 的减速。我们还提供了一个破坏小工具链的案例研究，包括 Linux 和 Windows 上详细的 JOP 小工具指标，并表明我们的框架在所有情况下都破坏了 shell 生成链。

items.title: GPU-Initiated On-Demand High-Throughput Storage Access in the BaM System Architecture.
items.abstract: Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) have traditionally relied on the host CPU to initiate access to the data storage. This approach is well-suited for GPU applications with known data access patterns that enable partitioning of their dataset to be processed in a pipelined fashion in the GPU. However, emerging applications such as graph and data analytics, recommender systems, or graph neural networks, require fine-grained, data-dependent access to storage. CPU initiation of storage access is unsuitable for these applications due to high CPU-GPU synchronization overheads, I/O traffic amplification, and long CPU processing latencies. GPU-initiated storage removes these overheads from the storage control path and, thus, can potentially support these applications at much higher speed. However, there is a lack of systems architecture and software stack that enable efficient GPU-initiated storage access. This work presents a novel system architecture, BaM, that fills this gap. BaM features a fine-grained software cache to coalesce data storage requests while minimizing I/O traffic amplification. This software cache communicates with the storage system via high-throughput queues that enable the massive number of concurrent threads in modern GPUs to make I/O requests at a high rate to fully utilize the storage devices and the system interconnect. Experimental results show that BaM delivers 1.0x and 1.49x end-to-end speed up for BFS and CC graph analytics benchmarks while reducing hardware costs by up to 21.7x over accessing the graph data from the host memory. Furthermore, BaM speeds up data-analytics workloads by 5.3x over CPU-initiated storage access on the same hardware.
items.abstract_zh: 图形处理单元 (GPU) 传统上依赖主机 CPU 来启动对数据存储的访问。这种方法非常适合具有已知数据访问模式的 GPU 应用程序，这些模式使得数据集分区能够在 GPU 中以流水线方式进行处理。然而，图形和数据分析、推荐系统或图形神经网络等新兴应用程序需要细粒度、依赖于数据的存储访问。由于 CPU-GPU 同步开销高、I/O 流量放大以及 CPU 处理延迟长，CPU 启动存储访问不适合这些应用程序。 GPU 启动的存储消除了存储控制路径中的这些开销，因此可以以更高的速度支持这些应用程序。然而，缺乏支持 GPU 发起的高效存储访问的系统架构和软件堆栈。这项工作提出了一种新颖的系统架构 BaM，填补了这一空白。 BaM 具有细粒度的软件缓存，可合并数据存储请求，同时最大限度地减少 I/O 流量放大。该软件缓存通过高吞吐量队列与存储系统通信，使现代 GPU 中的大量并发线程能够高速发出 I/O 请求，以充分利用存储设备和系统互连。实验结果表明，BaM 为 BFS 和 CC 图形分析基准提供了 1.0 倍和 1.49 倍的端到端速度，同时与从主机内存访问图形数据相比，硬件成本降低了高达 21.7 倍。此外，BaM 在相同硬件上将数据分析工作负载的速度比 CPU 发起的存储访问速度提高了 5.3 倍。

items.title: Better Than Worst-Case Decoding for Quantum Error Correction.
items.abstract:
The overheads of classical decoding for quantum error correction in cryogenic quantum systems grow rapidly with the number of logical qubits and their correction code distance. Decoding at room temperature is bottlenecked by refrigerator I/O bandwidth while cryogenic on-chip decoding is limited by area/power/thermal budget.

To overcome these overheads, we are motivated by the observation that in the common case (over 90% of the time), error correction 'syndromes' are fairly trivial with high redundancy / sparsity, since the error correction codes are over-provisioned to be able to correct for uncommon worst-case complex scenarios (to ensure substantially low logical error rates). If suitably exploited, these trivial scenarios can be handled with insignificant overhead, thereby alleviating any bottlenecks towards handling the worst-case scenarios by state-of-the-art means.

We propose Better Than Worst-Case Decoding for Quantum Error Correction, targeting cryogenic quantum systems and Surface Code, consisting of:

On-chip Clique Decoder: An extremely lightweight decoder for correcting trivial common-case errors, designed for the cryogenic domain. The decoder is implemented and evaluated for SFQ logic.

Statistical Off-chip Bandwidth Allocation: A statistical confidence-based technique for allocation of off-chip decoding bandwidth, to efficiently handle the rare complex decodes that are not covered by the Clique Decoder.

Decode-Overflow Execution Stalling: A method to stall circuit execution, for the worst-case scenarios in which the provisioned off-chip bandwidth is insufficient to complete all requested off-chip decodes.

In all, BTWC decoding achieves 70-99+% off-chip bandwidth elimination across a range of logical and physical error rates, without significantly sacrificing the accuracy of a state-of-the-art off-chip decoder. Further, it achieves 10-1000x bandwidth reduction over prior bandwidth reduction techniques, as well as 15-37x resource overhead reduction compared to prior on-chip decoding.
items.abstract_zh:
低温量子系统中用于量子纠错的经典解码的开销随着逻辑量子位的数量及其校正码距离的增加而快速增长。室温解码受到冰箱 I/O 带宽的瓶颈，而低温片上解码则受到面积/功耗/热预算的限制。

为了克服这些开销，我们的动机是观察到在常见情况下（超过 90% 的时间），纠错“综合症”在高冗余/稀疏性下相当微不足道，因为纠错码被过度配置，以便能够纠正不常见的最坏情况复杂场景（以确保相当低的逻辑错误率）。如果利用得当，这些琐碎的场景可以用微不足道的开销来处理，从而减轻通过最先进的手段处理最坏情况场景的任何瓶颈。

我们提出优于最坏情况的量子纠错解码，针对低温量子系统和表面代码，包括：

片上 Clique 解码器：一种极其轻量级的解码器，用于纠正微小的常见错误，专为低温领域而设计。解码器针对 SFQ 逻辑进行实现和评估。

统计片外带宽分配：一种基于统计置信度的技术，用于分配片外解码带宽，以有效处理 Clique 解码器未涵盖的罕见复杂解码。

解码溢出执行停止：一种停止电路执行的方法，适用于最坏的情况，即所提供的片外带宽不足以完成所有请求的片外解码。

总之，BTWC 解码在一系列逻辑和物理错误率范围内实现了 70-99+% 的片外带宽消除，而不会显着牺牲最先进的片外解码器的准确性。此外，与先前的带宽缩减技术相比，它实现了 10-1000 倍的带宽缩减，与先前的片上解码相比，资源开销也减少了 15-37 倍。

items.title: Navigating the Dynamic Noise Landscape of Variational Quantum Algorithms with QISMET.
items.abstract:
In the Noisy Intermediate Scale Quantum (NISQ) era, the dynamic nature of quantum systems causes noise sources to constantly vary over time. Transient errors from the dynamic NISQ noise landscape are challenging to comprehend and are especially detrimental to classes of applications that are iterative and/or long-running, and therefore their timely mitigation is important for quantum advantage in real-world applications.

The most popular examples of iterative long-running quantum applications are variational quantum algorithms (VQAs). Iteratively, VQA’s classical optimizer evaluates circuit candidates on an objective function and picks the best circuits towards achieving the application’s target. Noise fluctuation can cause a significant transient impact on the objective function estimation of the VQA iterations’ tuning candidates. This can severely affect VQA tuning and, by extension, its accuracy and convergence.

This paper proposes QISMET: Quantum Iteration Skipping to Mitigate Error Transients, to navigate the dynamic noise landscape of VQAs. QISMET actively avoids instances of high fluctuating noise which are predicted to have a significant transient error impact on specific VQA iterations. To achieve this, QISMET estimates transient error in VQA iterations and designs a controller to keep the VQA tuning faithful to the transient-free scenario. By doing so, QISMET efficiently mitigates a large portion of the transient noise impact on VQAs and is able to improve the fidelity by 1.3x-3x over a traditional VQA baseline, with 1.6-2.4x improvement over alternative approaches, across different applications and machines.
items.abstract_zh:
在噪声中尺度量子（NISQ）时代，量子系统的动态性质导致噪声源随时间不断变化。动态 NISQ 噪声环境中的瞬态误差难以理解，并且对于迭代和/或长时间运行的应用程序类别尤其有害，因此及时缓解它们对于实际应用中的量子优势非常重要。

迭代长时间运行的量子应用最流行的例子是变分量子算法（VQA）。 VQA 的经典优化器迭代地根据目标函数评估候选电路，并选择实现应用目标的最佳电路。噪声波动会对 VQA 迭代调整候选的目标函数估计造成显着的瞬时影响。这会严重影响 VQA 调整，进而影响其准确性和收敛性。

本文提出了 QISMET：量子迭代跳跃以减轻误差瞬态，以驾驭 VQA 的动态噪声环境。 QISMET 主动避免高波动噪声的情况，预计这些噪声会对特定 VQA 迭代产生显着的瞬态误差影响。为了实现这一目标，QISMET 估计 VQA 迭代中的瞬态误差，并设计一个控制器以保持 VQA 调整忠实于无瞬态场景。通过这样做，QISMET 有效地减轻了 VQA 上的大部分瞬态噪声影响，并且能够在不同的应用程序和机器上将传统 VQA 基线的保真度提高 1.3 倍至 3 倍，比替代方法提高 1.6 至 2.4 倍。

items.title: Propeller: A Profile Guided, Relinking Optimizer for Warehouse-Scale Applications.
items.abstract: While profile guided optimizations (PGO) and link time optimiza-tions (LTO) have been widely adopted, post link optimizations (PLO)have languished until recently when researchers demonstrated that late injection of profiles can yield significant performance improvements. However, the disassembly-driven, monolithic design of post link optimizers face scaling challenges with large binaries andis at odds with distributed build systems. To reconcile and enable post link optimizations within a distributed build environment, we propose Propeller, a relinking optimizer for warehouse scale work-loads. To enable flexible code layout optimizations, we introduce basic block sections, a novel linker abstraction. Propeller uses basic block sections to enable a new approach to PLO without disassembly. Propeller achieves scalability by relinking the binary using precise profiles instead of rewriting the binary. The overhead of relinking is lowered by caching and leveraging distributed compiler actions during code generation. Propeller has been deployed to production at Google with over tens of millions of cores executing Propeller optimized code at any time. An evaluation of internal warehouse-scale applications show Propeller improves performance by 1.1% to 8% beyond PGO and ThinLTO. Compiler tools such as Clang improve by 7% while MySQL improves by 1%. Compared to the state of the art binary optimizer, Propeller achieves comparable performance while lowering memory overheads by 30%-70% on large benchmarks.
items.abstract_zh: 虽然配置文件引导优化 (PGO) 和链接时间优化 (LTO) 已被广泛采用，但链接后优化 (PLO) 一直处于停滞状态，直到最近研究人员证明配置文件的后期注入可以带来显着的性能改进。然而，后链接优化器的反汇编驱动的整体设计面临着大型二进制文件的扩展挑战，并且与分布式构建系统不一致。为了在分布式构建环境中协调并启用链接后优化，我们提出了 Propeller，这是一种适用于仓库规模工作负载的重新链接优化器。为了实现灵活的代码布局优化，我们引入了基本的块部分，这是一种新颖的链接器抽象。 Propeller 使用基本块部分来实现无需拆卸的 PLO 新方法。 Propeller 通过使用精确的配置文件重新链接二进制文件而不是重写二进制文件来实现可扩展性。通过在代码生成期间缓存和利用分布式编译器操作，可以降低重新链接的开销。 Propeller 已在 Google 部署到生产环境，有超过数千万个核心随时执行 Propeller 优化的代码。对内部仓库规模应用程序的评估表明，Propeller 的性能比 PGO 和 ThinLTO 提高了 1.1% 到 8%。 Clang 等编译工具提高了 7%，MySQL 提高了 1%。与最先进的二进制优化器相比，Propeller 实现了可比的性能，同时在大型基准测试中将内存开销降低了 30%-70%。

items.title: Prism: Optimizing Key-Value Store for Modern Heterogeneous Storage Devices.
items.abstract: As data generation has been on an upward trend, storing vast volumes of data cost-effectively as well as efficiently accessing them is paramount. At the same time, today's storage landscape continues to diversify, from high-bandwidth storage devices such as NVMe SSDs to low-latency non-volatile memory (e.g., Intel Optane DCPMM). These heterogeneous storage devices have the potential to deliver high performance in terms of bandwidth and latency with cost efficiency, while achieving the performance and cost targets together still remains a challenging problem. We provide our solution, Prism, a novel key-value store that utilizes modern heterogeneous storage devices. Prism uses heterogeneous storage devices synergistically to harness the advantages of each storage device while suppressing their downsides. We devise new techniques to balance the latency-bandwidth tradeoff when reading from SSD. For ensuring multicore scalability and crash consistency of data across heterogeneous storage media, Prism proposes cross-storage concurrency control and cross-storage crash consistency protocols. Our evaluation shows that Prism outperforms state-of-the-art key-value stores by up to 13.1× with significantly lower tail latency.
items.abstract_zh: 随着数据生成呈上升趋势，经济高效地存储大量数据以及高效地访问它们至关重要。与此同时，当今的存储格局继续多样化，从 NVMe SSD 等高带宽存储设备到低延迟非易失性内存（例如 Intel Optane DCPMM）。这些异构存储设备有潜力以成本效率提供带宽和延迟方面的高性能，但同时实现性能和成本目标仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。我们提供我们的解决方案 Prism，这是一种利用现代异构存储设备的新型键值存储。 Prism协同使用异构存储设备，以利用每个存储设备的优点，同时抑制其缺点。我们设计了新技术来平衡从 SSD 读取时的延迟与带宽之间的权衡。为了确保跨异构存储介质的数据的多核可扩展性和崩溃一致性，Prism提出了跨存储并发控制和跨存储崩溃一致性协议。我们的评估表明，Prism 的性能比最先进的键值存储高出 13.1 倍，并且尾部延迟显着降低。

items.title: Optimus-CC: Efficient Large NLP Model Training with 3D Parallelism Aware Communication Compression.
items.abstract:
In training of modern large natural language processing (NLP) models, it has become a common practice to split models using 3D parallelism to multiple GPUs. Such technique, however, suffers from a high overhead of inter-node communication. Compressing the communication is one way to mitigate the overhead by reducing the inter-node traffic volume; however, the existing compression techniques have critical limitations to be applied for NLP models with 3D parallelism in that 1) only the data parallelism traffic is targeted, and 2) the existing compression schemes already harm the model quality too much.

In this paper, we present Optimus-CC, a fast and scalable distributed training framework for large NLP models with aggressive communication compression. Optimus-CC differs from existing communication compression frameworks in the following ways: First, we compress pipeline parallel (inter-stage) traffic. In specific, we compress the inter-stage backpropagation and the embedding synchronization in addition to the existing data-parallel traffic compression methods. Second, we propose techniques to avoid the model quality drop that comes from the compression. We further provide mathematical and empirical analyses to show that our techniques can successfully suppress the compression error. Lastly, we analyze the pipeline and opt to selectively compress those traffic lying on the critical path. This further helps reduce the compression error. We demonstrate our solution on a GPU cluster, and achieve superior speedup from the baseline state-of-the-art solutions for distributed training without sacrificing the model quality.
items.abstract_zh:
在现代大型自然语言处理 (NLP) 模型的训练中，使用 3D 并行性将模型拆分到多个 GPU 已成为常见做法。然而，这种技术面临节点间通信的高开销。压缩通信是通过减少节点间流量来减轻开销的一种方法；然而，现有的压缩技术在应用于具有 3D 并行性的 NLP 模型时具有严重的局限性，因为 1）仅以数据并行流量为目标，2）现有的压缩方案已经严重损害了模型质量。

在本文中，我们提出了 Optimus-CC，这是一种快速且可扩展的分布式训练框架，适用于具有积极通信压缩的大型 NLP 模型。 Optimus-CC 与现有通信压缩框架的不同之处在于以下几个方面：首先，我们压缩管道并行（级间）流量。具体来说，除了现有的数据并行流量压缩方法之外，我们还压缩了级间反向传播和嵌入同步。其次，我们提出了避免压缩导致的模型质量下降的技术。我们进一步提供数学和实证分析来表明我们的技术可以成功地抑制压缩误差。最后，我们分析管道并选择有选择地压缩关键路径上的流量。这进一步有助于减少压缩误差。我们在 GPU 集群上演示了我们的解决方案，并在不牺牲模型质量的情况下，从最先进的基线解决方案实现了分布式训练的卓越加速。

items.title: Ecovisor: A Virtual Energy System for Carbon-Efficient Applications.
items.abstract: Cloud platforms' rapid growth is raising significant concerns about their carbon emissions. To reduce carbon emissions, future cloud platforms will need to increase their reliance on renewable energy sources, such as solar and wind, which have zero emissions but are highly unreliable. Unfortunately, today's energy systems effectively mask this unreliability in hardware, which prevents applications from optimizing their carbon-efficiency, or work done per kilogram of carbon emitted. To address the problem, we design an "ecovisor", which virtualizes the energy system and exposes software-defined control of it to applications. An ecovisor enables each application to handle clean energy's unreliability in software based on its own specific requirements. We implement a small-scale ecovisor prototype that virtualizes a physical energy system to enable software-based application-level i) visibility into variable grid carbon-intensity and local renewable generation and ii) control of server power usage and battery charging and discharging. We evaluate the ecovisor approach by showing how multiple applications can concurrently exercise their virtual energy system in different ways to better optimize carbon-efficiency based on their specific requirements compared to general system-wide policies.
items.abstract_zh: 云平台的快速增长引发了人们对其碳排放的严重担忧。为了减少碳排放，未来的云平台将需要增加对可再生能源的依赖，例如太阳能和风能，这些能源零排放但非常不可靠。不幸的是，当今的能源系统有效地掩盖了硬件的这种不可靠性，从而阻止了应用程序优化其碳效率或每公斤碳排放完成的工作。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了一个“ecovisor”，它虚拟化能源系统并将其软件定义的控制暴露给应用程序。生态监控器使每个应用程序能够根据自己的具体要求处理软件中清洁能源的不可靠性。我们实施了一个小型生态监控器原型，该原型虚拟化了物理能源系统，以实现基于软件的应用程序级 i）对可变电网碳强度和本地可再生能源发电的可见性，以及 ii）对服务器电力使用和电池充电和放电的控制。我们通过展示多个应用程序如何以不同的方式同时运行其虚拟能源系统来评估生态管理器方法，以便根据其特定要求（与一般系统范围的政策相比）更好地优化碳效率。

items.title: LeaFTL: A Learning-Based Flash Translation Layer for Solid-State Drives.
items.abstract:
In modern solid-state drives (SSDs), the indexing of flash pages is a critical component in their storage controllers. It not only affects the data access performance, but also determines the efficiency of the precious in-device DRAM resource. A variety of address mapping schemes and optimizations have been proposed. However, most of them were developed with human-driven heuristics.

In this paper, we present a learning-based flash translation layer (FTL), named LeaFTL, which learns the address mapping to tolerate dynamic data access patterns via linear regression at runtime. By grouping a large set of mapping entries into a learned segment, it significantly reduces the memory footprint of the address mapping table, which further benefits the data caching in SSD controllers. LeaFTL also employs various optimization techniques, including out-of-band metadata verification to tolerate mispredictions, optimized flash allocation, and dynamic compaction of learned index segments. We implement LeaFTL with both a validated SSD simulator and a real open-channel SSD board. Our evaluation with various storage workloads demonstrates that LeaFTL saves the memory consumption of the mapping table by 2.9× and improves the storage performance by 1.4× on average, in comparison with state-of-the-art FTL schemes.
items.abstract_zh:
在现代固态硬盘 (SSD) 中，闪存页索引是其存储控制器中的关键组件。它不仅影响数据访问性能，还决定了宝贵的设备内DRAM资源的效率。已经提出了多种地址映射方案和优化。然而，其中大多数都是通过人为驱动的启发法开发的。

在本文中，我们提出了一种基于学习的闪存翻译层（FTL），名为LeaFTL，它在运行时通过线性回归学习地址映射以容忍动态数据访问模式。通过将大量映射条目分组到学习段中，可以显着减少地址映射表的内存占用，这进一步有利于 SSD 控制器中的数据缓存。 LeaFTL 还采用了各种优化技术，包括带外元数据验证以容忍错误预测、优化闪存分配以及学习索引段的动态压缩。我们使用经过验证的 SSD 模拟器和真正的开放通道 SSD 板来实现 LeaFTL。我们对各种存储工作负载的评估表明，与最先进的 FTL 方案相比，LeaFTL 平均节省了 2.9 倍的映射表内存消耗，并将存储性能平均提高了 1.4 倍。

items.title: Junkyard Computing: Repurposing Discarded Smartphones to Minimize Carbon.
items.abstract: 1.5 billion smartphones are sold annually, and most are decommissioned less than two years later. Most of these unwanted smartphones are neither discarded nor recycled but languish in junk drawers and storage units. This computational stockpile represents a substantial wasted potential: modern smartphones have increasingly high-performance and energy-efficient processors, extensive networking capabilities, and a reliable built-in power supply. This project studies the ability to reuse smartphones as "junkyard computers." Junkyard computers grow global computing capacity by extending device lifetimes, which supplants the manufacture of new devices. We show that the capabilities of even decade-old smartphones are within those demanded by modern cloud microservices and discuss how to combine phones to perform increasingly complex tasks. We describe how current operation-focused metrics do not capture the actual carbon costs of compute. We propose Computational Carbon Intensity---a performance metric that balances the continued service of older devices with the superlinear runtime improvements of newer machines. We use this metric to redefine device service lifetime in terms of carbon efficiency. We develop a cloudlet of reused Pixel 3A phones. We analyze the carbon benefits of deploying large, end-to-end microservice-based applications on these smartphones. Finally, we describe system architectures and associated challenges to scale to cloudlets with hundreds and thousands of smartphones.
items.abstract_zh: 智能手机每年售出 15 亿部，其中大多数在两年内就退役了。大多数这些不需要的智能手机既没有被丢弃也没有被回收，而是被搁置在垃圾抽屉和存储单元中。这种计算储备代表了巨大的浪费潜力：现代智能手机拥有越来越高性能和节能的处理器、广泛的网络功能以及可靠的内置电源。该项目研究将智能手机重新用作“垃圾场计算机”的能力。垃圾场计算机通过延长设备寿命来提高全球计算能力，从而取代新设备的制造。我们展示了即使是已有十年历史的智能手机的功能也符合现代云微服务的要求，并讨论了如何组合手机来执行日益复杂的任务。我们描述了当前以运营为中心的指标如何无法捕获计算的实际碳成本。我们提出计算碳强度——一种平衡旧设备的持续服务与新机器的超线性运行时间改进的性能指标。我们使用这个指标来重新定义碳效率方面的设备使用寿命。我们开发了一个由重复使用的 Pixel 3A 手机组成的云。我们分析了在这些智能手机上部署大型、基于端到端微服务的应用程序的碳效益。最后，我们描述了系统架构以及扩展到具有成百上千部智能手机的云的相关挑战。

items.title: Compilation Consistency Modulo Debug Information.
items.abstract:
Compilation Consistency Modulo Debug Information (CCMD) is an essential compiler property that a production compiler should support: the compiler should emit the same machine code regardless of enabling debug information. CCMD is vital to developers’ experiences with debugging a production binary containing no debug information. To debug such a binary, developers need build another binary with the same compiler flags and enable debug information. Without CCMD, the machine code in the latter binary will be different, which can confuse the debugger, hide the bug, or even cause a miscompilation (as GCC once did with the Linux Kernel).

This paper is the first to introduce to the research community the validation of CCMD, a new research problem that has been overlooked for decades despite its importance. More importantly, we propose the first testing technique Dfusor to automatically validate CCMD for C compilers. At the high level, given a compilable program P as a seed, Dfusor automatically generates compilable program variants via multiple effective program transformations. Such variants can cause a compiler to emit more debug information than it would when compiling P, thus exercising more code paths in the compiler and increasing the chance to find CCMD bugs.

Our extensive evaluations of Dfusor demonstrate that Dfusor can produce variants that exhibit significant increases in the quantity and complexity of the emitted debug information, and thus has found new, real bugs in GCC and LLVM. With a sample of 100 variants derived from distinct seed programs, Dfusor introduces 214% more debug information entries and 36% more distinct debug information entries in the variants than the seeds, and improves the code coverage of GCC and Clang by up to 6.00% and 6.82%. More importantly, Dfusor has found CCMD bugs; within 10 months of development and intermittent testing, Dfusor has found 23 bugs (9 in GCC and 14 in Clang), with 3 confirmed and 18 fixed.
items.abstract_zh:
编译一致性模调试信息 (CCMD) 是生产编译器应支持的基本编译器属性：无论启用调试信息如何，编译器都应发出相同的机器代码。 CCMD 对于开发人员调试不包含调试信息的生产二进制文件的体验至关重要。要调试此类二进制文件，开发人员需要使用相同的编译器标志构建另一个二进制文件并启用调试信息。如果没有 CCMD，后一个二进制文件中的机器代码将会不同，这可能会混淆调试器、隐藏错误，甚至导致错误编译（就像 GCC 曾经对 Linux 内核所做的那样）。

本文是第一篇向研究界介绍 CCMD 验证的论文，这是一个新的研究问题，尽管它很重要，但几十年来一直被忽视。更重要的是，我们提出了第一个测试技术 Dfusor 来自动验证 C 编译器的 CCMD。在高层，给定一个可编译程序 P 作为种子，Dfusor 通过多个有效的程序转换自动生成可编译程序变体。此类变体可能会导致编译器发出比编译 P 时更多的调试信息，从而在编译器中执行更多代码路径并增加发现 CCMD 错误的机会。

我们对 Dfusor 的广泛评估表明，Dfusor 可以生成在发出的调试信息的数量和复杂性方面显着增加的变体，从而在 GCC 和 LLVM 中发现新的、真正的错误。通过从不同种子程序派生的 100 个变体样本，Dfusor 在变体中引入的调试信息条目比种子多 214%，不同调试信息条目多 36%，并将 GCC 和 Clang 的代码覆盖率分别提高了 6.00% 和 6.82%。更重要的是，Dfusor发现了CCMD的bug；经过 10 个月的开发和间歇性测试，Dfusor 发现了 23 个错误（GCC 中 9 个，Clang 中 14 个），其中 3 个已确认，18 个已修复。

items.title: WACO: Learning Workload-Aware Co-optimization of the Format and Schedule of a Sparse Tensor Program.
items.abstract: In this paper, we present WACO, a novel method of co-optimizing the format and the schedule of a given sparsity pattern in a sparse tensor program. A core challenge in this paper is the design of a lightweight cost model that accurately predicts the runtime of a sparse tensor program by considering the sparsity pattern, the format, and the schedule. The key idea in addressing this is exploiting a sparse convolutional network to learn meaningful features of the sparsity pattern and embedding a coupled behavior between the format and the schedule using a specially designed schedule template. In addition, within the enormous search space of co-optimization, our novel search strategy, an approximate nearest neighbor search, efficiently and accurately retrieves the best format and schedule for a given sparsity pattern. We evaluated WACO for four different algorithms (SpMV, SpMM, SDDMM, and MTTKRP) on a CPU using 726 different sparsity patterns. Our experimental results showed that WACO outperformed four state-of-the-art baselines, Intel MKL, BestFormat, TACO with a default schedule, and ASpT. Compared to the best of four baselines, WACO achieved 1.43×, 1.18×, 1.14×, and 1.27× average speedups on SpMV, SpMM, SDDMM, and MTTKRP, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 WACO，一种在稀疏张量程序中共同优化给定稀疏模式的格式和时间表的新方法。本文的核心挑战是设计一个轻量级成本模型，通过考虑稀疏模式、格式和时间表来准确预测稀疏张量程序的运行时间。解决这个问题的关键思想是利用稀疏卷积网络来学习稀疏模式的有意义的特征，并使用专门设计的时间表模板在格式和时间表之间嵌入耦合行为。此外，在协同优化的巨大搜索空间中，我们新颖的搜索策略（近似最近邻搜索）可以有效且准确地检索给定稀疏模式的最佳格式和时间表。我们使用 726 种不同的稀疏模式在 CPU 上评估了四种不同算法（SpMV、SpMM、SDDMM 和 MTTKRP）的 WACO。我们的实验结果表明，WACO 的性能优于四种最先进的基线：Intel MKL、BestFormat、具有默认计划的 TACO 和 ASpT。与四个基线中最好的相比，WACO 在 SpMV、SpMM、SDDMM 和 MTTKRP 上分别实现了 1.43×、1.18×、1.14× 和 1.27× 平均加速。

items.title: Hacky Racers: Exploiting Instruction-Level Parallelism to Generate Stealthy Fine-Grained Timers.
items.abstract:
Side-channel attacks pose serious threats to many security models, especially sandbox-based browsers. While transient-execution side channels in out-of-order processors have previously been blamed for vulnerabilities such as Spectre and Meltdown, we show that in fact, the capability of out-of-order execution itself to cause mayhem is far more general.

We develop Hacky Racers, a new type of timing gadget that uses instruction-level parallelism, another key feature of out-of-order execution, to measure arbitrary fine-grained timing differences, even in the presence of highly restricted JavaScript sandbox environments. While such environments try to mitigate timing side channels by reducing timer precision and removing language features such as SharedArrayBuffer that can be used to indirectly generate timers via thread-level parallelism, no such restrictions can be designed to limit Hacky Racers. We also design versions of Hacky Racers that require no misspeculation whatsoever, demonstrating that transient execution is not the only threat to security from modern microarchitectural performance optimization.

We use Hacky Racers to construct novel backwards-in-time Spectre gadgets, which break many hardware countermeasures in the literature by leaking secrets before misspeculation is discovered. We also use them to generate the first known last-level cache eviction set generator in JavaScript that does not require SharedArrayBuffer support.
items.abstract_zh:
旁道攻击对许多安全模型构成严重威胁，尤其是基于沙箱的浏览器。虽然乱序处理器中的瞬态执行侧通道之前被指责为 Spectre 和 Meltdown 等漏洞的罪魁祸首，但我们表明，事实上，乱序执行本身造成混乱的能力要普遍得多。

我们开发了 Hacky Racers，这是一种新型计时小工具，它使用指令级并行性（乱序执行的另一个关键功能）来测量任意细粒度的计时差异，即使存在高度限制的 JavaScript 沙箱环境也是如此。虽然此类环境尝试通过降低计时器精度和删除可用于通过线程级并行性间接生成计时器的 SharedArrayBuffer 等语言功能来减轻计时侧通道的影响，但不能设计此类限制来限制 Hacky Racers。我们还设计了不需要任何误推测的 Hacky Racers 版本，这表明瞬态执行并不是现代微架构性能优化对安全性的唯一威胁。

我们使用 Hacky Racers 来构建新颖的时间倒退幽灵小工具，这些小工具通过在错误推测被发现之前泄露秘密来打破文献中的许多硬件对抗措施。我们还使用它们在 JavaScript 中生成第一个已知的末级缓存驱逐集生成器，该生成器不需要 SharedArrayBuffer 支持。

items.title: HuffDuff: Stealing Pruned DNNs from Sparse Accelerators.
items.abstract:
Deep learning models are a valuable “secret sauce” that confers a significant competitive advantage. Many models are never visible to the user and even publicly known state-of-the-art models are either completely proprietary or only accessible via access-controlled APIs. Increasingly, these models run directly on the edge , often using a low-power DNN accelerator. This makes models particularly vulnerable, as an attacker with physical access can exploit side channels like off-chip memory access volumes. Indeed, prior work has shown that this channel can be used to steal dense DNNs from edge devices by correlating data transfer volumes with layer geometry.

Unfortunately, prior techniques become intractable when the model is sparse in either weights or activations because off-chip transfers no longer correspond exactly to layer dimensions. Could it be that the many mobile-class sparse accelerators are inherently safe from this style of attack?

In this paper, we show that it is feasible to steal a pruned DNN model architecture from a mobile-class sparse accelerator using the DRAM access volume channel. We describe HuffDuff, an attack scheme with two novel techniques that leverage (i) ‍the boundary effect present in CONV layers, and (ii) ‍the timing side channel of on-the-fly activation compression. Together, these techniques dramatically reduce the space of possible model architectures up to 94 orders of magnitude , resulting in fewer than 100 candidate models — a number that can be feasibly tested. Finally, we sample network instances from our solution space and show that (i) ‍our solutions reach the victim accuracy under the iso-footprint constraint, and (ii) ‍significantly improve black-box targeted attack success rates.
items.abstract_zh:
深度学习模型是一种宝贵的“秘密武器”，可以带来显着的竞争优势。许多模型对用户来说永远是不可见的，甚至众所周知的最先进模型要么完全专有，要么只能通过访问控制的 API 访问。这些模型越来越多地直接在边缘运行，通常使用低功耗 DNN 加速器。这使得模型特别容易受到攻击，因为具有物理访问权限的攻击者可以利用诸如片外内存访问卷之类的边通道。事实上，之前的工作已经表明，通过将数据传输量与层几何结构相关联，该通道可用于从边缘设备窃取密集的 DNN。

不幸的是，当模型的权重或激活稀疏时，现有技术变得棘手，因为片外传输不再精确对应于层维度。难道许多移动级稀疏加速器本质上就可以免受这种类型的攻击吗？

在本文中，我们证明使用 DRAM 访问卷通道从移动级稀疏加速器窃取修剪后的 DNN 模型架构是可行的。我们描述了 HuffDuff，这是一种采用两种新颖技术的攻击方案，这些技术利用了（i）CONV 层中存在的边界效应，以及（ii）动态激活压缩的定时侧通道。这些技术共同将可能的模型架构的空间大幅减少了 94 个数量级，从而导致候选模型少于 100 个——这是一个可以进行可行测试的数字。最后，我们从解决方案空间中对网络实例进行采样，结果表明：(i) 我们的解决方案在 iso 足迹约束下达到了受害者的准确度，并且 (ii) 显着提高了黑盒针对性攻击的成功率。

items.title: Betty: Enabling Large-Scale GNN Training with Batch-Level Graph Partitioning.
items.abstract: The Graph Neural Network (GNN) is showing outstanding results in improving the performance of graph-based applications. Recent studies demonstrate that GNN performance can be boosted via using more advanced aggregators, deeper aggregation depth, larger sampling rate, etc. While leading to promising results, the improvements come at a cost of significantly increased memory footprint, easily exceeding GPU memory capacity. In this paper, we introduce a method, Betty, to make GNN training more scalable and accessible via batch-level partitioning. Different from DNN training, a mini-batch in GNN has complex dependencies between input features and output labels, making batch-level partitioning difficult. Betty introduces two noveltechniques, redundancy-embedded graph (REG) partitioning and memory-aware partitioning, to effectively mitigate the redundancy and load imbalances issues across the partitions. Our evaluation of large-scale real-world datasets shows that Betty can significantly mitigate the memory bottleneck, enabling scalable GNN training with much deeper aggregation depths, larger sampling rate, larger training batch sizes, together with more advanced aggregators, with a few as a single GPU.
items.abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）在提高基于图的应用程序的性能方面表现出了出色的成果。最近的研究表明，GNN 的性能可以通过使用更先进的聚合器、更深的聚合深度、更大的采样率等来提升。虽然带来了有希望的结果，但这些改进是以显着增加内存占用为代价的，很容易超出 GPU 内存容量。在本文中，我们介绍了一种 Betty 方法，可以通过批处理级分区使 GNN 训练更具可扩展性和可访问性。与 DNN 训练不同，GNN 中的小批量在输入特征和输出标签之间具有复杂的依赖关系，使得批量级别的划分变得困难。 Betty 介绍了两种新颖的技术：冗余嵌入图 (REG) 分区和内存感知分区，以有效缓解分区之间的冗余和负载不平衡问题。我们对大规模现实世界数据集的评估表明，Betty 可以显着缓解内存瓶颈，实现可扩展的 GNN 训练，具有更深的聚合深度、更大的采样率、更大的训练批量大小，以及更先进的聚合器，只需几个 GPU。

items.title: SpecPMT: Speculative Logging for Resolving Crash Consistency Overhead of Persistent Memory.
items.abstract: Crash consistency overhead is a long-standing barrier to the adoption of byte-addressable persistent memory in practice. Despite continuous progress, persistent transactions for crash consistency still incur a 5.6X slowdown, making persistent memory prohibitively costly in practical settings. This paper introduces speculative logging, a new method that forgoes most memory fences and reduces data persistence overhead by logging data values early. This technique enables a novel persistent transaction model, speculatively persistent memory transactions (SpecPMT). Our evaluation shows that SpecPMT reduces the execution time overheads of persistent transactions substantially to just 10%.
items.abstract_zh: 崩溃一致性开销是在实践中采用字节可寻址持久内存的长期障碍。尽管不断取得进展，但用于崩溃一致性的持久事务仍然会导致 5.6 倍的减速，使得持久内存在实际设置中成本过高。本文介绍了推测性日志记录，这是一种放弃大多数内存围栏并通过尽早记录数据值来减少数据持久性开销的新方法。该技术支持一种新颖的持久事务模型，即推测性持久内存事务（SpecPMT）。我们的评估表明，SpecPMT 将持久事务的执行时间开销大幅减少至 10%。

items.title: VClinic: A Portable and Efficient Framework for Fine-Grained Value Profilers.
items.abstract: Fine-grained value profilers reveal a promising way to accurately detect value-related software inefficiencies with binary instrumentation. Due to the architecture-dependent implementation details of binary instrumentation, existing value profilers suffer from poor portability as well as high engineering efforts to achieve efficiency across platforms. In this paper, we propose VClinic , a portable and efficient fine-grained value profiling framework for analyzing highly optimized binaries on both X86 and ARM platforms. VClinic exploits operand-centric two-level designs in its implementation to provide the common building blocks required for value profilers. By constructing four representative value profilers with VClinic , we demonstrate that VClinic can ease the development of value profilers with portability and efficiency across platforms. Guided by the value profilers built upon VClinic , we can achieve up to 89.94% and 74.66% speedup for real-world programs on X86 and ARM platforms, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 细粒度的价值分析器揭示了一种利用二进制仪器准确检测与价值相关的软件效率低下的有前景的方法。由于二进制仪器依赖于架构的实现细节，现有的价值分析器存在可移植性差以及为实现跨平台效率而付出的巨大工程努力的问题。在本文中，我们提出了 VClinic，这是一种可移植且高效的细粒度值分析框架，用于分析 X86 和 ARM 平台上高度优化的二进制文件。 VClinic 在其实现中利用以操作数为中心的两级设计来提供值分析器所需的通用构建块。通过使用 VClinic 构建四个具有代表性的价值分析器，我们证明了 VClinic 可以通过跨平台的可移植性和高效性来简化价值分析器的开发。在基于 VClinic 构建的价值分析器的指导下，我们可以分别为 X86 和 ARM 平台上的实际程序实现高达 89.94% 和 74.66% 的加速。

items.title: VDom: Fast and Unlimited Virtual Domains on Multiple Architectures.
items.abstract:
Hardware memory domain primitives, such as Intel MPK and ARM Memory Domain, have been used for efficient in-process memory isolation. However, they can only provide a limited number of memory domains (16 domains), which cannot satisfy the compelling need for more isolated domains inside the address space of a process. Existing solutions to virtualize memory domains are either intrusive (need the modification to existing hardware), or incur a large performance overhead.

In this paper, we propose VDom, a fast and scalable memory domain virtualization system that supports unlimited memory domains. VDom leverages separate address spaces to provide an unlimited number of virtual domains, and optimizes related memory management operations. To map virtual domains to hardware domains, we design a domain virtualization algorithm, which manages address spaces and domain maps for threads to efficiently access other domains that are unmapped in the current address space. According to our evaluation on real Intel and ARM platforms, on real-world server applications (httpd and MySQL), VDom incurs less than 2.65% performance overhead, which is lower than the overheads of the state-of-the-art software approaches (libmpk and EPK). In random domain access tests, VDom is comparable to EPK and has significantly higher efficiency than libmpk.
items.abstract_zh:
硬件内存域原语（例如 Intel MPK 和 ARM Memory Domain）已用于高效的进程内内存隔离。然而，它们只能提供有限数量的内存域（16 个域），这无法满足进程地址空间内对更多隔离域的迫切需求。现有的虚拟化内存域的解决方案要么是侵入性的（需要修改现有硬件），要么会产生大量的性能开销。

在本文中，我们提出了VDom，一种快速且可扩展的内存域虚拟化系统，支持无限的内存域。 VDom利用独立的地址空间提供无限数量的虚拟域，并优化相关的内存管理操作。为了将虚拟域映射到硬件域，我们设计了域虚拟化算法，该算法管理线程的地址空间和域映射，以便有效地访问当前地址空间中未映射的其他域。根据我们对真实 Intel 和 ARM 平台的评估，在真实服务器应用程序（httpd 和 MySQL）上，VDom 产生的性能开销不到 2.65%，低于最先进的软件方法（libmpk 和 EPK）的开销。在随机域访问测试中，VDom 与 EPK 相当，并且效率明显高于 libmpk。

items.title: TLP: A Deep Learning-Based Cost Model for Tensor Program Tuning.
items.abstract:
Tensor program tuning is a non-convex objective optimization problem, to which search-based approaches have proven to be effective. At the core of the search-based approaches lies the design of the cost model. Though deep learning-based cost models perform significantly better than other methods, they still fall short and suffer from the following problems. First, their feature extraction heavily relies on expert-level domain knowledge in hardware architectures. Even so, the extracted features are often unsatisfactory and require separate considerations for CPUs and GPUs. Second, a cost model trained on one hardware platform usually performs poorly on another, a problem we call cross-hardware unavailability.

In order to address these problems, we propose TLP and MTL-TLP. TLP is a deep learning-based cost model that facilitates tensor program tuning. Instead of extracting features from the tensor program itself, TLP extracts features from the schedule primitives. We treat schedule primitives as tensor languages. TLP is thus a T ensor L anguage P rocessing task. In this way, the task of predicting the tensor program latency through the cost model is transformed into a natural language processing (NLP) regression task. MTL-TLP combines M ulti- T ask L earning and TLP to cope with the cross-hardware unavailability problem.

We incorporate these techniques into the Ansor framework and conduct detailed experiments. Results show that TLP can speed up the average search time by 9.1× and 3.0× on CPU and GPU workloads, respectively, compared to the state-of-the-art implementation. MTL-TLP can achieve a speed-up of 4.7× and 2.9× on CPU and GPU workloads, respectively, using only 7% of the target hardware data. To the best of our knowledge, TLP is the first tensor program cost model to extract features directly from schedule primitives, and MTL-TLP is the first open-sourced work that effectively addresses the cross-platform unavailability problem. The code is available at https://github.com/zhaiyi000/tlp.
items.abstract_zh:
张量程序调整是一个非凸目标优化问题，基于搜索的方法已被证明是有效的。基于搜索的方法的核心在于成本模型的设计。尽管基于深度学习的成本模型的性能明显优于其他方法，但它们仍然存在不足并存在以下问题。首先，它们的特征提取严重依赖于硬件架构中的专家级领域知识。即便如此，提取的特征往往不能令人满意，需要分别考虑CPU和GPU。其次，在一个硬件平台上训练的成本模型通常在另一个硬件平台上表现不佳，我们将这个问题称为跨硬件不可用性。

为了解决这些问题，我们提出了TLP和MTL-TLP。 TLP 是一种基于深度学习的成本模型，有助于张量程序调整。 TLP 不是从张量程序本身提取特征，而是从调度基元中提取特征。我们将调度原语视为张量语言。因此，TLP 是一个张量语言处理任务。这样，通过成本模型预测张量程序延迟的任务就转化为自然语言处理（NLP）回归任务。 MTL-TLP结合了M ulti-T 问L收益和TLP来应对跨硬件不可用问题。

我们将这些技术融入到 Ansor 框架中并进行详细的实验。结果表明，与最先进的实现相比，TLP 可以将 CPU 和 GPU 工作负载的平均搜索时间分别加快 9.1 倍和 3.0 倍。 MTL-TLP 仅使用 7% 的目标硬件数据，即可在 CPU 和 GPU 工作负载上分别实现 4.7 倍和 2.9 倍的加速。据我们所知，TLP是第一个直接从调度原语中提取特征的张量程序成本模型，而MTL-TLP是第一个有效解决跨平台不可用性问题的开源工作。代码可在 https://github.com/zhaiyi000/tlp 获取。

items.title: TelaMalloc: Efficient On-Chip Memory Allocation for Production Machine Learning Accelerators.
items.abstract:
Memory buffer allocation for on-chip memories is a major challenge in modern machine learning systems that target ML accelerators. In interactive systems such as mobile phones, it is on the critical path of launching ML-enabled applications. In data centers, it is part of complex optimization loops that run many times and are the limiting factor for the quality of compilation results.

In contrast to the traditional memory allocation problem in languages such as C++, where allocation requests dynamically arrive as the application is executing, ML systems typically execute a static control flow graph that is known in advance. The task of the memory allocator is to choose buffer locations in device memory such that the total amount of used memory never exceeds the total memory available on-device. This is a high dimensional, NP-hard optimization problem that is challenging to solve.

Today, ML frameworks approach this problem either using ad-hoc heuristics or solver-based methods. Heuristic solutions work for simple cases but fail for more complex instances of this problem. Solver-based solutions can handle these more complex instances, but are expensive and impractical in scenarios where memory allocation is on the critical path, such as on mobile devices that compile models on-the-fly. We encountered this problem in the development of Google's Pixel 6 phone, where some important models took prohibitively long to compile.

We introduce an approach that solves this challenge by combining constraint optimization with domain-specific knowledge to achieve the best properties of both. We combine a heuristic-based search with a solver to guide its decision making. Our approach matches heuristics for simple inputs while being significantly faster than the best Integer Linear Program (ILP) solver-based approach for complex inputs. We also show how ML can be used to continuously improve the search for the long tail of workloads. Our approach is shipping in two production systems: Google's Pixel 6 phone and TPUv4. It achieves up to two orders of magnitude allocation time speed-up on real ML workloads compared to a highly-tuned production ILP approach that it replaces and enables important real-world models that could not otherwise be supported.
items.abstract_zh:
片上存储器的内存缓冲区分配是针对 ML 加速器的现代机器学习系统的主要挑战。在手机等交互系统中，它处于启动支持机器学习的应用程序的关键路径上。在数据中心中，它是运行多次的复杂优化循环的一部分，并且是编译结果质量的限制因素。

与 C++ 等语言中的传统内存分配问题（分配请求在应用程序执行时动态到达）相反，ML 系统通常执行预先已知的静态控制流图。内存分配器的任务是选择设备内存中的缓冲区位置，以使已用内存总量永远不会超过设备上可用的总内存量。这是一个高维、NP 难优化问题，解决起来具有挑战性。

如今，机器学习框架使用临时启发式方法或基于求解器的方法来解决这个问题。启发式解决方案适用于简单的情况，但不适用于该问题的更复杂的情况。基于求解器的解决方案可以处理这些更复杂的实例，但在内存分配位于关键路径上的情况下（例如在动态编译模型的移动设备上），成本高昂且不切实际。我们在开发 Google Pixel 6 手机时遇到了这个问题，一些重要模型的编译时间过长。

我们引入了一种方法，通过将约束优化与特定领域的知识相结合来解决这一挑战，以实现两者的最佳属性。我们将基于启发式的搜索与求解器相结合来指导其决策。我们的方法与简单输入的启发式相匹配，同时比针对复杂输入的最佳基于整数线性程序 (ILP) 求解器的方法要快得多。我们还展示了如何使用机器学习来不断改进对工作负载长尾的搜索。我们的方法是在两个生产系统中发货：Google 的 Pixel 6 手机和 TPUv4。与高度调整的生产 ILP 方法相比，它在实际 ML 工作负载上实现了高达两个数量级的分配时间加速，它取代并支持了原本无法支持的重要现实世界模型。

items.title: DecoMine: A Compilation-Based Graph Pattern Mining System with Pattern Decomposition.
items.abstract:
Graph pattern mining (GPM) is an important application that identifies structures from graphs. Despite the recent progress, the performance gap between the state-of-the-art GPM systems and an efficient algorithm—pattern decomposition—is still at least an order of magnitude. This paper clears the fundamental obstacles of adopting pattern decomposition to a GPM system.

First, the performance of pattern decomposition algorithms depends on how to decompose the whole pattern into subpatterns. The original method performs complexity analysis of algorithms for different choices, and selects the one with the lowest complexity upper bound. Clearly, this approach is not feasible for average or even expert users. To solve this problem, we develop a GPM compiler with conventional and GPM-specific optimizations to generate algorithms for different decomposition choices, which are evaluated based on an accurate cost model. The executable of the GPM task is obtained from the algorithm with the best performance. Second, we propose a novel partial-embedding API that is sufficient to construct advanced GPM applications while preserving pattern decomposition algorithm advantages. Compared to state-of-the-art systems, our new GPM system, DecoMine, developed based on the ideas, reduces the execution time of GPM on large graphs and patterns from days to a few hours with low programming effort.
items.abstract_zh:
图模式挖掘（GPM）是从图中识别结构的重要应用。尽管最近取得了进展，但最先进的 GPM 系统和高效算法（模式分解）之间的性能差距仍然至少是一个数量级。本文清除了在 GPM 系统中采用模式分解的根本障碍。

首先，模式分解算法的性能取决于如何将整个模式分解为子模式。原始方法对不同选择的算法进行复杂度分析，并选择复杂度上限最低的算法。显然，这种方法对于普通用户甚至专家用户来说都是不可行的。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一个具有传统和 GPM 特定优化的 GPM 编译器，以生成不同分解选择的算法，并根据准确的成本模型进行评估。 GPM任务的可执行文件是从性能最好的算法中获得的。其次，我们提出了一种新颖的部分嵌入 API，足以构建高级 GPM 应用程序，同时保留模式分解算法的优势。与最先进的系统相比，我们基于这些想法开发的新 GPM 系统 DecoMine 可以将大型图形和模式上的 GPM 执行时间从几天缩短到几个小时，并且编程工作量很少。

items.title: Risotto: A Dynamic Binary Translator for Weak Memory Model Architectures.
items.abstract:
Dynamic Binary Translation (DBT) is a powerful approach to support cross-architecture emulation of unmodified binaries. However, DBT systems face correctness and performance challenges, when emulating concurrent binaries from strong to weak memory consistency architectures . As a matter of fact, we report several translation errors in QEMU, when emulating x86 binaries on Arm hosts.

To address these challenges, we propose an end-to-end approach that provides correct and efficient emulation for weak memory model architectures. Our contributions are twofold: we formalize QEMU’s intermediate representation’s memory model, and use it to propose formally verified mapping schemes to bridge the strong-on-weak memory consistency mismatch . Secondly, we implement these verified mappings in Risotto, a QEMU-based DBT system that optimizes memory fence placement while ensuring correctness. Risotto further enhances the emulation performance via cross-architecture dynamic linking of native shared libraries, and fast and correct translation of compare-and-swap operations.

We evaluate Risotto using multi-threaded benchmark suites and real-world applications, and show that Risotto improves the emulation performance by 6.7% on average over ”erroneous” QEMU, while ensuring correctness.
items.abstract_zh:
动态二进制翻译 (DBT) 是支持未修改二进制文件的跨架构模拟的强大方法。然而，在模拟从强到弱内存一致性架构的并发二进制文件时，DBT 系统面临正确性和性能挑战。事实上，在 Arm 主机上模拟 x86 二进制文件时，我们报告了 QEMU 中的几个转换错误。

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种端到端方法，为弱内存模型架构提供正确且高效的模拟。我们的贡献是双重的：我们形式化了 QEMU 的中间表示的内存模型，并用它来提出经过形式验证的映射方案，以弥合强弱内存一致性不匹配。其次，我们在 Risotto 中实现这些经过验证的映射，Risotto 是一个基于 QEMU 的 DBT 系统，可优化内存栅栏放置，同时确保正确性。 Risotto 通过本机共享库的跨架构动态链接以及比较和交换操作的快速且正确的转换，进一步增强了仿真性能。

我们使用多线程基准测试套件和实际应用程序对 Risotto 进行评估，结果表明 Risotto 的仿真性能比“错误”QEMU 平均提高了 6.7%，同时确保了正确性。

items.title: Erms: Efficient Resource Management for Shared Microservices with SLA Guarantees.
items.abstract:
A common approach to improving resource utilization in data centers is to adaptively provision resources based on the actual workload. One fundamental challenge of doing this in microservice management frameworks, however, is that different components of a service can exhibit significant differences in their impact on end-to-end performance. To make resource management more challenging, a single microservice can be shared by multiple online services that have diverse workload patterns and SLA requirements.

We present an efficient resource management system, namely Erms, for guaranteeing SLAs in shared microservice environments. Erms profiles microservice latency as a piece-wise linear function of the workload, resource usage, and interference. Based on this profiling, Erms builds resource scaling models to optimally determine latency targets for microservices with complex dependencies. Erms also designs new scheduling policies at shared microservices to further enhance resource efficiency. Experiments across microservice benchmarks as well as trace-driven simulations demonstrate that Erms can reduce SLA violation probability by 5× and more importantly, lead to a reduction in resource usage by 1.6×, compared to state-of-the-art approaches.
items.abstract_zh:
提高数据中心资源利用率的常见方法是根据实际工作负载自适应地配置资源。然而，在微服务管理框架中执行此操作的一个基本挑战是，服务的不同组件对端到端性能的影响可能表现出显着差异。为了使资源管理更具挑战性，单个微服务可以由具有不同工作负载模式和 SLA 要求的多个在线服务共享。

我们提出了一种高效的资源管理系统，即 Erms，用于保证共享微服务环境中的 SLA。 Erms 将微服务延迟描述为工作负载、资源使用和干扰的分段线性函数。基于此分析，Erms 构建资源扩展模型，以最佳方式确定具有复杂依赖项的微服务的延迟目标。 Erms还在共享微服务上设计了新的调度策略，以进一步提高资源效率。跨微服务基准测试以及跟踪驱动的模拟的实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，Erms 可以将 SLA 违规概率降低 5 倍，更重要的是，可以将资源使用量减少 1.6 倍。

items.title: CAFQA: A Classical Simulation Bootstrap for Variational Quantum Algorithms.
items.abstract:
Classical computing plays a critical role in the advancement of quantum frontiers in the NISQ era. In this spirit, this work uses classical simulation to bootstrap Variational Quantum Algorithms (VQAs). VQAs rely upon the iterative optimization of a parameterized unitary circuit (ansatz) with respect to an objective function. Since quantum machines are noisy and expensive resources, it is imperative to classically choose the VQA ansatz initial parameters to be as close to optimal as possible to improve VQA accuracy and accelerate their convergence on today’s devices.

This work tackles the problem of finding a good ansatz initialization, by proposing CAFQA, a Clifford Ansatz For Quantum Accuracy. The CAFQA ansatz is a hardware-efficient circuit built with only Clifford gates. In this ansatz, the parameters for the tunable gates are chosen by searching efficiently through the Clifford parameter space via classical simulation. The resulting initial states always equal or outperform traditional classical initialization (e.g., Hartree-Fock), and enable high-accuracy VQA estimations. CAFQA is well-suited to classical computation because: a) Clifford-only quantum circuits can be exactly simulated classically in polynomial time, and b) the discrete Clifford space is searched efficiently via Bayesian Optimization.

For the Variational Quantum Eigensolver (VQE) task of molecular ground state energy estimation (up to 18 qubits), CAFQA’s Clifford Ansatz achieves a mean accuracy of nearly 99% and recovers as much as 99.99% of the molecular correlation energy that is lost in Hartree-Fock initialization. CAFQA achieves mean accuracy improvements of 6.4x and 56.8x, over the state-of-the-art, on different metrics. The scalability of the approach allows for preliminary ground state energy estimation of the challenging chromium dimer (Cr2) molecule. With CAFQA’s high-accuracy initialization, the convergence of VQAs is shown to accelerate by 2.5x, even for small molecules.

Furthermore, preliminary exploration of allowing a limited number of non-Clifford (T) gates in the CAFQA framework, shows that as much as 99.9% of the correlation energy can be recovered at bond lengths for which Clifford-only CAFQA accuracy is relatively limited, while remaining classically simulable.
items.abstract_zh:
经典计算在 NISQ 时代量子前沿的进步中发挥着至关重要的作用。本着这种精神，这项工作使用经典模拟来引导变分量子算法（VQA）。 VQA 依赖于参数化酉电路 (ansatz) 相对于目标函数的迭代优化。由于量子机是嘈杂且昂贵的资源，因此必须经典地选择尽可能接近最佳的 VQA ansatz 初始参数，以提高 VQA 精度并加速其在当今设备上的收敛。

这项工作通过提出 CAFQA（用于量子精度的 Clifford Ansatz）来解决寻找良好 ansatz 初始化的问题。 CAFQA ansatz 是一种仅使用 Clifford 门构建的硬件高效电路。在这个 ansatz 中，可调谐门的参数是通过经典模拟有效搜索 Clifford 参数空间来选择的。由此产生的初始状态始终等于或优于传统的经典初始化（例如 Hartree-Fock），并且能够实现高精度 VQA 估计。 CAFQA 非常适合经典计算，因为：a）仅 Clifford 量子电路可以在多项式时间内精确地进行经典模拟，b）通过贝叶斯优化有效搜索离散 Clifford 空间。

对于分子基态能量估计（最多 18 个量子位）的变分量子本征求解器 (VQE) 任务，CAFQA 的 Clifford Ansatz 实现了接近 99% 的平均准确度，并恢复了 Hartree-Fock 初始化中丢失的高达 99.99% 的分子相关能量。与最先进的技术相比，CAFQA 在不同指标上的平均准确度提高了 6.4 倍和 56.8 倍。该方法的可扩展性允许对具有挑战性的铬二聚体 (Cr2) 分子进行初步基态能量估计。通过 CAFQA 的高精度初始化，即使对于小分子，VQA 的收敛速度也加快了 2.5 倍。

此外，在 CAFQA 框架中允许有限数量的非 Clifford (T) 门的初步探索表明，在仅 Clifford CAFQA 精度相对有限的键长处，可以恢复高达 99.9% 的相关能量，同时保持经典可模拟性。

items.title: Cooperative Concurrency Control for Write-Intensive Key-Value Workloads.
items.abstract: Key-Value Stores (KVS) are foundational infrastructure components for online services. Due to their latency-critical nature, today’s best-performing KVS contain a plethora of full-stack optimizations commonly targeting read-mostly, popularity-skewed workloads. Motivated by production studies showing the increased prevalence of write-intensive workloads, we break down the KVS workload space into four distinct classes, and argue that current designs are only sufficient for two of them. The reason is that KVS concurrency control protocols expose a fundamental tradeoff: avoiding synchronization by partitioning writes across threads is mandatory for high throughput, but necessarily creates load imbalance that grows with core count and write fraction. We break this tradeoff with C-4, a co-design between NIC hardware and KVS software that judiciously separates write requests into two classes: independent ones that can be balanced across threads, and dependent ones which must be queued. C-4 dynamically partitions independent writes with the NIC to increase the load balancing flexibility of current KVS designs, and adds a software layer to the KVS to compact dependent writes into batches. Our evaluation shows that for write-intensive workloads, C-4 reduces 99th% tail latency by 1.3−5× and improves throughput by up to 1.7×.
items.abstract_zh: 键值存储 (KVS) 是在线服务的基础设施组件。由于其延迟关键特性，当今性能最佳的 KVS 包含大量全栈优化，通常针对以读取为主、流行程度偏高的工作负载。受生产研究显示写入密集型工作负载日益普遍的推动，我们将 KVS 工作负载空间分为四个不同的类别，并认为当前的设计仅足以满足其中的两个类别。原因是 KVS 并发控制协议暴露了一个基本的权衡：通过跨线程分区写入来避免同步对于高吞吐量是必需的，但必然会造成负载不平衡，负载不平衡会随着核心数量和写入分数的增加而增加。我们通过 C-4 打破了这种权衡，C-4 是 NIC 硬件和 KVS 软件之间的联合设计，它明智地将写入请求分为两类：可以跨线程平衡的独立请求，以及必须排队的依赖请求。 C-4 使用 NIC 动态分区独立写入，以提高当前 KVS 设计的负载平衡灵活性，并向 KVS 添加软件层，以将相关写入压缩为批次。我们的评估表明，对于写入密集型工作负载，C-4 将 99% 的尾部延迟降低了 1.3−5 倍，并将吞吐量提高了 1.7 倍。

items.title: Overlap Communication with Dependent Computation via Decomposition in Large Deep Learning Models.
items.abstract:
Large deep learning models have shown great potential with state-of-the-art results in many tasks. However, running these large models is quite challenging on an accelerator (GPU or TPU) because the on-device memory is too limited for the size of these models. Intra-layer model parallelism is an approach to address the issues by partitioning individual layers or operators across multiple devices in a distributed accelerator cluster. But, the data communications generated by intra-layer model parallelism can contribute to a significant proportion of the overall execution time and severely hurt the computational efficiency.

As intra-layer model parallelism is critical to enable large deep learning models, this paper proposes a novel technique to effectively reduce its data communication overheads by overlapping communication with computation. With the proposed technique, an identified original communication collective is decomposed along with the dependent computation operation into a sequence of finer-grained operations. By creating more overlapping opportunities and executing the newly created, finer-grained communication and computation operations in parallel, it effectively hides the data transfer latency and achieves a better system utilization. Evaluated on TPU v4 Pods using different types of large models that have 10 billion to 1 trillion parameters, the proposed technique improves system throughput by 1.14 - 1.38x. The achieved highest peak FLOPS utilization is 72% on 1024 TPU chips with a large language model that has 500 billion parameters.
items.abstract_zh:
大型深度学习模型已显示出巨大的潜力，在许多任务中都取得了最先进的结果。然而，在加速器（GPU 或 TPU）上运行这些大型模型相当具有挑战性，因为设备上的内存对于这些模型的大小来说太有限了。层内模型并行性是一种通过在分布式加速器集群中的多个设备上划分各个层或运算符来解决问题的方法。但是，层内模型并行生成的数据通信可能会占整个执行时间的很大一部分，并严重损害计算效率。

由于层内模型并行性对于实现大型深度学习模型至关重要，因此本文提出了一种新技术，通过重叠通信与计算来有效减少数据通信开销。利用所提出的技术，所识别的原始通信集合连同相关计算操作被分解为一系列更细粒度的操作。通过创造更多的重叠机会并并行执行新创建的、更细粒度的通信和计算操作，它有效地隐藏了数据传输延迟并实现了更好的系统利用率。使用具有 100 亿到 1 万亿个参数的不同类型的大型模型在 TPU v4 Pod 上进行评估，所提出的技术将系统吞吐量提高了 1.14 - 1.38 倍。在具有 5000 亿个参数的大型语言模型的 1024 个 TPU 芯片上，所实现的最高峰值 FLOPS 利用率为 72%。

items.title: Glign: Taming Misaligned Graph Traversals in Concurrent Graph Processing.
items.abstract:
In concurrent graph processing, different queries are evaluated on the same graph simultaneously, sharing the graph accesses via the memory hierarchy. However, different queries may traverse the graph differently, especially for those starting from different source vertices. When these graph traversals are ”misaligned”, the benefits of graph access sharing can be seriously compromised. As more concurrent queries are added to the evaluation batch, the issue tends to become even worse.

To address the above issue, this work introduces Glign, a runtime system that automatically aligns the graph traversals for concurrent queries. Glign introduces three levels of graph traversal alignment for iterative evaluation of concurrent queries. First, it synchronizes the accesses of different queries to the active parts of the graph within each iteration of the evaluation— intra-iteration alignment . On top of that, Glign leverages a key insight regarding the “heavy iterations” in query evaluation to achieve inter-iteration alignment and alignment-aware batching . The former aligns the iterations of different queries to increase the graph access sharing, while the latter tries to group queries of better graph access sharing into the same evaluation batch. Together, these alignment techniques can substantially boost the data locality of concurrent query evaluation. Based on our experiments, Glign outperforms the state-of-the-art concurrent graph processing systems Krill and GraphM by 3.6× and 4.7× on average, respectively.
items.abstract_zh:
在并发图处理中，同时在同一个图上评估不同的查询，通过内存层次结构共享图访问。然而，不同的查询可能会以不同的方式遍历图，特别是对于从不同源顶点开始的查询。当这些图遍历“错位”时，图访问共享的好处可能会受到严重损害。随着更多并发查询添加到评估批次中，问题往往会变得更加严重。

为了解决上述问题，这项工作引入了 Glign，一个运行时系统，可以自动对齐并发查询的图遍历。 Glign 引入了三个级别的图遍历对齐，用于并发查询的迭代评估。首先，它在评估的每次迭代中同步不同查询对图的活动部分的访问——迭代内对齐。最重要的是，Glign 利用有关查询评估中“大量迭代”的关键见解来实现迭代间对齐和对齐感知批处理。前者对齐不同查询的迭代以增加图访问共享，而后者尝试将更好的图访问共享的查询分组到同一评估批次中。这些对齐技术一起可以显着提高并发查询评估的数据局部性。根据我们的实验，Glign 的性能平均分别优于最先进的并发图处理系统 Krill 和 GraphM 3.6 倍和 4.7 倍。

items.title: AQUATOPE: QoS-and-Uncertainty-Aware Resource Management for Multi-stage Serverless Workflows.
items.abstract:
Multi-stage serverless applications, i.e., workflows with many computation and I/O stages, are becoming increasingly representative of FaaS platforms. Despite their advantages in terms of fine-grained scalability and modular development, these applications are subject to suboptimal performance, resource inefficiency, and high costs to a larger degree than previous simple serverless functions.

We present Aquatope, a QoS-and-uncertainty-aware resource scheduler for end-to-end serverless workflows that takes into account the inherent uncertainty present in FaaS platforms, and improves performance predictability and resource efficiency. Aquatope uses a set of scalable and validated Bayesian models to create pre-warmed containers ahead of function invocations, and to allocate appropriate resources at function granularity to meet a complex workflow's end-to-end QoS, while minimizing resource cost. Across a diverse set of analytics and interactive multi-stage serverless workloads, Aquatope significantly outperforms prior systems, reducing QoS violations by 5X, and cost by 34% on average and up to 52% compared to other QoS-meeting methods.
items.abstract_zh:
多阶段无服务器应用程序，即具有许多计算和 I/O 阶段的工作流程，越来越成为 FaaS 平台的代表。尽管这些应用程序在细粒度可扩展性和模块化开发方面具有优势，但与以前的简单无服务器功能相比，这些应用程序在更大程度上受到性能次优、资源效率低下和高成本的影响。

我们推出了 Aquatope，一种用于端到端无服务器工作流程的 QoS 和不确定性感知资源调度程序，它考虑了 FaaS 平台中存在的固有不确定性，并提高了性能可预测性和资源效率。 Aquatope 使用一组可扩展且经过验证的贝叶斯模型在函数调用之前创建预热容器，并在函数粒度上分配适当的资源以满足复杂工作流的端到端 QoS，同时最大限度地降低资源成本。在各种分析和交互式多阶段无服务器工作负载中，Aquatope 的性能显着优于以前的系统，将 QoS 违规减少了 5 倍，与其他 QoS 会议方法相比，成本平均降低了 34%，最高可达 52%。

items.title: Re-architecting I/O Caches for Emerging Fast Storage Devices.
items.abstract:
I/O caching has widely been used in enterprise storage systems to enhance the system performance with minimal cost. Using Solid-State Drives (SSDs) as an I/O caching layer on the top of arrays of Hard Disk Drives (HDDs) has been well studied in numerous studies. With emergence of ultra fast storage devices, recent studies suggest to use them as an I/O cache layer on top of mainstream SSDs in I/O intensive applications. Our detailed analysis shows despite significant potential of ultra-fast storage devices, existing I/O cache architectures may act as a major performance bottleneck in enterprise storage systems, which prevents to take advantage of the device full performance potentials.

In this paper, using an enterprise-grade all-flash storage system, we first present a thorough analysis on the performance of I/O cache modules when ultra-fast memories are used as a caching layer on top of mainstream SSDs. Unlike traditional SSD-based caching on HDD arrays, we show the use of ultra-fast memory as an I/O cache device on SSD arrays exhibit completely unexpected performance behavior. As an example, we show two popular cache architectures exhibit similar throughput due to performance bottleneck on the traditional SSD/HDD devices, but with ultra-fast memory on SSD arrays, their true potential is released and show 5× performance difference. We then propose an experimental evaluation framework to systematically examine the behavior of I/O cache modules on emerging ultra-fast devices. Our framework enables system architects to examine performance-critical design choices including multi-threading, locking granularity, promotion logic, cache line size, and flushing policy. We further offer several optimizations using the proposed framework, integrate the proposed optimizations, and evaluate them on real use-cases. The experiments on an industry-grade storage system show our I/O cache architecture optimally configured by the proposed framework provides up to 11× higher throughput and up to 30× improved tail latency over a non-optimal architecture.
items.abstract_zh:
I/O缓存已广泛应用于企业存储系统中，以最小的成本提升系统性能。使用固态驱动器 (SSD) 作为硬盘驱动器 (HDD) 阵列顶部的 I/O 缓存层已在众多研究中得到深入研究。随着超高速存储设备的出现，最近的研究建议在 I/O 密集型应用中将它们用作主流 SSD 之上的 I/O 缓存层。我们的详细分析表明，尽管超高速存储设备具有巨大的潜力，但现有的 I/O 缓存架构可能会成为企业存储系统的主要性能瓶颈，从而阻碍设备充分发挥性能潜力。

在本文中，我们首先使用企业级全闪存存储系统，对超快内存用作主流SSD之上的缓存层时I/O缓存模块的性能进行了全面分析。与 HDD 阵列上传统的基于 SSD 的缓存不同，我们展示了使用超高速内存作为 SSD 阵列上的 I/O 缓存设备表现出完全意想不到的性能行为。作为一个例子，我们展示了两种流行的缓存架构由于传统 SSD/HDD 设备上的性能瓶颈而表现出相似的吞吐量，但通过 SSD 阵列上的超高速内存，它们的真正潜力被释放并显示出 5 倍的性能差异。然后，我们提出了一个实验评估框架来系统地检查 I/O 缓存模块在新兴超高速设备上的行为。我们的框架使系统架构师能够检查性能关键的设计选择，包括多线程、锁定粒度、升级逻辑、缓存行大小和刷新策略。我们进一步使用所提出的框架提供了几种优化，集成了所提出的优化，并在实际用例中对其进行了评估。在工业级存储系统上的实验表明，我们的 I/O 缓存架构通过所提出的框架进行了优化配置，与非优化架构相比，吞吐量提高了 11 倍，尾部延迟提高了 30 倍。

items.title: Direct Mind-Machine Teaming (Keynote).
items.abstract:
Direct mind-machine teaming will help us treat brain disorders, augment the healthy brain, and shed light on how the brain as an organ gives rise to the mind. Delivering on this promise requires the design of computer systems that delicately balance the tight power, latency, and bandwidth trade-offs needed to decode brain activity, stimulate biological neurons, and control assistive devices most effectively.

This talk presents my group’s design of a standardized and general computer architecture for future brain interfacing. Our design enables the treatment of several neurological disorders (most notably, epilepsy and movement disorders) and lays the groundwork for brain interfacing techniques that can help augment cognitive control and decision-making in the healthy brain. Central to our design is end-to-end hardware acceleration, from the microarchitectural to the distributed system level. Key insights are undergirded via detailed physical synthesis models and chip tape-outs in a 12nm CMOS process.
items.abstract_zh:
直接的思维机器组合将帮助我们治疗大脑疾病，增强健康的大脑，并揭示大脑作为一个器官如何产生思维。实现这一承诺需要计算机系统的设计，以微妙地平衡解码大脑活动、刺激生物神经元和最有效地控制辅助设备所需的严格功率、延迟和带宽权衡。

这次演讲介绍了我的团队为未来大脑接口设计的标准化通用计算机架构。我们的设计能够治疗多种神经系统疾病（最明显的是癫痫和运动障碍），并为大脑接口技术奠定了基础，有助于增强健康大脑的认知控制和决策。我们设计的核心是从微架构到分布式系统级别的端到端硬件加速。通过详细的物理合成模型和 12 纳米 CMOS 工艺中的芯片流片，巩固了关键见解。

items.title: Heron: Automatically Constrained High-Performance Library Generation for Deep Learning Accelerators.
items.abstract:
Deep Learning Accelerators (DLAs) are effective to improve both performance and energy efficiency of compute-intensive deep learning algorithms. A flexible and portable mean to exploit DLAs is using high-performance software libraries with well-established APIs, which are typically either manually implemented or automatically generated by exploration-based compilation approaches. Though exploration-based approaches significantly reduce programming efforts, they fail to find optimal or near-optimal programs from a large but low-quality search space because the massive inherent constraints of DLAs cannot be accurately characterized.

In this paper, we propose Heron, a novel exploration-based approach, to efficiently generate high-performance libraries of DLAs. The key is to automatically (rather than manually) enforce massive sophisticated while accurate constraints through the entire program generation including constrained space generation and constrained space exploration. By conducting static analysis on compute, sophisticated constraints are automatically generated to properly characterize inherent constraints of DLAs, and thus greatly prune invalid program candidates to produce a high-quality constrained search space. To efficiently explore the resultant search space, we further propose a novel constraint-based genetic algorithm, which features that the evolutionary process is conducted on formulated constraint satisfactory problems instead of concrete solutions. Thus, the sophisticated constraints of the search space are strictly preserved during the entire exploration process. We conduct extensive experiments on 3 representative DLAs, i.e., NVIDIA TensorCore, Intel DL Boost Acceleration, and TVM Versatile Tensor Accelerator. Experimental results demonstrate that Heron averagely achieves 2.71x speedup over four state-of-the-art automatic generation approaches. Also, compared to vendor-provided hand-tuned libraries, Heron achieves 2.00x speedup on average.
items.abstract_zh:
深度学习加速器 (DLA) 可有效提高计算密集型深度学习算法的性能和能源效率。利用 DLA 的一种灵活且可移植的方法是使用具有完善 API 的高性能软件库，这些 API 通常是手动实现或通过基于探索的编译方法自动生成。尽管基于探索的方法显着减少了编程工作，但它们无法从大但质量低的搜索空间中找到最优或接近最优的程序，因为 DLA 的大量固有约束无法准确表征。

在本文中，我们提出了 Heron，一种基于探索的新颖方法，可以有效生成高性能的 DLA 库。关键是在整个程序生成过程中自动（而不是手动）强制执行大量复杂而准确的约束，包括约束空间生成和约束空间探索。通过对计算进行静态分析，自动生成复杂的约束，以正确表征 DLA 的固有约束，从而极大地修剪无效的候选程序，以产生高质量的约束搜索空间。为了有效地探索结果搜索空间，我们进一步提出了一种新颖的基于约束的遗传算法，其特征是进化过程是在公式化的约束满足问题而不是具体的解决方案上进行的。因此，在整个探索过程中，严格保留搜索空间的复杂约束。我们对 3 个具有代表性的 DLA（NVIDIA TensorCore、Intel DL Boost Acceleration 和 TVM Versatile Tensor Accelerator）进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，Heron 比四种最先进的自动生成方法平均实现了 2.71 倍的加速。此外，与供应商提供的手动调整库相比，Heron 平均实现了 2.00 倍的加速。

items.title: Language Models: The Most Important Compute Challenge of Our Time (Keynote).
items.abstract: ChatGPT recently became one of the fastest growing new applications in history, thanks to its intriguing text generation capabilities that are able to answer questions, write poetry, and even problem solve. Large Language Models are now being integrated in fundamental ways into products around the tech industry. The possibilities are extraordinary, but much research remains to make these systems reliable and trustworthy, as well as integrate them into applications seamlessly. Additionally, the computational challenges behind large language modeling are also quite important. Systems for training and deploying these models must be highly scalable and run at extreme efficiency, because the amount of work necessary to converge a model can be extraordinarily large. The cost of deploying these models is a barrier to their deployment and must be lowered significantly.
