In this talk, I’ll discuss the work we have been doing at NVIDIA to optimize systems for Large Language Model training and inference, and highlight some of the challenges that remain for future work.
items.abstract_zh: ChatGPT 最近成为历史上增长最快的新应用程序之一，这要归功于其有趣的文本生成功能，能够回答问题、写诗，甚至解决问题。大型语言模型现在正在以基本方式集成到科技行业的产品中。可能性是巨大的，但仍需要进行大量研究来使这些系统可靠且值得信赖，并将它们无缝集成到应用程序中。此外，大型语言建模背后的计算挑战也非常重要。用于训练和部署这些模型的系统必须具有高度可扩展性并以极高的效率运行，因为收敛模型所需的工作量可能非常大。部署这些模型的成本是其部署的障碍，必须大幅降低。在本次演讲中，我将讨论 NVIDIA 为优化大型语言模型训练和推理系统所做的工作，并重点介绍未来工作中仍面临的一些挑战。

items.title: Transparent Runtime Change Handling for Android Apps.
items.abstract: Mobile devices often face runtime configuration changes, such as screen orientation changes, screen resizing, and language switching. The current Android design adopts a restarting-based solution to load the corresponding resources according to the new configuration. Therefore, application developers must explicitly deal with state preservation and restoration brought about by the activity restarting. Otherwise, the runtime change will cause state loss and even app crash issues. To solve the runtime change handling issues, we propose RCHDroid, a transparent runtime change handling approach for apps at the Android system level. When a configuration change occurs, we do not restart the activity, but instead, create a new activity according to the new configuration and migrate states from the old one to the new one, while putting the old activity into an inactive mode. We propose a lazy-migration scheme to handle asynchronous tasks that remain working on the old activity, which migrates the result events when the asynchronous tasks return. We have implemented a prototype of RCHDroid with real hardware and released the source code for public access. Overall, using RCHDroid, existing apps can handle runtime configuration changes without any modifications and save the runtime change handling time by 25.46%.
items.abstract_zh: 移动设备经常面临运行时配置更改，例如屏幕方向更改、屏幕大小调整和语言切换。目前的Android设计采用的是基于重启的方案，根据新的配置来加载相应的资源。因此，应用程序开发人员必须显式处理Activity重启带来的状态保存和恢复。否则，运行时更改将导致状态丢失甚至应用程序崩溃问题。为了解决运行时更改处理问题，我们提出了 RCHDroid，这是一种适用于 Android 系统级别应用程序的透明运行时更改处理方法。当配置发生更改时，我们不会重新启动 Activity，而是根据新配置创建一个新 Activity，并将状态从旧 Activity 迁移到新 Activity，同时将旧 Activity 置于非活动模式。我们提出了一种惰性迁移方案来处理仍在旧活动上工作的异步任务，该方案在异步任务返回时迁移结果事件。我们已经用真实的硬件实现了 RCHDroid 的原型，并发布了源代码供公众访问。总体而言，使用 RCHDroid，现有应用程序无需任何修改即可处理运行时配置更改，并将运行时更改处理时间节省 25.46%。

items.title: Beyond Static Parallel Loops: Supporting Dynamic Task Parallelism on Manycore Architectures with Software-Managed Scratchpad Memories.
Kodan: Addressing the Computational Bottleneck in Space.
items.abstract: Decreasing costs of deploying space vehicles to low-Earth orbit have fostered an emergence of large constellations of satellites. However, high satellite velocities, large image data quantities, and brief ground station contacts create a data downlink challenge. Orbital edge computing (OEC), which filters data at the space edge, addresses this downlink bottleneck but shifts the challenge to the inelastic computational capabilities onboard satellites. In this work, we present Kodan: an OEC system that maximizes the utility of saturated satellite downlinks while mitigating the computational bottleneck. Kodan consists of two phases. A one-time transformation step uses a reference implementation of a satellite data analysis application, along with a representative dataset, to produce specialized ML models targeted for deployment to the space edge. After deployment to a target satellite, a runtime system dynamically selects the best specialized models for each data sample to maximize valuable data downlinked within the constraints of the computational bottleneck. By intelligently filtering low-value data and prioritizing high-value data for transmit via the saturated downlink, Kodan increases the data value density between 89 and 97 percent.
items.abstract_zh: 将航天器部署到近地轨道的成本不断下降，促进了大型卫星群的出现。然而，卫星速度高、图像数据量大以及地面站接触时间短，给数据下行链路带来了挑战。轨道边缘计算（OEC）在空间边缘过滤数据，解决了这一下行链路瓶颈，但将挑战转移到了卫星上缺乏弹性的计算能力。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Kodan：一种 OEC 系统，可以最大限度地提高饱和卫星下行链路的利用率，同时缓解计算瓶颈。 Kodan 由两个阶段组成。一次性转换步骤使用卫星数据分析应用程序的参考实现以及代表性数据集来生成专门用于部署到空间边缘的 ML 模型。部署到目标卫星后，运行时系统会为每个数据样本动态选择最佳的专用模型，以在计算瓶颈的限制内最大化下行传输的有价值的数据。通过智能过滤低价值数据并优先通过饱和下行链路传输高价值数据，Kodan 将数据价值密度提高了 89% 至 97%。

items.title: Towards an Adaptable Systems Architecture for Memory Tiering at Warehouse-Scale.
items.abstract:
Fast DRAM increasingly dominates infrastructure spend in large scale computing environments and this trend will likely worsen without an architectural shift. The cost of deployed memory can be reduced by replacing part of the conventional DRAM with lower cost albeit slower memory media, thus creating a tiered memory system where both tiers are directly addressable and cached. But, this poses numerous challenges in a highly multi-tenant warehouse-scale computing setting. The diversity and scale of its applications motivates an application-transparent solution in the general case, adaptable to specific workload demands.

This paper presents TMTS(Transparent Memory Tiering System), an application-transparent memory tiering management system that implements an adaptive, hardware-guided architecture to dynamically optimize access to the various directly-addressed memory tiers without faults. TMTS has been deployed at scale for two years serving thousands of production services, successfully meeting service level objectives (SLOs) across diverse application classes in the fleet. The solution is developed in terms of system level metrics it seeks to optimize and evaluated across the diverse workload mix to guide advanced policies embodied in a user-level agent. It sustains less than 5% overall performance degradation while replacing 25% of DRAM with a much slower medium.
items.abstract_zh:
快速 DRAM 日益主导大规模计算环境中的基础设施支出，如果不进行架构转变，这种趋势可能会恶化。通过用成本较低但速度较慢的存储介质替换部分传统 DRAM，可以降低部署内存的成本，从而创建一个分层存储系统，其中两层都可直接寻址和缓存。但是，这在高度多租户的仓库规模计算环境中提出了许多挑战。其应用程序的多样性和规模激发了一般情况下应用程序透明的解决方案，可适应特定的工作负载需求。

本文提出了 TMTS（透明内存分层系统），这是一种应用程序透明的内存分层管理系统，它实现了自适应的硬件引导架构，可以无故障地动态优化对各种直接寻址内存层的访问。 TMTS 已经大规模部署了两年，为数千个生产服务提供服务，成功满足了车队中不同应用程序类别的服务水平目标 (SLO)。该解决方案是根据系统级指标开发的，旨在跨不同的工作负载组合进行优化和评估，以指导用户级代理中体现的高级策略。当用速度慢得多的介质取代 25% 的 DRAM 时，它的整体性能下降幅度不到 5%。

items.title: Verification of Nondeterministic Quantum Programs.
items.abstract: Nondeterministic choice is a useful program construct that provides a way to describe the behaviour of a program without specifying the details of possible implementations. It supports the stepwise refinement of programs, a method that has proven useful in software development. Nondeterminism has also been introduced in quantum programming, and termination of nondeterministic quantum programs has been extensively analysed. In this paper, we go beyond termination analysis to investigate the verification of nondeterministic quantum programs where properties are given by sets of hermitian operators on the associated Hilbert space. Hoare-type logic systems for partial and total correctness are proposed which turn out to be both sound and relatively complete with respect to their corresponding semantic correctness. To show the utility of these proof systems, we analyse some quantum algorithms such as quantum error correction scheme, Deutsch algorithm, and a nondeterministic quantum walk. Finally, a proof assistant prototype is implemented to aid in the automated reasoning of nondeterministic quantum programs.
items.abstract_zh: 非确定性选择是一种有用的程序构造，它提供了一种描述程序行为的方法，而无需指定可能实现的细节。它支持程序的逐步细化，这种方法已被证明在软件开发中很有用。量子编程中也引入了非确定性，并且对非确定性量子程序的终止进行了广泛的分析。在本文中，我们超越终止分析来研究非确定性量子程序的验证，其中属性由相关希尔伯特空间上的厄米算子集给出。提出了用于部分正确性和完全正确性的霍尔型逻辑系统，事实证明，就其相应的语义正确性而言，该系统既健全又相对完整。为了展示这些证明系统的实用性，我们分析了一些量子算法，例如量子纠错方案、Deutsch 算法和非确定性量子行走。最后，实现了一个证明辅助原型，以帮助非确定性量子程序的自动推理。

items.title: CaT: A Solver-Aided Compiler for Packet-Processing Pipelines.
items.abstract: Compiling high-level programs to high-speed packet-processing pipelines is a challenging combinatorial optimization problem. The compiler must configure the pipeline’s resources to match the semantics of the program’s high-level specification, while packing all of the program’s computation into the pipeline’s limited resources. State of the art approaches tackle individual aspects of this problem. Yet, they miss opportunities to produce globally high-quality outcomes within reasonable compilation times. We develop a framework to decompose the compilation problem for such pipelines into three phases—making extensive use of solver engines (e.g., ILP, SMT, and program synthesis) to simplify the development of these phases. Transformation rewrites programs to use more abundant pipeline resources, avoiding scarce ones. Synthesis breaks complex transactional code into configurations of pipelined compute units. Allocation maps the program’s compute and memory to the pipeline’s hardware resources. We prototype these ideas in a compiler, CaT, which targets (1) the Tofino programmable switch pipeline and (2) Menshen, a cycle-accurate simulator of a Verilog description of the RMT pipeline. CaT can handle programs that existing compilers cannot currently run on pipelines and generates code faster than existing compilers, where the generated code uses fewer pipeline resources.
items.abstract_zh: 将高级程序编译为高速数据包处理管道是一个具有挑战性的组合优化问题。编译器必须配置管道的资源以匹配程序高级规范的语义，同时将程序的所有计算打包到管道的有限资源中。最先进的方法解决了这个问题的各个方面。然而，他们错过了在合理的编译时间内产生全球高质量成果的机会。我们开发了一个框架，将此类管道的编译问题分解为三个阶段——广泛使用求解器引擎（例如 ILP、SMT 和程序综合）来简化这些阶段的开发。转型重写程序以使用更丰富的管道资源，避免稀缺的管道资源。综合将复杂的事务代码分解为流水线计算单元的配置。分配将程序的计算和内存映射到管道的硬件资源。我们在编译器 Cat 中对这些想法进行了原型设计，该编译器的目标是 (1) Tofino 可编程开关管道和 (2) Menshen，RMT 管道的 Verilog 描述的周期精确模拟器。 Cat 可以处理现有编译器当前无法在管道上运行的程序，并且生成代码的速度比现有编译器更快，生成的代码使用更少的管道资源。

items.title: Characterizing and Optimizing End-to-End Systems for Private Inference.
items.abstract:
In two-party machine learning prediction services, the client’s goal is to query a remote server’s trained machine learning model to perform neural network inference in some application domain. However, sensitive information can be obtained during this process by either the client or the server, leading to potential collection, unauthorized secondary use, and inappropriate access to personal information. These security concerns have given rise to Private Inference (PI), in which both the client’s personal data and the server’s trained model are kept confidential. State-of-the-art PI protocols consist of a pre-processing or offline phase and an online phase that combine several cryptographic primitives: Homomorphic Encryption (HE), Secret Sharing (SS), Garbled Circuits (GC), and Oblivious Transfer (OT). Despite the need and recent performance improvements, PI remains largely arcane today and is too slow for practical use.

This paper addresses PI’s shortcomings with a detailed characterization of a standard high-performance protocol to build foundational knowledge and intuition in the systems community. Our characterization pinpoints all sources of inefficiency – compute, communication, and storage. In contrast to prior work, we consider inference request arrival rates rather than studying individual inferences in isolation and we find that the pre-processing phase cannot be ignored and is often incurred online as there is insufficient downtime to hide pre-compute latency. Finally, we leverage insights from our characterization and propose three optimizations to address the storage (Client-Garbler), computation (layer-parallel HE), and communication (wireless slot allocation) overheads. Compared to the state-of-the-art PI protocol, these optimizations provide a total PI speedup of 1.8 × with the ability to sustain inference requests up to a 2.24 × greater rate. Looking ahead, we conclude our paper with an analysis of future research innovations and their effects and improvements on PI latency.
items.abstract_zh:
在两方机器学习预测服务中，客户端的目标是查询远程服务器经过训练的机器学习模型，以在某些应用领域执行神经网络推理。然而，在此过程中，客户端或服务器都可能获取敏感信息，从而导致潜在的收集、未经授权的二次使用以及对个人信息的不当访问。这些安全问题引发了私人推理（PI），其中客户端的个人数据和服务器的训练模型都是保密的。最先进的 PI 协议由预处理或离线阶段和在线阶段组成，结合了多种加密原语：同态加密 (HE)、秘密共享 (SS)、乱码电路 (GC) 和不经意传输 (OT)。尽管存在需求并且最近性能有所改进，但 PI 目前仍然很神秘，而且对于实际使用来说速度太慢。

本文通过详细描述标准高性能协议来解决 PI 的缺点，以在系统社区中构建基础知识和直觉。我们的特征查明了效率低下的所有根源——计算、通信和存储。与之前的工作相比，我们考虑推理请求到达率，而不是孤立地研究单个推理，我们发现预处理阶段不能被忽视，并且通常在线发生，因为没有足够的停机时间来隐藏预计算延迟。最后，我们利用我们的表征中的见解并提出三种优化来解决存储（客户端乱码）、计算（层并行 HE）和通信（无线时隙分配）开销。与最先进的 PI 协议相比，这些优化提供了 1.8 倍的总 PI 加速，并且能够维持高达 2.24 倍速率的推理请求。展望未来，我们在论文的结尾分析了未来的研究创新及其对 PI 延迟的影响和改进。

items.title: Mosaic Pages: Big TLB Reach with Small Pages.
items.abstract: The TLB is increasingly a bottleneck for big data applications. In most designs, the number of TLB entries are highly constrained by latency requirements, and growing much more slowly than the working sets of applications. Many solutions to this problem, such as huge pages, perforated pages, or TLB coalescing, rely on physical contiguity for performance gains, yet the cost of defragmenting memory can easily nullify these gains. This paper introduces mosaic pages, which increase TLB reach by compressing multiple, discrete translations into one TLB entry. Mosaic leverages virtual contiguity for locality, but does not use physical contiguity. Mosaic relies on recent advances in hashing theory to constrain memory mappings, in order to realize this physical address compression without reducing memory utilization or increasing swapping. This paper presents a full-system prototype of Mosaic, in gem5 and modified Linux. In simulation and with comparable hardware to a traditional design, mosaic reduces TLB misses in several workloads by 6-81%. Our results show that Mosaic’s constraints on memory mappings do not harm performance, we never see conflicts before memory is 98% full in our experiments — at which point, a traditional design would also likely swap. Once memory is over-committed, Mosaic swaps fewer pages than Linux in most cases. Finally, we present timing and area analysis for a verilog implementation of the hashing function required on the critical path for the TLB, and show that on a commercial 28nm CMOS process; the circuit runs at a maximum frequency of 4 GHz, indicating that a mosaic TLB is unlikely to affect clock frequency.
items.abstract_zh: TLB 日益成为大数据应用的瓶颈。在大多数设计中，TLB 条目的数量受到延迟要求的高度限制，并且增长速度比应用程序的工作集慢得多。此问题的许多解决方案（例如大页、穿孔页或 TLB 合并）都依赖于物理连续性来提高性能，但内存碎片整理的成本很容易抵消这些收益。本文介绍了马赛克页面，它通过将多个离散翻译压缩为一个 TLB 条目来增加 TLB 的覆盖范围。 Mosaic 利用虚拟连续性来实现局部性，但不使用物理连续性。 Mosaic依靠散列理论的最新进展来约束内存映射，以便在不减少内存利用率或增加交换的情况下实现这种物理地址压缩。本文介绍了在 gem5 和修改版 Linux 中的 Mosaic 的完整系统原型。在仿真中，使用与传统设计相当的硬件，马赛克将多个工作负载中的 TLB 缺失减少了 6-81%。我们的结果表明，Mosaic 对内存映射的限制不会损害性能，在我们的实验中，在内存达到 98% 之前，我们从未看到过冲突 - 此时，传统设计也可能会进行交换。一旦内存被过度使用，Mosaic 在大多数情况下交换的页面比 Linux 少。最后，我们对 TLB 关键路径上所需的哈希函数的 verilog 实现进行了时序和面积分析，并表明在商用 28nm CMOS 工艺上；该电路的最大运行频率为 4 GHz，这表明马赛克 TLB 不太可能影响时钟频率。

items.title: Graphene: An IR for Optimized Tensor Computations on GPUs.
items.abstract:
Modern GPUs accelerate computations and data movements of multi-dimensional tensors in hardware. However, expressing optimized tensor computations in software is extremely challenging even for experts. Languages like CUDA C++ are centered around flat buffers in one-dimensional memory and lack reasonable abstractions for multi-dimensional data and threads. Existing tensor IRs are not expressive enough to represent the complex data-to-thread mappings required by the GPU tensor instructions.

In this paper, we introduce Graphene, an intermediate representation (IR) for optimized tensor computations on GPUs. Graphene is a low-level target language for tensor compilers and performance experts while being closer to the domain of tensor computations than languages offering the same level of control such as CUDA C++ and PTX. In Graphene, multi-dimensional data and threads are represented as first-class tensors. Graphene’s tensors are hierarchically decomposable into tiles allowing to represent optimized tensor computations as mappings between data and thread tiles.

We evaluate Graphene using some of the most important tensor computations in deep learning today, including GEMM, Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP), Layernorm, LSTM, and Fused Multi-Head Attention (FMHA). We show that Graphene is capable of expressing all optimizations required to achieve the same practical peak performance as existing library implementations. Fused kernels beyond library routines expressed in Graphene significantly improve the end-to-end inference performance of Transformer networks and match or outperform the performance of cuBLAS(Lt), cuDNN, and custom handwritten kernels.
items.abstract_zh:
现代 GPU 可加速硬件中多维张量的计算和数据移动。然而，即使对于专家来说，在软件中表达优化的张量计算也极具挑战性。像 CUDA C++ 这样的语言以一维内存中的平面缓冲区为中心，缺乏对多维数据和线程的合理抽象。现有的张量 IR 的表达能力不足以表示 GPU 张量指令所需的复杂数据到线程映射。

在本文中，我们介绍了石墨烯，一种用于在 GPU 上优化张量计算的中间表示 (IR)。石墨烯是一种面向张量编译器和性能专家的低级目标语言，同时比提供相同控制级别的语言（例如 CUDA C++ 和 PTX）更接近张量计算领域。在石墨烯中，多维数据和线程被表示为一流的张量。石墨烯的张量可以分层分解为图块，允许将优化的张量计算表示为数据和线程图块之间的映射。

我们使用当今深度学习中一些最重要的张量计算来评估石墨烯，包括 GEMM、多层感知器 (MLP)、Layernorm、LSTM 和融合多头注意力 (FMHA)。我们证明石墨烯能够表达实现与现有库实现相同的实际峰值性能所需的所有优化。超出以石墨烯表示的库例程的融合内核显着提高了 Transformer 网络的端到端推理性能，并匹配或优于 cuBLAS(Lt)、cuDNN 和自定义手写内核的性能。

items.title: DefT: Boosting Scalability of Deformable Convolution Operations on GPUs.
items.abstract: Deformable Convolutional Networks (DCN) have been proposed as a powerful tool to boost the representation power of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) in computer vision tasks via adaptive sampling of the input feature map. Much like vision transformers, DCNs utilize a more flexible inductive bias than standard CNNs and have also been shown to improve performance of particular models. For example, drop-in DCN layers were shown to increase the AP score of Mask RCNN by 10.6 points while introducing only 1% additional parameters and FLOPs, improving the state-of-the-art model at the time of publication. However, despite evidence that more DCN layers placed earlier in the network can further improve performance, we have not seen this trend continue with further scaling of deformations in CNNs, unlike for vision transformers. Benchmarking experiments show that a realistically sized DCN layer (64H×64W, 64 in-out channel) incurs a 4× slowdown on a GPU platform, discouraging the more ubiquitous use of deformations in CNNs. These slowdowns are caused by the irregular input-dependent access patterns of the bilinear interpolation operator, which has a disproportionately low arithmetic intensity (AI) compared to the rest of the DCN. To address the disproportionate slowdown of DCNs and enable their expanded use in CNNs, we propose DefT, a series of workload-aware optimizations for DCN kernels. DefT identifies performance bottlenecks in DCNs and fuses specific operators that are observed to limit DCN AI. Our approach also uses statistical information of DCN workloads to adapt the workload tiling to the DCN layer dimensions, minimizing costly out-of-boundary input accesses. Experimental results show that DefT mitigates up to half of DCN slowdown over the current-art PyTorch implementation. This translates to a layerwise speedup of up to 134% and a reduction of normalized training time of 46% on a fully DCN-enabled ResNet model.
items.abstract_zh: 可变形卷积网络（DCN）已被提出作为一种强大的工具，通过输入特征图的自适应采样来提高卷积神经网络（CNN）在计算机视觉任务中的表示能力。与视觉变压器非常相似，DCN 使用比标准 CNN 更灵活的归纳偏置，并且也已被证明可以提高特定模型的性能。例如，嵌入式 DCN 层可将 Mask RCNN 的 AP 分数提高 10.6 分，同时仅引入 1% 的额外参数和 FLOP，从而改进了发布时的最先进模型。然而，尽管有证据表明，在网络中更早放置更多的 DCN 层可以进一步提高性能，但与视觉 Transformer 不同，我们还没有看到这种趋势随着 CNN 变形的进一步扩展而持续下去。基准测试实验表明，实际大小的 DCN 层（64H×64W、64 个输入输出通道）在 GPU 平台上会导致 4 倍的速度减慢，从而阻碍了 CNN 中变形的广泛使用。这些速度下降是由双线性插值运算符的不规则的依赖于输入的访问模式引起的，与 DCN 的其余部分相比，双线性插值运算符的算术强度 (AI) 过低。为了解决 DCN 不成比例的减速问题并使其在 CNN 中得到扩展，我们提出了 DefT，这是一系列针对 DCN 内核的工作负载感知优化。 DefT 识别 DCN 中的性能瓶颈，并融合观察到的限制 DCN AI 的特定运算符。我们的方法还使用 DCN 工作负载的统计信息来调整工作负载分块以适应 DCN 层维度，从而最大限度地减少昂贵的越界输入访问。实验结果表明，与当前最先进的 PyTorch 实现相比，DefT 最多可减轻一半的 DCN 速度下降。这意味着在完全支持 DCN 的 ResNet 模型上，分层加速高达 134%，标准化训练时间减少 46%。

items.title: MP-Rec: Hardware-Software Co-design to Enable Multi-path Recommendation.
items.abstract:
Deep learning recommendation systems serve personalized content under diverse tail-latency targets and input-query loads. In order to do so, state-of-the-art recommendation models rely on terabyte-scale embedding tables to learn user preferences over large bodies of contents. The reliance on a fixed embedding representation of embedding tables not only imposes significant memory capacity and bandwidth requirements but also limits the scope of compatible system solutions. This paper challenges the assumption of fixed embedding representations by showing how synergies between embedding representations and hardware platforms can lead to improvements in both algorithmic- and system performance. Based on our characterization of various embedding representations, we propose a hybrid embedding representation that achieves higher quality embeddings at the cost of increased memory and compute requirements. To address the system performance challenges of the hybrid representation, we propose MP-Rec — a co-design technique that exploits heterogeneity and dynamic selection of embedding representations and underlying hardware platforms.

On real system hardware, we demonstrate how matching custom accelerators, i.e., GPUs, TPUs, and IPUs, with compatible embedding representations can lead to 16.65× performance speedup. Additionally, in query-serving scenarios, MP-Rec achieves 2.49× and 3.76× higher correct prediction throughput and 0.19% and 0.22% better model quality on a CPU-GPU system for the Kaggle and Terabyte datasets, respectively.
items.abstract_zh:
深度学习推荐系统在不同的尾部延迟目标和输入查询负载下提供个性化内容。为此，最先进的推荐模型依赖 TB 级嵌入表来了解用户对大量内容的偏好。对嵌入表的固定嵌入表示的依赖不仅提出了显着的存储器容量和带宽要求，而且还限制了兼容系统解决方案的范围。本文通过展示嵌入表示和硬件平台之间的协同作用如何导致算法和系统性能的改进，对固定嵌入表示的假设提出了挑战。基于我们对各种嵌入表示的表征，我们提出了一种混合嵌入表示，它以增加内存和计算要求为代价实现了更高质量的嵌入。为了解决混合表示的系统性能挑战，我们提出了 MP-Rec——一种利用嵌入表示和底层硬件平台的异构性和动态选择的协同设计技术。

在真实的系统硬件上，我们演示了如何将自定义加速器（即 GPU、TPU 和 IPU）与兼容的嵌入表示相匹配，从而实现 16.65 倍的性能加速。此外，在查询服务场景中，MP-Rec 在 Kaggle 和 Terabyte 数据集的 CPU-GPU 系统上分别实现了 2.49 倍和 3.76 倍的正确预测吞吐量提高了 2.49 倍和 3.76 倍，模型质量提高了 0.19% 和 0.22%。

items.title: The Sparse Abstract Machine.
items.abstract: We propose the Sparse Abstract Machine (SAM), an abstract machine model for targeting sparse tensor algebra to reconfigurable and fixed-function spatial dataflow accelerators. SAM defines a streaming dataflow abstraction with sparse primitives that encompass a large space of scheduled tensor algebra expressions. SAM dataflow graphs naturally separate tensor formats from algorithms and are expressive enough to incorporate arbitrary iteration orderings and many hardware-specific optimizations. We also present Custard, a compiler from a high-level language to SAM that demonstrates SAM's usefulness as an intermediate representation. We automatically bind from SAM to a streaming dataflow simulator. We evaluate the generality and extensibility of SAM, explore the performance space of sparse tensor algebra optimizations using SAM, and show SAM's ability to represent dataflow hardware.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了稀疏抽象机（SAM），这是一种针对稀疏张量代数到可重构和固定功能空间数据流加速器的抽象机器模型。 SAM 使用稀疏原语定义了流数据流抽象，其中包含大量预定张量代数表达式。 SAM 数据流图自然地将张量格式与算法分开，并且具有足够的表达能力，可以合并任意迭代顺序和许多特定于硬件的优化。我们还介绍了 Custard，一种从高级语言到 SAM 的编译器，它演示了 SAM 作为中间表示的有用性。我们自动从 SAM 绑定到流数据流模拟器。我们评估了 SAM 的通用性和可扩展性，探索使用 SAM 的稀疏张量代数优化的性能空间，并展示了 SAM 表示数据流硬件的能力。

items.title: CaQR: A Compiler-Assisted Approach for Qubit Reuse through Dynamic Circuit.
items.abstract: Quantum measurement is important to quantum computing as it extracts out the outcome of the circuit at the end of the computation. Previously, all measurements have to be done at the end of the circuit. Otherwise, it will incur significant errors. But it is not the case now. Recently IBM starts supporting dynamic circuit through hardware (instead of software by simulator). With mid-circuit hardware measurement, we can improve circuit efficacy and fidelity from three aspects: (a) reduced qubit usage, (b) reduced swap insertion, and (c) improved fidelity. We demonstrate this using real-world applications Bernstein Verizani on real hardware and show that circuit resource usage can be improved by 60%, and circuit fidelity can be improved by 15%. We design a compiler-assisted tool that can find and exploit the tradeoff between qubit reuse, fidelity, gate count, and circuit duration. We also developed a method for identifying whether qubit reuse will be beneficial for a given application. We evaluated our method on a representative set of important applications. We can reduce resource usage by up to 80% and improve circuit fidelity by up to 20%.
items.abstract_zh: 量子测量对于量子计算很重要，因为它在计算结束时提取电路的结果。以前，所有测量都必须在电路末端完成。否则，将会产生重大错误。但现在情况并非如此。最近IBM开始通过硬件（而不是通过模拟器的软件）支持动态电路。通过中间电路硬件测量，我们可以从三个方面提高电路效率和保真度：（a）减少量子位使用，（b）减少交换插入，以及（c）提高保真度。我们使用 Bernstein Verizani 在真实硬件上的实际应用程序对此进行了演示，结果表明电路资源利用率可以提高 60%，电路保真度可以提高 15%。我们设计了一个编译器辅助工具，可以找到并利用量子位重用、保真度、门数和电路持续时间之间的权衡。我们还开发了一种方法来确定量子位重用是否对给定应用有益。我们在一组具有代表性的重要应用中评估了我们的方法。我们可以减少高达 80% 的资源使用量，并将电路保真度提高高达 20%。

items.title: Protect the System Call, Protect (Most of) the World with BASTION.
items.abstract:
System calls are a critical building block in many serious security attacks, such as control-flow hijacking and privilege escalation attacks. Security-sensitive system calls (e.g., execve, mprotect), especially play a major role in completing attacks. Yet, few defense efforts focus to ensure their legitimate usage, allowing attackers to maliciously leverage system calls in attacks.

In this paper, we propose a novel System Call Integrity , which enforces the correct use of system calls throughout runtime. We propose three new contexts enforcing (1) which system call is called and how it is invoked (Call Type), (2) how a system call is reached (Control Flow), and (3) that arguments are not corrupted (Argument Integrity). Our defense mechanism thwarts attacks by breaking the critical building block in their attack chains.

We implement BASTION, as a compiler and runtime monitor system, to demonstrate the efficacy of the three system call contexts. Our security case study shows that BASTION can effectively stop all the attacks including real-world exploits and recent advanced attack strategies. Deploying BASTION on three popular system call-intensive programs, NGINX, SQLite, and vsFTPd, we show BASTION is secure and practical, demonstrating overhead of 0.60%, 2.01%, and 1.65%, respectively.
items.abstract_zh:
系统调用是许多严重安全攻击（例如控制流劫持和特权升级攻击）中的关键构建块。安全敏感的系统调用（例如 execve、mprotect）在完成攻击中尤其发挥着重要作用。然而，很少有防御工作专注于确保其合法使用，从而使攻击者能够在攻击中恶意利用系统调用。

在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的系统调用完整性，它强制在整个运行时正确使用系统调用。我们提出了三个新的上下文，强制执行（1）调用哪个系统调用以及如何调用它（调用类型），（2）如何到达系统调用（控制流），以及（3）参数不被损坏（参数完整性）。我们的防御机制通过破坏攻击链中的关键构建块来阻止攻击。

我们实现 BASTION 作为编译器和运行时监控系统，以演示三个系统调用上下文的功效。我们的安全案例研究表明，BASTION 可以有效阻止所有攻击，包括现实世界的攻击和最新的高级攻击策略。在三个流行的系统调用密集型程序 NGINX、SQLite 和 vsFTPd 上部署 BASTION，我们证明了 BASTION 的安全性和实用性，开销分别为 0.60%、2.01% 和 1.65%。

items.title: Mapping Very Large Scale Spiking Neuron Network to Neuromorphic Hardware.
items.abstract: Neuromorphic hardware is a multi-core computer system specifically designed to run Spiking Neuron Network (SNN) applications. As the scale of neuromorphic hardware increases, it becomes very challenging to efficiently map a large SNN to hardware. In this paper, we proposed an efficient approach to map very large scale SNN applications to neuromorphic hardware, aiming to reduce energy consumption, spike latency, and on-chip network communication congestion. The approach consists of two steps. Firstly, it solves the initial placement using the Hilbert curve, a space-filling curve with unique properties that are particularly suitable for mapping SNNs. Secondly, the Force Directed (FD) algorithm is developed to optimize the initial placement. The FD algorithm formulates the connections of clusters as tension forces, thus converts the local optimization of placement as a force analysis problem. The proposed approach is evaluated with the scale of 4 billion neurons, which is more than 200 times larger than previous research. The results show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance, significantly exceeding existing approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 神经形态硬件是一种多核计算机系统，专门设计用于运行尖峰神经元网络 (SNN) 应用程序。随着神经形态硬件规模的增加，将大型 SNN 有效映射到硬件变得非常具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种将超大规模 SNN 应用映射到神经形态硬件的有效方法，旨在减少能耗、峰值延迟和片上网络通信拥塞。该方法包括两个步骤。首先，它使用希尔伯特曲线解决初始放置问题，这是一种具有独特属性的空间填充曲线，特别适合映射 SNN。其次，开发了力导向（FD）算法来优化初始放置。 FD算法将簇的连接表示为拉力，从而将放置的局部优化转化为力分析问题。所提出的方法在 40 亿个神经元的规模上进行了评估，这比之前的研究大了 200 倍以上。结果表明，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能，显着超过了现有方法。

items.title: Rosebud: Making FPGA-Accelerated Middlebox Development More Pleasant.
items.abstract: We introduce an approach to designing FPGA-accelerated middleboxes that simplifies development, debugging, and performance tuning by decoupling the tasks of hardware-accelerator implementation and software-application programming. Rosebud is a framework that links hardware accelerators to a high-performance packet processing pipeline through a standardized hardware/software interface. This separation of concerns allows hardware developers to focus on optimizing custom accelerators while freeing software programmers to reuse, configure, and debug accelerators in a fashion akin to software libraries. We show the benefits of the Rosebud framework by building a firewall based on a large blacklist and porting the Pigasus IDS pattern-matching accelerator in less than a month. Our experiments demonstrate that Rosebud delivers high performance, serving ∼200 ‍Gbps of traffic while adding only 0.7–7 microseconds of latency.
items.abstract_zh: 我们介绍了一种设计 FPGA 加速中间盒的方法，该方法通过解耦硬件加速器实现和软件应用程序编程的任务来简化开发、调试和性能调整。 Rosebud 是一个框架，通过标准化的硬件/软件接口将硬件加速器连接到高性能数据包处理管道。这种关注点分离使硬件开发人员能够专注于优化自定义加速器，同时使软件程序员能够以类似于软件库的方式重用、配置和调试加速器。我们通过在不到一个月的时间内构建基于大型黑名单的防火墙并移植 Pigasus IDS 模式匹配加速器来展示 Rosebud 框架的优势。我们的实验表明，Rosebud 具有高性能，可提供约 200 Gbps 的流量，同时仅增加 0.7–7 微秒的延迟。

items.title: TeraHeap: Reducing Memory Pressure in Managed Big Data Frameworks.
items.abstract:
Big data analytics frameworks, such as Spark and Giraph, need to process and cache massive amounts of data that do not always fit on the managed heap. Therefore, frameworks temporarily move long-lived objects outside the managed heap (off-heap) on a fast storage device. However, this practice results in (1) high serialization/deserialization (S/D) cost and (2) high memory pressure when off-heap objects are moved back to the heap for processing.

In this paper, we propose TeraHeap, a system that eliminates S/D overhead and expensive GC scans for a large portion of the objects in big data frameworks. TeraHeap relies on three concepts. (1) It eliminates S/D cost by extending the managed runtime (JVM) to use a second high-capacity heap (H2) over a fast storage device. (2) It offers a simple hint-based interface, allowing big data analytics frameworks to leverage knowledge about objects to populate H2. (3) It reduces GC cost by fencing the garbage collector from scanning H2 objects while maintaining the illusion of a single managed heap.

We implement TeraHeap in OpenJDK and evaluate it with 15 widely used applications in two real-world big data frameworks, Spark and Giraph. Our evaluation shows that for the same DRAM size, TeraHeap improves performance by up to 73% and 28% compared to native Spark and Giraph, respectively. Also, it provides better performance by consuming up to 4.6× and 1.2× less DRAM capacity than native Spark and Giraph, respectively. Finally, it outperforms Panthera, a state-of-the-art garbage collector for hybrid memories, by up to 69%.
items.abstract_zh:
Spark 和 Giraph 等大数据分析框架需要处理和缓存大量数据，而这些数据并不总是适合托管堆。因此，框架会暂时将长期存在的对象移至快速存储设备上的托管堆（堆外）之外。然而，这种做法会导致 (1) 序列化/反序列化 (S/D) 成本较高，以及 (2) 当堆外对象移回堆进行处理时内存压力较高。

在本文中，我们提出了 TeraHeap，这是一个系统，可以消除大数据框架中大部分对象的 S/D 开销和昂贵的 GC 扫描。 TeraHeap 依赖于三个概念。 (1) 它通过扩展托管运行时 (JVM) 以在快速存储设备上使用第二个大容量堆 (H2) 来消除 S/D 成本。 (2) 它提供了一个简单的基于提示的界面，允许大数据分析框架利用有关对象的知识来填充 H2。 (3) 它通过阻止垃圾收集器扫描 H2 对象来降低 GC 成本，同时保持单个托管堆的假象。

我们在 OpenJDK 中实现 TeraHeap，并使用 Spark 和 Giraph 这两个现实世界大数据框架中的 15 个广泛使用的应用程序对其进行评估。我们的评估显示，对于相同的 DRAM 大小，TeraHeap 与原生 Spark 和 Giraph 相比，性能分别提高了 73% 和 28%。此外，与原生 Spark 和 Giraph 相比，它消耗的 DRAM 容量分别减少了 4.6 倍和 1.2 倍，从而提供了更好的性能。最后，它的性能比 Panthera（一种最先进的混合内存垃圾收集器）高出 69%。

items.title: Simulator Independent Coverage for RTL Hardware Languages.
items.abstract: We demonstrate a new approach to implementing automated coverage metrics including line, toggle, and finite state machine coverage. Each metric is implemented through a compiler pass with a report generator. They are decoupled from the backend simulation, emulation, or formal verification tool through a simple API designed around a single new cover primitive. Our prototype for the Chisel hardware construction language demonstrates support across three software simulators, the FPGA-accelerated FireSim simulator and a formal tool. We demonstrate collecting line coverage while booting Linux with FireSim at a target frequency of 65MHz. By construction, coverage can be trivially merged across backends.
items.abstract_zh: 我们演示了一种实现自动化覆盖率指标的新方法，包括线路覆盖率、切换覆盖率和有限状态机覆盖率。每个指标都是通过带有报告生成器的编译器传递来实现的。它们通过围绕单个新覆盖原语设计的简单 API 与后端模拟、仿真或形式验证工具分离。我们的 Chisel 硬件构建语言原型展示了对三个软件模拟器、FPGA 加速 FireSim 模拟器和正式工具的支持。我们演示了在使用 FireSim 以 65MHz 的目标频率启动 Linux 时收集线路覆盖范围。通过构建，覆盖范围可以轻松地跨后端合并。

items.title: Reconfigurable Virtual Memory for FPGA-Driven I/O.
items.abstract:
FPGAs are increasingly used to accelerate modern applications, and cloud providers offer FPGA platforms on-demand with a variety of FPGAs, I/O peripherals, and memory options. FPGA vendors expose I/O with low-level interfaces that limit application portability. Current approaches to abstracting these interfaces trade level of abstraction against performance.

We present FSRF, File System for Reconfigurable Fabrics, which abstracts FPGA I/O at a high level without sacrificing performance. Rather than exposing platform-specific I/O interfaces, FSRF enables files to be mapped directly into FPGA virtual memory from the host. On the FPGA, powerful OS-managed virtual memory hardware provides performant access to FPGA-local resources and helps coordinate access to remote data. FSRF leverages reconfigurability to specialize its virtual memory implementation to applications, including selecting between SRAM and DRAM TLBs, adapting FPGA DRAM striping, and tuning DMA I/O. On Amazon F1 FPGAs, FSRF outperforms techniques from FPGA OSes such as Coyote and AmorphOS with improvements of up to 64× and 2.3×, respectively (+75% and +27% geometric mean), and performance close to that of physical addressing (90% geometric mean).
items.abstract_zh:
FPGA 越来越多地用于加速现代应用程序，云提供商按需提供具有各种 FPGA、I/O 外设和内存选项的 FPGA 平台。 FPGA 供应商通过低级接口公开 I/O，限制了应用程序的可移植性。当前抽象这些接口的方法以抽象级别和性能为代价。

我们推出了 FSRF（可重构结构文件系统），它在不牺牲性能的情况下对 FPGA I/O 进行了高层抽象。 FSRF 不是公开特定于平台的 I/O 接口，而是使文件能够从主机直接映射到 FPGA 虚拟内存中。在 FPGA 上，强大的操作系统管理的虚拟内存硬件提供对 FPGA 本地资源的高性能访问，并帮助协调对远程数据的访问。 FSRF 利用可重配置性将其虚拟内存实现专门化到应用程序，包括在 SRAM 和 DRAM TLB 之间进行选择、调整 FPGA DRAM 条带化以及调整 DMA I/O。在 Amazon F1 FPGA 上，FSRF 的性能优于 Coyote 和 AmorphOS 等 FPGA 操作系统的技术，分别提高了 64 倍和 2.3 倍（+75% 和 +27% 几何平均值），并且性能接近物理寻址（90% 几何平均值）。

items.title: Finding Unstable Code via Compiler-Driven Differential Testing.
items.abstract:
Unstable code refers to code that has inconsistent or unstable run-time semantics due to undefined behavior (UB) in the program. Compilers exploit UB by assuming that UB never occurs, which allows them to generate efficient but potentially semantically inconsistent binaries. Practitioners have put great research and engineering effort into designing dynamic tools such as sanitizers for frequently occurring UBs. However, it remains a big challenge how to detect UBs that are beyond the reach of current techniques.

In this paper, we introduce compiler-driven differential testing (CompDiff), a simple yet effective approach for finding unstable code in C/C++ programs. CompDiff relies on the fact that when compiling unstable code, different compiler implementations may produce semantically inconsistent binaries. Our main approach is to examine the outputs of different binaries on the same input. Discrepancies in outputs may signify the existence of unstable code. To detect unstable code in real-world programs, we also integrate CompDiff into AFL++, the most widely-used and actively-maintained general-purpose fuzzer.

Despite its simplicity, CompDiff is effective in practice: on the Juliet benchmark programs, CompDiff uniquely detected 1,409 bugs compared to sanitizers; on 23 popular open-source C/C++ projects, CompDiff-AFL++ uncovered 78 new bugs, 52 of which have been fixed by developers and 36 cannot be detected by sanitizers. Our evaluation also reveals the fact that CompDiff is not designed to replace current UB detectors but to complement them.
items.abstract_zh:
不稳定代码是指由于程序中未定义的行为（UB）而导致运行时语义不一致或不稳定的代码。编译器通过假设 UB 永远不会发生来利用 UB，这使得它们能够生成高效但可能语义不一致的二进制文件。从业者投入了大量的研究和工程精力来设计动态工具，例如针对频繁出现的 UB 的消毒剂。然而，如何检测超出当前技术范围的UB仍然是一个巨大的挑战。

在本文中，我们介绍了编译器驱动的差异测试 (CompDiff)，这是一种在 C/C++ 程序中查找不稳定代码的简单而有效的方法。 CompDiff 依赖于这样一个事实：在编译不稳定的代码时，不同的编译器实现可能会生成语义不一致的二进制文件。我们的主要方法是检查同一输入上不同二进制文件的输出。输出的差异可能表明存在不稳定的代码。为了检测现实程序中不稳定的代码，我们还将 CompDiff 集成到 AFL++ 中，AFL++ 是使用最广泛且维护积极的通用模糊器。

尽管很简单，CompDiff 在实践中仍然有效：在 Juliet 基准程序中，与消毒剂相比，CompDiff 独特地检测到了 1,409 个错误；在 23 个流行的开源 C/C++ 项目中，CompDiff-AFL++ 发现了 78 个新错误，其中 52 个已被开发人员修复，36 个无法被清理程序检测到。我们的评估还揭示了这样一个事实：CompDiff 并不是为了取代当前的 UB 检测器而设计的，而是为了补充它们。

items.title: Hyperscale Hardware Optimized Neural Architecture Search.
items.abstract:
Recent advances in machine learning have leveraged dramatic increases in computational power, a trend expected to continue in the future. This paper introduces the first Hyperscale Hardware Optimized Neural Architecture Search (H 2 O-NAS) to automatically design accurate and performant machine learning models tailored to the underlying hardware architecture. H 2 O-NAS consists of three key components: a new massively parallel “one-shot” search algorithm with intelligent weight sharing, which can scale to search spaces of O (10 280 ) and handle large volumes of production traffic; hardware-optimized search spaces for diverse ML models on heterogeneous hardware; and a novel two-phase hybrid performance model and a multi-objective reward function optimized for large scale deployments.

H 2 O-NAS has been implemented around state-of-the-art machine learning models (e.g. convolutional models, vision transformers, and deep learning recommendation models) and deployed at zettaflop scale in production. Our results demonstrate significant improvements in performance (22% ∼ 56%) and energy efficiency (17% ∼25%) at same or better quality. Our solution is designed for largescale deployment, streamlining privacy and security processes and reducing manual overhead. This facilitates a smooth and automated transition from research to production.
items.abstract_zh:
机器学习的最新进展极大地提高了计算能力，预计这一趋势在未来将持续下去。本文介绍了第一个超大规模硬件优化神经架构搜索（H 2 O-NAS），可以自动设计适合底层硬件架构的准确且高性能的机器学习模型。 H 2 O-NAS 由三个关键组件组成：一种具有智能权重共享的新型大规模并行“一次性”搜索算法，可以扩展到 O (10 280 ) 的搜索空间并处理大量生产流量；针对异构硬件上的各种机器学习模型的硬件优化搜索空间；以及新颖的两阶段混合性能模型和针对大规模部署优化的多目标奖励函数。

H 2 O-NAS 已围绕最先进的机器学习模型（例如卷积模型、视觉变换器和深度学习推荐模型）实施，并在生产中以 zettaflop 规模部署。我们的结果表明，在相同或更好的质量下，性能 (22% ∼ 56%) 和能源效率 (17% ∼25%) 显着提高。我们的解决方案专为大规模部署而设计，简化隐私和安全流程并减少手动开销。这有助于从研究到生产的平稳、自动化过渡。

items.title: DrGPUM: Guiding Memory Optimization for GPU-Accelerated Applications.
items.abstract:
GPUs are widely used in today’s computing platforms to accelerate applications in various domains. However, scarce GPU memory resources are often the dominant limiting factor in strengthening the applicability of GPU computing. In this paper, we propose DrGPUM, the first profiler that systematically investigates patterns of memory inefficiencies in GPU-accelerated applications. The strength of DrGPUM, when compared to a large class of existing GPU profilers, is its ability to (1) correlate problematic memory usage with data objects and GPU APIs, (2) identify and categorize object-level and intra-object memory inefficiencies, and (3) provide rich insights to guide memory optimization.

DrGPUM works on fully-optimized and unmodified GPU binaries, requires no modification to hardware or OS, and features a user-friendly GUI, which makes it attractive to use in production. Our evaluation with well-known benchmarks and applications shows DrGPUM’s effectiveness in identifying memory inefficiencies with moderate overhead. Eliminating these inefficiencies requires less than nine source lines of code modifications and yields significant reductions in peak memory usage (up to 83%) and/or significant performance improvements (up to 2.48×). Our optimization patches have been confirmed by application developers and upstreamed to their repositories.
items.abstract_zh:
GPU 广泛应用于当今的计算平台中，以加速各个领域的应用程序。然而，稀缺的GPU内存资源往往是增强GPU计算适用性的主要限制因素。在本文中，我们提出了 DrGPUM，这是第一个系统地研究 GPU 加速应用程序中内存效率低下模式的分析器。与一大类现有 GPU 分析器相比，DrGPUM 的优势在于它能够 (1) 将有问题的内存使用情况与数据对象和 GPU API 关联起来，(2) 识别对象级和对象内内存低效率并对其进行分类，以及 (3) 提供丰富的见解来指导内存优化。

DrGPUM 适用于完全优化且未经修改的 GPU 二进制文件，无需修改硬件或操作系统，并具有用户友好的 GUI，这使其在生产中使用具有吸引力。我们对知名基准测试和应用程序的评估表明，DrGPUM 在识别内存效率低下且开销适中的方面非常有效。消除这些低效率问题需要进行少于九行源代码修改，并可显着降低峰值内存使用量（高达 83%）和/或显着提高性能（高达 2.48 倍）。我们的优化补丁已得到应用程序开发人员的确认并上传到他们的存储库。

items.title: In-Network Aggregation with Transport Transparency for Distributed Training.
items.abstract:
Recent In-Network Aggregation (INA) solutions offload the all-reduce operation onto network switches to accelerate and scale distributed training (DT). On end hosts, these solutions build custom network stacks to replace the transport layer. The INA-oriented network stack cannot take advantage of the state-of-the-art performant transport layer implementation, and also causes complexity in system development and operation.

We design a transport-transparent INA primitive named NetReduce for modern multi-rack data centers. NetReduce runs beneath the transport layer. The switch performs aggregation operations but preserves data transmission connections. The host uses RoCE as its transport layer to deliver gradient messages and receive aggregation results. NetReduce achieves performance gains from both INA and RoCE: linear scalability, traffic reduction, and bandwidth freeing-up from INA — high throughput, low latency, and low CPU overhead from RoCE. For jobs spanning several multi-GPU machines, we also devise parallel all-reduce based on NetReduce to make use of intra-machine and inter-machine bandwidth efficiently. We prototype NetReduce on an FPGA board attached to an Ethernet switch. We compare NetReduce with existing programmable switch-based solutions and justify the FPGA-based design choice. We evaluate NetReduce’s performance by training typical Deep Neural Network models on single-GPU and multi-GPU testbeds. NetReduce inter-operates with the existing Ethernet transport layer, is training-framework friendly, accelerates network-intensive DT jobs effectively (e.g., 70% for AlexNet), reduces CPU overheads (e.g., only one core for transmission), and is cost-effective (e.g., only 2.40% more capital expense and 0.68% more power consumption making 12.3-57.9% more performance acceleration).
items.abstract_zh:
最近的网内聚合 (INA) 解决方案将全归约操作卸载到网络交换机上，以加速和扩展分布式训练 (DT)。在终端主机上，这些解决方案构建自定义网络堆栈来替换传输层。面向INA的网络堆栈无法利用最先进的高性能传输层实现，并且还导致系统开发和操作的复杂性。

我们为现代多机架数据中心设计了一个传输透明的 INA 原语，名为 NetReduce。 NetReduce 运行在传输层之下。交换机执行聚合操作，但保留数据传输连接。主机使用RoCE作为其传输层来传递梯度消息并接收聚合结果。 NetReduce 实现了 INA 和 RoCE 的性能提升：线性可扩展性、流量减少和 INA 的带宽释放 - RoCE 的高吞吐量、低延迟和低 CPU 开销。对于跨多个多GPU机器的作业，我们还设计了基于NetReduce的并行all-reduce，以有效地利用机器内和机器间的带宽。我们在连接以太网交换机的 FPGA 板上构建了 NetReduce 原型。我们将 NetReduce 与现有的基于可编程交换机的解决方案进行比较，并证明基于 FPGA 的设计选择是合理的。我们通过在单 GPU 和多 GPU 测试台上训练典型的深度神经网络模型来评估 NetReduce 的性能。 NetReduce 与现有以太网传输层互操作，训练框架友好，有效加速网络密集型 DT 作业（例如，AlexNet 加速 70%），减少 CPU 开销（例如，仅一个核心用于传输），并且具有成本效益（例如，资本支出仅增加 2.40%，功耗增加 0.68%，性能加速提高 12.3-57.9%）。

items.title: Space-Efficient TREC for Enabling Deep Learning on Microcontrollers.
items.abstract: Deploying deep neural networks (DNNs) for a resource-constrained environment and achieving satisfactory performance is challenging. It is especially so on microcontrollers for their stringent space and computing power. This paper focuses on new ways to make TREC, an optimization recently proposed to enable computation reuse in DNNs, space and time efficient on Microcontrollers. The solution maximizes the performance benefits while keeping the DNN accuracy stable. Experiments show that the solution eliminates over 96% computations in DNNs and makes them fit well into microcontrollers, producing 3.4-5× speedups with only marginal accuracy loss.
items.abstract_zh: 在资源受限的环境中部署深度神经网络 (DNN) 并获得令人满意的性能具有挑战性。微控制器尤其如此，因为它们具有严格的空间和计算能力。本文重点介绍 TREC 的新方法，这是最近提出的一种优化方法，旨在实现 DNN 中的计算重用，以及微控制器上的空间和时间效率。该解决方案最大限度地提高了性能优势，同时保持 DNN 精度稳定。实验表明，该解决方案消除了 DNN 中超过 96% 的计算，并使它们能够很好地融入微控制器，从而产生 3.4-5 倍的加速，而精度损失却很小。

items.title: Efficient Scheduler Live Update for Linux Kernel with Modularization.
items.abstract: The scheduler is a critical component of the operating system (OS)and is tightly coupled with Linux. Production-level clouds often host various workloads, and these workloads require different schedulers to achieve high performance. Thus the capability of updating the scheduler lively without rebooting the OS is crucial for the production environments. However, emerging live update techniques only apply for the fine-grained function-level updates or require extra constraints such as microkernel. It fails to update the entire heavy process scheduler subsystem lively. We therefore propose Plugsched to enable scheduler live update, and there are two key novelties. First of all, with the idea of modularization, Plugsched decouples the scheduler from the Linux kernel to be an independent module; Secondly, Plugsched uses the data rebuild technique to migrate the state from the old scheduler to the new one. This scheme can be directly applied to the Linux kernel scheduler in production environments without modifying kernel code. Unlike current function-level live update solutions, Plugsched allows developers to update the entire scheduler subsystem and modify internal scheduler data via the rebuilding technique. Moreover, an optimized stack inspection method is introduced to further effectively reduce the downtime due to the update. Experimental and production results show that Plugsched can effectively update kernel scheduler lively and the downtime is less than tens of milliseconds.
items.abstract_zh: 调度程序是操作系统 (OS) 的关键组件，与 Linux 紧密耦合。生产级云通常承载各种工作负载，这些工作负载需要不同的调度程序才能实现高性能。因此，在不重新启动操作系统的情况下实时更新调度程序的能力对于生产环境至关重要。然而，新兴的实时更新技术仅适用于细粒度的功能级更新或需要额外的约束，例如微内核。它无法实时更新整个繁重的进程调度子系统。因此，我们建议 Plugsched 启用调度程序实时更新，并且有两个关键的新颖之处。首先，Plugsched以模块化的思想，将调度器从Linux内核中解耦出来，成为一个独立的模块；其次，Plugsched 使用数据重建技术将状态从旧调度器迁移到新调度器。该方案可以直接应用于生产环境中的Linux内核调度器，无需修改内核代码。与当前功能级实时更新解决方案不同，Plugsched 允许开发人员更新整个调度程序子系统并通过重建技术修改内部调度程序数据。此外，还引入了优化的堆栈检查方法，进一步有效减少了因更新而导致的停机时间。实验和生产结果表明，Plugsched能够有效地实时更新内核调度程序，停机时间小于几十毫秒。

items.title: Coyote: A Compiler for Vectorizing Encrypted Arithmetic Circuits.
items.abstract:
Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) is a scheme that allows a computational circuit to operate on encrypted data and produce a result that, when decrypted, yields the result of the unencrypted computation. While FHE enables privacy-preserving computation, it is extremely slow. However, the mathematical formulation of FHE supports a SIMD-like execution style, so recent work has turned to vectorization to recover some of the missing performance. Unfortunately, these approaches do not work well for arbitrary computations: they do not account for the high cost of rotating vector operands to allow data to be used in multiple operations. Hence, the cost of rotation can outweigh the benefits of vectorization.

This paper presents Coyote, a new approach to vectorizing encrypted circuits that specifically aims to optimize the use of rotations. It tackles the scheduling and data layout problems simultaneously, operating at the level of subcircuits that can be vectorized without incurring excessive data movement overhead. By jointly searching for good vectorization and lane placement, Coyote finds schedules that avoid sacrificing one for the other. This paper shows that Coyote is effective at vectorizing computational kernels while minimizing rotations, thus finding efficient vector schedules and smart rotation schemes to achieve substantial speedups.
items.abstract_zh:
完全同态加密 (FHE) 是一种允许计算电路对加密数据进行操作并产生结果的方案，该结果在解密时会产生未加密计算的结果。虽然 FHE 可以实现隐私保护计算，但速度非常慢。然而，FHE 的数学公式支持类似 SIMD 的执行风格，因此最近的工作转向矢量化以恢复一些缺失的性能。不幸的是，这些方法不适用于任意计算：它们没有考虑到旋转向量操作数以允许数据在多个操作中使用的高成本。因此，旋转的成本可能超过矢量化的好处。

本文提出了 Coyote，一种矢量化加密电路的新方法，专门旨在优化旋转的使用。它同时解决调度和数据布局问题，在可以矢量化的子电路级别运行，而不会产生过多的数据移动开销。通过共同寻找良好的矢量化和车道布局，Coyote 找到了避免牺牲其中之一的时间表。本文表明，Coyote 可以有效地矢量化计算内核，同时最小化旋转，从而找到有效的矢量调度和智能旋转方案来实现大幅加速。

items.title: TPP: Transparent Page Placement for CXL-Enabled Tiered-Memory.
items.abstract:
The increasing demand for memory in hyperscale applications has led to memory becoming a large portion of the overall datacenter spend. The emergence of coherent interfaces like CXL enables main memory expansion and offers an efficient solution to this problem. In such systems, the main memory can constitute different memory technologies with varied characteristics. In this paper, we characterize memory usage patterns of a wide range of datacenter applications across the server fleet of Meta. We, therefore, demonstrate the opportunities to offload colder pages to slower memory tiers for these applications. Without efficient memory management, however, such systems can significantly degrade performance.

We propose a novel OS-level application-transparent page placement mechanism (TPP) for CXL-enabled memory. TPP employs a lightweight mechanism to identify and place hot/cold pages to appropriate memory tiers. It enables a proactive page demotion from local memory to CXL-Memory. This technique ensures a memory headroom for new page allocations that are often related to request processing and tend to be short-lived and hot. At the same time, TPP can promptly promote performance-critical hot pages trapped in the slow CXL-Memory to the fast local memory, while minimizing both sampling overhead and unnecessary migrations. TPP works transparently without any application-specific knowledge and can be deployed globally as a kernel release.

We evaluate TPP with diverse memory-sensitive workloads in the production server fleet with early samples of new x86 CPUs with CXL 1.1 support. TPP makes a tiered memory system performant as an ideal baseline (<1% gap) that has all the memory in the local tier. It is 18% better than today’s Linux, and 5–17% better than existing solutions including NUMA Balancing and AutoTiering. Most of the TPP patches have been merged in the Linux v5.18 release while the remaining ones are just pending for more discussion.
items.abstract_zh:
超大规模应用程序对内存的需求不断增加，导致内存成为数据中心总体支出的很大一部分。 CXL 等相干接口的出现实现了主存储器扩展，并为该问题提供了有效的解决方案。在此类系统中，主存储器可以构成具有不同特性的不同存储器技术。在本文中，我们描述了 Meta 服务器群中各种数据中心应用程序的内存使用模式。因此，我们展示了将较冷的页面卸载到这些应用程序的较慢的内存层的机会。然而，如果没有有效的内存管理，此类系统可能会显着降低性能。

我们为支持 CXL 的内存提出了一种新颖的操作系统级应用程序透明页面放置机制 (TPP)。 TPP 采用轻量级机制来识别热/冷页并将其放置到适当的内存层。它支持主动将页面从本地内存降级到 CXL 内存。这种技术确保了新页面分配的内存空间，这些新页面分配通常与请求处理相关，并且往往是短暂的和热的。同时，TPP 可以迅速将慢速 CXL-Memory 中捕获的性能关键热页提升到快速本地内存，同时最大限度地减少采样开销和不必要的迁移。 TPP 透明地工作，无需任何特定于应用程序的知识，并且可以作为内核版本在全球范围内部署。

我们使用支持 CXL 1.1 的新型 x86 CPU 的早期样本来评估生产服务器群中各种内存敏感型工作负载的 TPP。 TPP 使分层内存系统的性能达到理想基准（<1% 差距），所有内存都位于本地层。它比当今的 Linux 好 18%，比现有解决方案（包括 NUMA Balancing 和 AutoTiering）好 5-17%。大多数 TPP 补丁已合并到 Linux v5.18 版本中，而其余补丁则有待更多讨论。

items.title: APEX: A Framework for Automated Processing Element Design Space Exploration using Frequent Subgraph Analysis.
items.abstract: The architecture of a coarse-grained reconfigurable array (CGRA) processing element (PE) has a significant effect on the performance and energy-efficiency of an application running on the CGRA. This paper presents APEX, an automated approach for generating specialized PE architectures for an application or an application domain. APEX first analyzes application domain benchmarks using frequent subgraph mining to extract commonly occurring computational subgraphs. APEX then generates specialized PEs by merging subgraphs using a datapath graph merging algorithm. The merged datapath graphs are translated into a PE specification from which we automatically generate the PE hardware description in Verilog along with a compiler that maps applications to the PE. The PE hardware and compiler are inserted into a flexible CGRA generation and compilation toolchain that allows for agile evaluation of CGRAs. We evaluate APEX for two domains, machine learning and image processing. For image processing applications, our automatically generated CGRAs with specialized PEs achieve from 5% to 30% less area and from 22% to 46% less energy compared to a general-purpose CGRA. For machine learning applications, our automatically generated CGRAs consume 16% to 59% less energy and 22% to 39% less area than a general-purpose CGRA. This work paves the way for creation of application domain-driven design-space exploration frameworks that automatically generate efficient programmable accelerators, with a much lower design effort for both hardware and compiler generation.
items.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构阵列 (CGRA) 处理元件 (PE) 的架构对 CGRA 上运行的应用程序的性能和能效具有显着影响。本文介绍了 APEX，一种为应用程序或应用程序域生成专用 PE 架构的自动化方法。 APEX 首先使用频繁的子图挖掘来分析应用程序域基准，以提取常见的计算子图。然后，APEX 通过使用数据路径图合并算法合并子图来生成专用 PE。合并的数据路径图被转换为 PE 规范，我们可以根据该规范自动生成 Verilog 中的 PE 硬件描述以及将应用程序映射到 PE 的编译器。 PE 硬件和编译器被插入到灵活的 CGRA 生成和编译工具链中，允许对 CGRA 进行敏捷评估。我们评估机器学习和图像处理两个领域的 APEX。对于图像处理应用，与通用 CGRA 相比，我们自动生成的具有专用 PE 的 CGRA 可减少 5% 至 30% 的面积和 22% 至 46% 的能量。对于机器学习应用，我们自动生成的 CGRA 比通用 CGRA 消耗的能源减少 16% 到 59%，面积减少 22% 到 39%。这项工作为创建应用领域驱动的设计空间探索框架铺平了道路，该框架可以自动生成高效的可编程加速器，同时大大减少了硬件和编译器生成的设计工作量。

items.title: Flexagon: A Multi-dataflow Sparse-Sparse Matrix Multiplication Accelerator for Efficient DNN Processing.
items.abstract:
Sparsity is a growing trend in modern DNN models.

Existing Sparse-Sparse Matrix Multiplication (SpMSpM) accelerators are tailored to a particular SpMSpM dataflow (i.e., Inner Product, Outer Product or Gustavson's), which determines their overall efficiency. We demonstrate that this static decision inherently results in a suboptimal dynamic solution. This is because different SpMSpM kernels show varying features (i.e., dimensions, sparsity pattern, sparsity degree), which makes each dataflow better suited to different data sets.

In this work we present Flexagon, the first SpMSpM reconfigurable accelerator that is capable of performing SpMSpM computation by using the particular dataflow that best matches each case. Flexagon accelerator is based on a novel Merger-Reduction Network (MRN) that unifies the concept of reducing and merging in the same substrate, increasing efficiency. Additionally, Flexagon also includes a new L1 on-chip memory organization, specifically tailored to the different access characteristics of the input and output compressed matrices. Using detailed cycle-level simulation of contemporary DNN models from a variety of application domains, we show that Flexagon achieves average performance benefits of 4.59x, 1.71x, and 1.35x with respect to the state-of-the-art SIGMA-like, SpArch-like and GAMMA-like accelerators (265%, 67%, and 18%, respectively, in terms of average performance/area efficiency).
items.abstract_zh:
稀疏性是现代 DNN 模型的一个日益增长的趋势。

现有的稀疏-稀疏矩阵乘法 (SpMSpM) 加速器是针对特定的 SpMSpM 数据流（即内积、外积或 Gustavson 数据流）量身定制的，这决定了其整体效率。我们证明这种静态决策本质上会导致次优的动态解决方案。这是因为不同的 SpMSpM 内核显示不同的特征（即维度、稀疏模式、稀疏程度），这使得每个数据流更适合不同的数据集。

在这项工作中，我们推出了 Flexagon，这是第一个 SpMSpM 可重构加速器，能够通过使用最适合每种情况的特定数据流来执行 SpMSpM 计算。 Flexagon 加速器基于新颖的合并归约网络 (MRN)，该网络将归约和合并的概念统一在同一基板中，从而提高了效率。此外，Flexagon还包括一个新的L1片上存储器组织，专门针对输入和输出压缩矩阵的不同访问特性而定制。通过对来自各种应用领域的当代 DNN 模型进行详细的循环级仿真，我们发现 Flexagon 相对于最先进的类 SIGMA、类 SpArch 和类 GAMMA 加速器实现了 4.59 倍、1.71 倍和 1.35 倍的平均性能优势（就平均性能/面积效率而言，分别为 265%、67% 和 18%）。

items.title: Going beyond the Limits of SFI: Flexible and Secure Hardware-Assisted In-Process Isolation with HFI.
items.abstract: We introduce Hardware-assisted Fault Isolation (HFI), a simple extension to existing processors to support secure, flexible, and efficient in-process isolation. HFI addresses the limitations of existing software-based isolation (SFI) systems including: runtime overheads, limited scalability, vulnerability to Spectre attacks, and limited compatibility with existing code. HFI can seamlessly integrate with current SFI systems (e.g., WebAssembly), or directly sandbox unmodified native binaries. To ease adoption, HFI relies only on incremental changes to the data and control path of existing high-performance processors. We evaluate HFI for x86-64 using the gem5 simulator and compiler-based emulation on a mix of real and synthetic workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 我们引入了硬件辅助故障隔离 (HFI)，这是对现有处理器的简单扩展，以支持安全、灵活且高效的进程内隔离。 HFI 解决了现有基于软件的隔离 (SFI) 系统的局限性，包括：运行时开销、有限的可扩展性、易受 Spectre 攻击以及与现有代码的有限兼容性。 HFI 可以与当前的 SFI 系统（例如 WebAssembly）无缝集成，或者直接将未修改的本机二进制文件沙箱化。为了便于采用，HFI 仅依赖于对现有高性能处理器的数据和控制路径进行增量更改。我们使用 gem5 模拟器和基于编译器的模拟，在真实和合成工作负载的混合上评估 x86-64 的 HFI。

items.title: PipeSynth: Automated Synthesis of Microarchitectural Axioms for Memory Consistency.
items.abstract:
Formal verification can help ensure the correctness of today’s processors. However, such formal verification requires formal specifications of the processors being verified. Today, these specifications are mostly written by hand, which is tedious and error-prone. Furthermore, architects and hardware engineers generally do not have formal methods experience, making it even harder for them to write formal specifications. Existing methods for the automated synthesis of formal microarchitectural specifications utilise RTL implementations of processors for their synthesis, preventing their usage until RTL implementation of the processor has completed. This hampers the effectiveness of formal verification for processors, as catching design bugs pre-RTL can reduce verification overhead and overall development time.

In response, we present PipeSynth, an automated formal methodology and tool for the synthesis of µspec microarchitectural ordering axioms from small example programs (litmus tests) and microarchitectural execution traces. PipeSynth helps architects automatically generate formal specifications for their microarchitectures before RTL is even written, enabling greater use of formal verification on today’s microarchitectures. We evaluate PipeSynth’s capability to synthesise single axioms and multiple axioms at the same time across four microarchitectures. Our evaluated microarchitectures include an out-of-order processor and one with a non-traditional coherence protocol. In single-axiom synthesis, PipeSynth is capable of synthesising replacement axioms for 42 out of 46 axioms from our evaluated microarchitectures in under 2 hours per axiom. When doing multi-axiom synthesis, we are able to synthesise an entire microarchitectural specification for the in-order Multi-V-scale processor in under 1 hour, and can synthesise at least 4 nontrivial axioms at the same time for our other microarchitectures.
items.abstract_zh:
形式验证可以帮助确保当今处理器的正确性。然而，这种形式验证需要被验证的处理器的正式规范。如今，这些规范大多是手工编写的，既繁琐又容易出错。此外，架构师和硬件工程师通常没有形式化方法经验，这使得他们更难编写形式化规范。用于自动综合正式微架构规范的现有方法利用处理器的 RTL 实现来进行综合，从而在处理器的 RTL 实现完成之前阻止它们的使用。这会影响处理器形式验证的有效性，因为在 RTL 之前捕获设计错误可以减少验证开销和总体开发时间。

作为回应，我们提出了 PipeSynth，一种自动化的形式化方法和工具，用于从小示例程序（石蕊测试）和微架构执行跟踪中综合 µspec 微架构排序公理。 PipeSynth 可以帮助架构师在编写 RTL 之前自动为其微架构生成正式规范，从而能够在当今的微架构上更多地使用形式验证。我们评估 PipeSynth 在四种微架构中同时综合单个公理和多个公理的能力。我们评估的微架构包括一个无序处理器和一个具有非传统一致性协议的处理器。在单公理合成中，PipeSynth 能够在每个公理 2 小时内从我们评估的微架构中合成 46 个公理中的 42 个的替换公理。在进行多公理综合时，我们能够在 1 小时内综合有序 Multi-V-scale 处理器的整个微架构规范，并且可以同时为我们的其他微架构综合至少 4 个重要的公理。

items.title: Accelerating Sparse Data Orchestration via Dynamic Reflexive Tiling.
items.abstract:
Tensor algebra involving multiple sparse operands is severely memory bound, making it a challenging target for acceleration. Furthermore, irregular sparsity complicates traditional techniques—such as tiling—for ameliorating memory bottlenecks. Prior sparse tiling schemes are sparsity unaware: they carve tensors into uniform coordinate-space shapes, which leads to low-occupancy tiles and thus lower exploitable reuse. To address these challenges, this paper proposes dynamic reflexive tiling (DRT), a novel tiling method that improves data reuse over prior art for sparse tensor kernels, unlocking significant performance improvement opportunities. DRT’s key idea is dynamic sparsity-aware tiling. DRT continuously re-tiles sparse tensors at runtime based on the current sparsity of the active regions of all input tensors , to maximize accelerator buffer utilization while retaining the ability to co-iterate through tiles of distinct tensors.

Through an extensive evaluation over a set of SuiteSparse matrices, we show how DRT can be applied to multiple prior accelerators with different dataflows (ExTensor, OuterSPACE, MatRaptor), improving their performance (by 3.3×, 5.1× and 1.6×, respectively) while adding negligible area overhead. We apply DRT to higher-order tensor kernels to reduce DRAM traffic by 3.9× and 16.9× over a CPU implementation and prior-art tiling scheme, respectively. Finally, we show that the technique is portable to software, with an improvement of 7.29× and 2.94× in memory overhead compared to untiled sparse-sparse matrix multiplication (SpMSpM).
items.abstract_zh:
涉及多个稀疏操作数的张量代数严重受内存限制，使其成为加速的一个具有挑战性的目标。此外，不规则的稀疏性使用于改善内存瓶颈的传统技术（例如平铺）变得复杂。先前的稀疏切片方案是稀疏性意识不到的：它们将张量雕刻成统一的坐标空间形状，这导致切片占用率低，从而降低了可利用的重用率。为了应对这些挑战，本文提出了动态自反平铺（DRT），这是一种新颖的平铺方法，与现有技术相比，可以改善稀疏张量内核的数据重用，从而释放显着的性能改进机会。 DRT 的关键思想是动态稀疏感知平铺。 DRT 在运行时根据所有输入张量的活动区域的当前稀疏性不断重新平铺稀疏张量，以最大限度地提高加速器缓冲区利用率，同时保留通过不同张量的平铺进行共同迭代的能力。

通过对一组 SuiteSparse 矩阵的广泛评估，我们展示了如何将 DRT 应用于具有不同数据流（ExTensor、OuterSPACE、MatRaptor）的多个现有加速器，提高其性能（分别提高 3.3 倍、5.1 倍和 1.6 倍），同时增加可忽略不计的面积开销。我们将 DRT 应用于高阶张量内核，与 CPU 实现和现有技术切片方案相比，分别将 DRAM 流量减少了 3.9 倍和 16.9 倍。最后，我们证明该技术可移植到软件中，与直到稀疏-稀疏矩阵乘法 (SpMSpM) 相比，内存开销分别提高了 7.29 倍和 2.94 倍。

items.title: Efficient Compactions between Storage Tiers with PrismDB.
items.abstract:
In recent years, emerging storage hardware technologies have focused on divergent goals: better performance or lower cost-per-bit. Correspondingly, data systems that employ these technologies are typically optimized either to be fast (but expensive) or cheap (but slow). We take a different approach: by architecting a storage engine to natively utilize two tiers of fast and low-cost storage technologies, we can achieve a Pareto efficient balance between performance and cost-per-bit.

This paper presents the design and implementation of PrismDB, a novel key-value store that exploits two extreme ends of the spectrum of modern NVMe storage technologies (3D XPoint and QLC NAND) simultaneously. Our key contribution is how to efficiently migrate and compact data between two different storage tiers. Inspired by the classic cost-benefit analysis of log cleaning, we develop a new algorithm for multi-tiered storage compaction that balances the benefit of reclaiming space for hot objects in fast storage with the cost of compaction I/O in slow storage. Compared to the standard use of RocksDB on flash in datacenters today, PrismDB’s average throughput on tiered storage is 3.3× faster, its read tail latency is 2× better, and it is 5× more durable using equivalently-priced hardware.
items.abstract_zh:
近年来，新兴的存储硬件技术专注于不同的目标：更好的性能或更低的每比特成本。相应地，采用这些技术的数据系统通常被优化为快速（但昂贵）或廉价（但缓慢）。我们采取不同的方法：通过构建存储引擎以本地利用两层快速且低成本的存储技术，我们可以在性能和每比特成本之间实现帕累托有效平衡。

本文介绍了 PrismDB 的设计和实现，这是一种新颖的键值存储，它同时利用现代 NVMe 存储技术的两个极端（3D XPoint 和 QLC NAND）。我们的主要贡献是如何在两个不同的存储层之间有效地迁移和压缩数据。受日志清理的经典成本效益分析的启发，我们开发了一种用于多层存储压缩的新算法，该算法平衡了快速存储中热对象回收空间的好处与慢速存储中压缩 I/O 的成本。与当今数据中心闪存上的 RocksDB 标准使用相比，PrismDB 在分层存储上的平均吞吐量快了 3.3 倍，读取尾部延迟低了 2 倍，使用同等价格的硬件时，其耐用性提高了 5 倍。

items.title: eHDL: Turning eBPF/XDP Programs into Hardware Designs for the NIC.
items.abstract: Scaling network packet processing performance to meet the increasing speed of network ports requires software programs to carefully leverage the network devices’ hardware features. This is a complex task for network programmers, who need to learn and deal with the heterogeneity of device architectures, and re-think their software to leverage them. In this paper we make first steps to reverse this design process, enabling the automatic generation of tailored hardware designs starting from a network packet processing program. We introduce eHDL, a high-level synthesis tool that automatically generates hardware pipelines from unmodified Linux’s eBPF/XDP programs. eHDL is designed to enable software developers to directly define and implement the hardware functions they need in the NIC. We prototype eHDL targeting a Xilinx Alveo U50 FPGA NIC, and evaluate it with a set of 5 eBPF/XDP programs. Our results show that the generated pipelines are efficient in terms of required hardware resources, using only 6.5%-13.3% of the FPGA, and always achieve the line rate forwarding throughput with about 1 microsecond of per-packet forwarding latency. Compared to other network-specific high-level synthesis tool, eHDL enables software programmers with no hardware expertise to describe stateful functions that operate on the entire packet data. Compared to alternative processor-based solutions that perform eBFP/XDP offloading to a NIC, eHDL provides 10-100x higher throughput.
items.abstract_zh: 扩展网络数据包处理性能以满足网络端口不断增长的速度需要软件程序仔细利用网络设备的硬件功能。对于网络程序员来说，这是一项复杂的任务，他们需要学习和处理设备架构的异构性，并重新考虑他们的软件来利用它们。在本文中，我们迈出了扭转这一设计过程的第一步，从而能够从网络数据包处理程序开始自动生成定制的硬件设计。我们介绍 eHDL，这是一种高级综合工具，可以从未经修改的 Linux 的 eBPF/XDP 程序自动生成硬件管道。 eHDL 旨在使软件开发人员能够直接定义和实现他们在 NIC 中所需的硬件功能。我们针对 Xilinx Alveo U50 FPGA NIC 设计了 ​​eHDL 原型，并使用一组 5 个 eBPF/XDP 程序对其进行评估。我们的结果表明，生成的管道在所需的硬件资源方面是高效的，仅使用 6.5%-13.3% 的 FPGA，并且始终以每包转发延迟约 1 微秒的方式实现线速转发吞吐量。与其他特定于网络的高级综合工具相比，eHDL 使没有硬件专业知识的软件程序员能够描述对整个数据包数据进行操作的状态函数。与执行 eBFP/XDP 卸载到 NIC 的替代基于处理器的解决方案相比，eHDL 提供了 10-100 倍的吞吐量。

items.title: Persistent Memory Disaggregation for Cloud-Native Relational Databases.
items.abstract:
The recent emergence of commodity persistent memory (PM) hardware has altered the landscape of the storage hierarchy. It brings multi-fold benefits to database systems, with its large capacity, low latency, byte addressability, and persistence. However, PM has not been incorporated into the popular disaggregated architecture of cloud-native databases.

In this paper, we present PilotDB, a cloud-native relational database designed to fully utilize disaggregated PM resources. PilotDB possesses a new disaggregated DB architecture that allows compute nodes to be computation-heavy yet data-light, as enabled by large buffer pools and fast data persistence offered by remote PMs. We then propose a suite of novel mechanisms to facilitate RDMA-friendly remote PM accesses and minimize operations involving CPUs on the computation-light PM nodes. In particular, PilotDB adopts a novel compute-node-driven log organization that reduces network/PM bandwidth consumption and a log-pull design that enables fast, optimistic remote PM reads aggressively bypassing the remote PM node CPUs. Evaluation with both standard SQL benchmarks and a real-world production workload demonstrates that PilotDB (1) achieves excellent performance as compared to the best-performing baseline using local, high-end resources, (2) significantly outperforms a state-of-the-art DRAM-disaggregation system and the PM-disaggregation solution adapted from it, (3) enables faster failure recovery and cache buffer warm-up, and (4) offers superior cost-effectiveness.
items.abstract_zh:
最近出现的商用持久内存 (PM) 硬件改变了存储层次结构的格局。它具有大容量、低延迟、字节可寻址性和持久性，为数据库系统带来了多重好处。然而，PM 尚未纳入流行的云原生数据库分类架构中。

在本文中，我们提出了 PilotDB，这是一个云原生关系数据库，旨在充分利用分散的 PM 资源。 PilotDB 拥有一种新的分解数据库架构，通过大型缓冲池和远程 PM 提供的快速数据持久性，允许计算节点计算量大而数据量少。然后，我们提出了一套新颖的机制来促进 RDMA 友好的远程 PM 访问，并最大限度地减少涉及轻计算 PM 节点上的 CPU 的操作。特别是，PilotDB 采用了一种新颖的计算节点驱动的日志组织，可减少网络/PM 带宽消耗，并采用日志拉取设计，可实现快速、乐观的远程 PM 读取，积极绕过远程 PM 节点 CPU。使用标准 SQL 基准测试和实际生产工作负载进行的评估表明，与使用本地高端资源的最佳性能基准相比，PilotDB (1) 实现了卓越的性能，(2) 显着优于最先进的 DRAM 分解系统和从中改编的 PM 分解解决方案，(3) 实现更快的故障恢复和缓存缓冲区预热，(4) 提供卓越的成本效益。

items.title: Disaggregated RAID Storage in Modern Datacenters.
items.abstract: RAID (Redundant Array of Independent Disks) has been widely adopted for decades, as it provides enhanced throughput and redundancy beyond what a single disk can offer. Today, enabled by fast datacenter networks, accessing remote block devices with acceptable overhead (i.e. disaggregated storage) becomes a reality (e.g., for serverless applications). Combining RAID with remote storage can provide the same benefits while creating better fault tolerance and flexibility than its monolithic counterparts. The key challenge of disaggregated RAID is to handle extra network traffic generated by RAID, which can consume a vast amount of NIC bandwidth. We present dRAID, a disaggregated RAID system that achieves near-optimal read and write throughput. dRAID exploits peer-to-peer disaggregated data access to reduce bandwidth consumption in both normal and degraded states. It employs non-blocking multi-stage writes to maximize inter-node parallelism, and applies pipelined I/O processing to maximize inter-device parallelism. We introduce bandwidth-aware reconstruction for better load balancing. We show that dRAID provides up to 3× bandwidth improvement. The results on a lightweight object store show that dRAID brings 1.5×-2.35× throughput improvement on various workloads.
items.abstract_zh: RAID（独立磁盘冗余阵列）已被广泛采用数十年，因为它提供了超出单个磁盘所能提供的增强吞吐量和冗余。如今，在快速数据中心网络的支持下，以可接受的开销（即分解存储）访问远程块设备已成为现实（例如，对于无服务器应用程序）。将 RAID 与远程存储相结合可以提供相同的优势，同时比单片存储具有更好的容错能力和灵活性。分解 RAID 的主要挑战是处理 RAID 生成的额外网络流量，这可能会消耗大量 NIC 带宽。我们推出 dRAID，这是一种分解的 RAID 系统，可实现接近最佳的读写吞吐量。 dRAID 利用点对点分类数据访问来减少正常和降级状态下的带宽消耗。它采用非阻塞多级写入来最大化节点间并行性，并应用流水线 I/O 处理来最大化设备间并行性。我们引入带宽感知重建以实现更好的负载平衡。我们证明 dRAID 提供高达 3 倍的带宽改进。轻量级对象存储上的结果表明，dRAID 为各种工作负载带来了 1.5×-2.35× 的吞吐量改进。

items.title: Homunculus: Auto-Generating Efficient Data-Plane ML Pipelines for Datacenter Networks.
items.abstract:
Support for Machine Learning (ML) applications in networking has significantly improved over the last decade. The availability of public datasets and programmable switching fabrics (including low-level languages to program them) presents a full-stack to the programmer for deploying in-network ML. However, the diversity of tools involved, coupled with complex optimization tasks of ML model design and hyperparameter tuning while complying with the network constraints (like throughput and latency), puts the onus on the network operator to be an expert in ML, network design, and programmable hardware.

We present Homunculus, a high-level framework that enables network operators to specify their ML requirements in a declarative rather than imperative way. Homunculus takes as input the training data and accompanying network and hardware constraints, and automatically generates and installs a suitable model onto the underlying switching target. It performs model design-space exploration, training, and platform code-generation as compiler stages, leaving network operators to focus on acquiring high-quality network data. Our evaluations on real-world ML applications show that Homunculus’s generated models achieve up to 12% better F1 scores compared to hand-tuned alternatives, while operating within the resource limits of the underlying targets. We further demonstrate the high performance and increased reactivity (seconds to nanoseconds) of the generated models on emerging per-packet ML platforms to showcase Homunculus’s timely and practical significance.
items.abstract_zh:
在过去十年中，对网络中机器学习 (ML) 应用程序的支持有了显着改善。公共数据集和可编程交换结构（包括对其进行编程的低级语言）的可用性为程序员提供了用于部署网络内 ML 的完整堆栈。然而，所涉及工具的多样性，加上机器学习模型设计和超参数调整的复杂优化任务，同时遵守网络约束（如吞吐量和延迟），使得网络运营商有责任成为机器学习、网络设计和可编程硬件方面的专家。

我们推出了 Homunculus，这是一个高级框架，使网络运营商能够以声明式而非命令式的方式指定其 ML 需求。 Homunculus 将训练数据以及伴随的网络和硬件约束作为输入，并自动生成合适的模型并将其安装到底层切换目标上。它将模型设计空间探索、训练和平台代码生成作为编译阶段，使网络运营商能够专注于获取高质量的网络数据。我们对现实世界 ML 应用程序的评估表明，与手动调整的替代方案相比，Homunculus 生成的模型的 F1 分数提高了 12%，同时在基础目标的资源限制内运行。我们进一步展示了在新兴的每数据包 ML 平台上生成的模型的高性能和更高的反应性（秒到纳秒），以展示 Homunculus 的及时性和实际意义。

items.title: SPLENDID: Supporting Parallel LLVM-IR Enhanced Natural Decompilation for Interactive Development.
items.abstract: Manually writing parallel programs is difficult and error-prone. Automatic parallelization could address this issue, but profitability can be limited by not having facts known only to the programmer. A parallelizing compiler that collaborates with the programmer can increase the coverage and performance of parallelization while reducing the errors and overhead associated with manual parallelization. Unlike collaboration involving analysis tools that report program properties or make parallelization suggestions to the programmer, decompiler-based collaboration could leverage the strength of existing parallelizing compilers to provide programmers with a natural compiler-parallelized starting point for further parallelization or refinement. Despite this potential, existing decompilers fail to do this because they do not generate portable parallel source code compatible with any compiler of the source language. This paper presents SPLENDID, an LLVM-IR to C/OpenMP decompiler that enables collaborative parallelization by producing standard parallel OpenMP code. Using published manual parallelization of the PolyBench benchmark suite as a reference, SPLENDID's collaborative approach produces programs twice as fast as either Polly-based automatic parallelization or manual parallelization alone. SPLENDID's portable parallel code is also more natural than that from existing decompilers, obtaining a 39x higher average BLEU score.
items.abstract_zh: 手动编写并行程序很困难并且容易出错。自动并行化可以解决这个问题，但是由于没有只有程序员知道的事实，盈利能力可能会受到限制。与程序员协作的并行编译器可以提高并行化的覆盖范围和性能，同时减少与手动并行化相关的错误和开销。与涉及报告程序属性或向程序员提出并行化建议的分析工具的协作不同，基于反编译器的协作可以利用现有并行化编译器的优势，为程序员提供一个自然的编译器并行化起点，以进一步并行化或细化。尽管有这种潜力，但现有的反编译器无法做到这一点，因为它们不能生成与源语言的任何编译器兼容的可移植并行源代码。本文介绍了 SPLENDID，这是一种 LLVM-IR 到 C/OpenMP 的反编译器，它通过生成标准并行 OpenMP 代码来实现协作并行化。使用已发布的 PolyBench 基准测试套件手动并行化作为参考，SPLENDID 的协作方法生成的程序速度是基于 Polly 的自动并行化或单独手动并行化的两倍。 SPLENDID 的可移植并行代码也比现有反编译器的代码更自然，获得的平均 BLEU 分数高出 39 倍。

items.title: ABNDP: Co-optimizing Data Access and Load Balance in Near-Data Processing.
items.abstract: Near-Data Processing (NDP) has been a promising architectural paradigm to address the memory wall challenge for data-intensive applications. Typical NDP systems based on 3D-stacked memories contain massive parallel processing units, each of which can access its local memory as well as other remote memory regions in the system. In such an architecture, minimizing remote data accesses and achieving computation load balance exhibit a fundamental tradeoff, where existing solutions can only improve one but sacrifice the other. We propose ABNDP, which leverages novel hardware-software co-optimizations to simultaneously alleviate these two issues without making tradeoffs. ABNDP uses a novel and efficient distributed DRAM cache to allow additional data caching locations in the system, where the computation load at the original data hotspots can be distributed and balanced, without significantly increasing remote accesses. ABNDP also adopts a hybrid task scheduling policy that considers both the remote access cost and the load imbalance impact, and exploits the flexibility of the multiple data caching locations to decide the best computation place. Our evaluation shows that ABNDP successfully achieves the two goals of minimizing remote access cost and maintaining load balance, and significantly outperforms the baseline systems in terms of both performance (1.7×) and energy consumption (25%).
items.abstract_zh: 近数据处理（NDP）是一种很有前途的架构范例，可以解决数据密集型应用程序的内存墙挑战。基于 3D 堆叠存储器的典型 NDP 系统包含大量并行处理单元，每个处理单元都可以访问其本地存储器以及系统中的其他远程存储器区域。在这样的架构中，最小化远程数据访问和实现计算负载平衡表现出一种基本的权衡，现有的解决方案只能改进一个而牺牲另一个。我们提出 ABNDP，它利用新颖的硬件-软件协同优化来同时缓解这两个问题，而无需进行权衡。 ABNDP使用新颖且高效的分布式DRAM缓存来允许系统中额外的数据缓存位置，其中原始数据热点处的计算负载可以被分布和平衡，而不会显着增加远程访问。 ABNDP还采用混合任务调度策略，同时考虑远程访问成本和负载不平衡的影响，并利用多个数据缓存位置的灵活性来决定最佳计算位置。我们的评估表明，ABNDP 成功实现了最小化远程访问成本和保持负载平衡的两个目标，并且在性能（1.7 倍）和能耗（25%）方面均显着优于基准系统。

items.title: Skybox: Open-Source Graphic Rendering on Programmable RISC-V GPUs.
items.abstract: Graphics rendering remains one of the most compute intensive and memory bound applications of GPUs and has been driving their push for performance and energy efficiency since its inception. Early GPU architectures focused only on accelerating graphics rendering and implemented dedicated fixed- function rasterizer hardware to speed-up their rendering pipeline. As GPUs have become more programmable and ubiquitous in other application domains such as scientific computing, machine learning, graph analytics, and crypto-currency, generalizing GPU microarchitectures for area and power efficiency becomes necessary, especially for mobile and IoT devices. In this work, we present Skybox, a full-stack open-source GPU architecture with integrated software, compiler, hardware, and simulation environment, that enables end-to-end GPU research. Using Skybox, we explore the design space of software versus hardware graphics rendering and propose and hybrid micro-architecture that accelerates the state-of-the art Vulkan graphics API. Skybox also introduces novel compiler and system optimizations to support its unique RISC-V ISA baseline. We evaluated Skybox on high- end Altera and also Xilinx FPGAs. We were able to generate and execute a 32 cores (512 threads) Skybox graphics processor on Altera Stratix 10 FPGA, delivering a peak fill rate of 3.7 GPixels at 230 MHz. Skybox is the first open-source full-stack GPU software and hardware implementation that supports the Vulkan API
items.abstract_zh: 图形渲染仍然是 GPU 计算最密集、内存最密集的应用程序之一，并且自诞生以来一直在推动其性能和能源效率的发展。早期的 GPU 架构仅专注于加速图形渲染，并实施专用的固定功能光栅器硬件来加速其渲染管道。随着 GPU 在科学计算、机器学习、图形分析和加密货币等其他应用领域变得更加可编程和普遍，通用化 GPU 微架构以提高面积和功率效率变得必要，特别是对于移动和物联网设备。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Skybox，这是一种全栈开源 GPU 架构，具有集成的软件、编译器、硬件和模拟环境，可实现端到端 GPU 研究。使用 Skybox，我们探索软件与硬件图形渲染的设计空间，并提出加速最先进的 Vulkan 图形 API 的混合微架构。 Skybox 还引入了新颖的编译器和系统优化，以支持其独特的 RISC-V ISA 基准。我们在高端 Altera 和 Xilinx FPGA 上评估了 Skybox。我们能够在 Altera Stratix 10 FPGA 上生成并执行 32 核（512 线程）Skybox 图形处理器，在 230 MHz 下提供 3.7 GPixels 的峰值填充率。 Skybox是第一个支持Vulkan API的开源全栈GPU软件和硬件实现

items.title: RepCut: Superlinear Parallel RTL Simulation with Replication-Aided Partitioning.
items.abstract:
Register transfer level (RTL) simulation is an invaluable tool for developing, debugging, verifying, and validating hardware designs. Despite the parallel nature of hardware, existing parallel RTL simulators yield speedups unattractive for practical application due to high communication and synchronization costs incurred by typical circuit topologies.

We present RepCut, a novel parallel RTL simulation methodology. RepCut is enabled by our replication-aided partitioning approach that cuts the circuit into balanced partitions with small overlaps. By replicating the overlaps, RepCut eliminates problematic data dependences between partitions and significantly reduces expensive synchronization overhead between parallel threads. RepCut outperforms state-of-the-art simulators, and when simulating a large system-on-chip with multiple out-of-order cores, it achieves a 27.10× speedup (superlinear) using 24 threads with only a 3.81% replication cost.
items.abstract_zh:
寄存器传输级 (RTL) 仿真是开发、调试、验证和确认硬件设计的宝贵工具。尽管硬件具有并行特性，但由于典型电路拓扑导致的高通信和同步成本，现有的并行 RTL 仿真器产生的加速对于实际应用来说缺乏吸引力。

我们提出了 RepCut，一种新颖的并行 RTL 仿真方法。 RepCut 通过我们的复制辅助分区方法实现，该方法将电路切割成具有小重叠的平衡分区。通过复制重叠，RepCut 消除了分区之间有问题的数据依赖性，并显着减少了并行线程之间昂贵的同步开销。 RepCut 的性能优于最先进的模拟器，在模拟具有多个乱序内核的大型片上系统时，它使用 24 个线程实现了 27.10 倍的加速（超线性），而复制成本仅为 3.81%。

items.title: Infinity Stream: Portable and Programmer-Friendly In-/Near-Memory Fusion.
items.abstract:
In-memory computing with large last-level caches is promising to dramatically alleviate data movement bottlenecks and expose massive bitline-level parallelization opportunities.
