However, key challenges from its unique execution model remain unsolved: automated parallelization, transparently orchestrating data transposition/alignment/broadcast for bit-serial logic, and mixing in-/near-memory computing. Most importantly, the solution should be programmer friendly and portable across platforms.

Our key innovation is an execution model and intermediate representation (IR) that enables hybrid CPU-core, in-memory, and near-memory processing. Our IR is the tensor dataflow graph (tDFG), which is a unified representation of in-memory and near-memory computation. The tDFG exposes tensor-data structure information so that the hardware and runtime can automatically orchestrate data management for bitserial execution, including runtime data layout transformations. To enable microarchitecture portability, we use a two-phase, JIT-based compilation approach to dynamically lower the the tDFG to in-memory commands.

Our design, infinity stream, is evaluated on a cycle-accurate simulator. Across data-processing workloads with fp32, it achieves 2.6× speedup and 75% traffic reduction over a state-of-the-art near-memory computing technique, with 2.4× energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh:
具有大型末级缓存的内存计算有望显着缓解数据移动瓶颈并提供大量位行级并行化机会。然而，其独特执行模型带来的关键挑战仍未解决：自动并行化、透明地编排位串行逻辑的数据转置/对齐/广播，以及混合内存内/近内存计算。最重要的是，该解决方案应该是程序员友好的并且可以跨平台移植。

我们的关键创新是执行模型和中间表示 (IR)，可实现混合 CPU 核心、内存中和近内存处理。我们的IR是张量数据流图（tDFG），它是内存中和近内存计算的统一表示。 tDFG 公开张量数据结构信息，以便硬件和运行时可以自动编排位串行执行的数据管理，包括运行时数据布局转换。为了实现微架构的可移植性，我们使用基于 JIT 的两阶段编译方法来动态地将 tDFG 降低为内存中命令。

我们的无限流设计在周期精确的模拟器上进行了评估。在使用 fp32 的数据处理工作负载中，与最先进的近内存计算技术相比，它实现了 2.6 倍的加速和 75% 的流量减少，能源效率提高了 2.4 倍。

items.title: NosWalker: A Decoupled Architecture for Out-of-Core Random Walk Processing.
items.abstract:
Out-of-core random walk system has recently attracted a lot of attention as an economical way to run billions of walkers over large graphs. However, existing out-of-core random walk systems are all built upon general out-of-core graph processing frameworks, and hence do not take advantage of the unique properties of random walk applications. Different from traditional graph analysis algorithms, the sampling process of random walk can be decoupled from the processing of the walkers. It enables the system to reserve only pre-sample results in memory, which are typically much smaller than the entire edge set. Moreover, in random walk, it is not the number of walkers but the number of steps moved per second that dominates the overall performance. Thus, with independent walkers, there is no need to process all the walkers simultaneously.

In this paper, we present NosWalker, an out-of-core random walk system that replaces the graph oriented scheduling with a decoupled system architecture that provides walker oriented scheduling. NosWalker is able to adaptively generate walkers and flexibly adjust the distribution of reserved pre-sample results in memory. Instead of processing all the walkers at once, NosWalker only tries its best to keep a few walkers able to continuously move forward. Experimental results show that NosWalker can achieve up to two orders of magnitude speedup compared to state-of-the-art out-of-core random walk systems. In particular, NosWalker demonstrates superior performance when the memory capacity can only hold about 10%-50% of the graph data, which can be a common case when the user needs to run billions of walkers over large graphs.
items.abstract_zh:
核外随机游走系统作为在大图上运行数十亿游走者的一种经济方式最近引起了广泛关注。然而，现有的核外随机游走系统都是基于通用核外图处理框架构建的，因此没有利用随机游走应用程序的独特属性。与传统的图分析算法不同，随机游走的采样过程可以与游走者的处理解耦。它使系统能够仅在内存中保留预采样结果，这些结果通常比整个边缘集小得多。此外，在随机游走中，主导整体性能的不是游走者的数量，而是每秒移动的步数。因此，对于独立的步行器，无需同时处理所有步行器。

在本文中，我们提出了 NosWalker，一种核外随机游走系统，它用提供面向游走者调度的解耦系统架构取代了面向图的调度。 NosWalker能够自适应地生成walker，并灵活调整内存中保留的预样本结果的分布。 NosWalker 不会一次性处理所有步行者，而是尽力让少数步行者能够持续前进。实验结果表明，与最先进的核外随机游走系统相比，NosWalker 可以实现高达两个数量级的加速。特别是，当内存容量只能容纳大约 10%-50% 的图数据时，NosWalker 表现出了优越的性能，这是用户需要在大型图上运行数十亿个 Walker 的常见情况。

items.title: Cohort: Software-Oriented Acceleration for Heterogeneous SoCs.
items.abstract:
Philosophically, our approaches to acceleration focus on the extreme. We must optimise accelerators to the maximum, leaving software to fix any hardware-software mismatches. Today’s software abstractions for programming accelerators leak hardware details, requiring changes to data formats and manual memory and coherence management, among other issues. This harms generality and requires deep hardware knowledge to efficiently program accelerators, a state which we consider hardware-oriented.

This paper proposes Software-Oriented Acceleration (SOA), where software uses existing abstractions, like software shared-memory queues, to interact with accelerators. We introduce the Cohort engine which exploits these queues’ standard semantics to efficiently connect producers and consumers in software with accelerators with minimal application changes. Accelerators are even usable in chains which can be runtime reconfigured by software. Cohort significantly reduces the burden to add new accelerators while maintaining system-level guarantees. We implement a Cohort FPGA prototype which supports SOA applications running on multicore Linux. Our evaluation shows speedups for Cohort over traditional approaches ranging from 1.83× to 8.38× over MMIO, and from 1.69× to 11.24× for DMA baselines. Our software-oriented batching optimisations within Cohort also improve performance from 2.32× to 8.10×, demonstrating the power of SOA.
items.abstract_zh:
从哲学上讲，我们的加速方法侧重于极端。我们必须最大限度地优化加速器，让软件来修复任何硬件-软件不匹配的问题。当今编程加速器的软件抽象会泄露硬件细节，需要更改数据格式以及手动内存和一致性管理等问题。这损害了通用性，并且需要深厚的硬件知识来有效地对加速器进行编程，我们认为这种状态是面向硬件的。

本文提出了面向软件的加速（SOA），其中软件使用现有的抽象（例如软件共享内存队列）来与加速器交互。我们引入了队列引擎，它利用这些队列的标准语义，通过加速器有效地连接软件中的生产者和消费者，并且只需最少的应用程序更改。加速器甚至可以在链中使用，可以通过软件在运行时重新配置。 Cohort 显着减轻了添加新加速器的负担，同时保持系统级保证。我们实现了一个 Cohort FPGA 原型，它支持在多核 Linux 上运行的 SOA 应用程序。我们的评估显示，与传统方法相比，Cohort 的加速范围为 MMIO 的 1.83 倍到 8.38 倍，以及 DMA 基线的 1.69 倍到 11.24 倍。我们在 Cohort 中面向软件的批处理优化也将性能从 2.32 倍提高到 8.10 倍，展示了 SOA 的强大功能。

items.title: Snape: Reliable and Low-Cost Computing with Mixture of Spot and On-Demand VMs.
items.abstract: Cloud providers often have resources that are not being fully utilized, and they may offer them at a lower cost to make up for the reduced availability of these resources. However, customers may be hesitant to use such offerings (such as spot VMs) as making trade-offs between cost and resource availability is not always straightforward. In this work, we propose Snape (Spot On-demand Perfect Mixture), an intelligent framework to optimize the cost and resource availability by dynamically mixing on-demand VMs with spot VMs. Through a detailed characterization based on real production traces, we verify that the eviction of spot VMs is predictable to some extent. Snape also leverages constrained reinforcement learning to adjust the mixture policy online. Experiments across different configurations show that Snape achieves 44% savings compared to using only on-demand VMs while maintaining 99.96% availability, which is 2.77% higher than using only spot VMs.
items.abstract_zh: 云提供商通常拥有未充分利用的资源，他们可能会以较低的成本提供这些资源，以弥补这些资源可用性的降低。然而，客户可能会犹豫是否使用此类产品（例如现货虚拟机），因为在成本和资源可用性之间进行权衡并不总是那么简单。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Snape（Spot On-demand Perfect Mixture），这是一个智能框架，通过动态地将按需虚拟机与现货虚拟机混合来优化成本和资源可用性。通过基于实际生产轨迹的详细表征，我们验证了现货虚拟机的驱逐在某种程度上是可预测的。 Snape 还利用约束强化学习来在线调整混合策略。不同配置的实验表明，与仅使用按需虚拟机相比，Snape 节省了 44%，同时保持了 99.96% 的可用性，比仅使用现货虚拟机高了 2.77%。

items.title: Exit-Less, Isolated, and Shared Access for Virtual Machines.
items.abstract: This paper explores Exit-Less, Isolated, and Shared Access (ELISA), a novel in-memory object sharing scheme for Virtual Machines (VMs). ELISA has the isolation advantage over the shared memory directly exposed to guest VMs while its overhead is smaller than that of host-interposition relying on the costly exit from the VM context. In a nutshell, ELISA isolates shared in-memory objects by Extended Page Table (EPT) separation, and a guest VM accesses them by switching the EPT context using VMFUNC, a low-overhead CPU instruction of Intel CPUs. Our experiment shows that the overhead of ELISA is 3.5 times smaller than that of VMCALL-oriented host-interposition. We demonstrate the benefits of ELISA through two use cases; by replacing VMCALL with ELISA, a VM networking system and an in-memory key-value store exhibit 163% and 64% higher performance respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 本文探讨了无退出、隔离和共享访问 (ELISA)，这是一种新颖的虚拟机 (VM) 内存中对象共享方案。与直接暴露给来宾虚拟机的共享内存相比，ELISA 具有隔离优势，同时其开销小于依赖于从虚拟机上下文退出的主机插入的开销。简而言之，ELISA 通过扩展页表 (EPT) 分离来隔离内存中的共享对象，并且来宾 VM 通过使用 VMFUNC（Intel CPU 的低开销 CPU 指令）切换 EPT 上下文来访问它们。我们的实验表明，ELISA 的开销比面向 VMCALL 的主机干预小 3.5 倍。我们通过两个用例展示了 ELISA 的优势；通过用 ELISA 替换 VMCALL，VM 网络系统和内存中键值存储的性能分别提高了 163% 和 64%。

items.title: SparseTIR: Composable Abstractions for Sparse Compilation in Deep Learning.
items.abstract: Sparse tensors are rapidly becoming critical components of modern deep learning workloads. However, developing high-performance sparse operators can be difficult and tedious, and existing vendor libraries cannot satisfy the escalating demands from new operators. Sparse tensor compilers simplify the development of operators, but efficient sparse compilation for deep learning remains challenging because a single sparse format cannot maximize hardware efficiency, and single-shot compilers cannot keep up with latest hardware and system advances. In this paper, we observe that the key to addressing both these challenges is to leverage composable formats and composable transformations. We propose SparseTIR, a sparse tensor compilation abstraction that offers composable formats and composable transformations for deep learning workloads. SparseTIR constructs a search space over these composable components for performance tuning. With these improvements, SparseTIR obtains consistent performance speedups vs vendor libraries on GPUs for single operators: 1.20-2.34x for GNN operators, 1.05-2.98x for sparse attention operators, and 0.56-7.45x for sparse convolution operators. SparseTIR also accelerates end-to-end GNNs by 1.08-1.52x for GraphSAGE training, and 4.20-40.18x for RGCN inference.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏张量正在迅速成为现代深度学习工作负载的关键组成部分。然而，开发高性能稀疏算子可能既困难又乏味，而且现有的供应商库无法满足新算子不断增长的需求。稀疏张量编译器简化了算子的开发，但深度学习的高效稀疏编译仍然具有挑战性，因为单一稀疏格式无法最大限度地提高硬件效率，并且单次编译器无法跟上最新的硬件和系统进步。在本文中，我们发现解决这两个挑战的关键是利用可组合格式和可组合转换。我们提出了 SparseTIR，这是一种稀疏张量编译抽象，可为深度学习工作负载提供可组合格式和可组合转换。 SparseTIR 在这些可组合组件上构建搜索空间以进行性能调整。通过这些改进，与 GPU 上的供应商库相比，SparseTIR 对于单个算子获得了一致的性能加速：GNN 算子为 1.20-2.34 倍，稀疏注意力算子为 1.05-2.98 倍，稀疏卷积算子为 0.56-7.45 倍。 SparseTIR 还将 GraphSAGE 训练的端到端 GNN 加速了 1.08-1.52 倍，将 RGCN 推理加速了 4.20-40.18 倍。

items.title: GRACE: A Scalable Graph-Based Approach to Accelerating Recommendation Model Inference.
items.abstract: The high memory bandwidth demand of sparse embedding layers continues to be a critical challenge in scaling the performance of recommendation models. While prior works have exploited heterogeneous memory system designs and partial embedding sum memoization techniques, they offer limited benefits. This is because prior designs either target a very small subset of embeddings to simplify their analysis or incur a high processing cost to account for all embeddings, which does not scale with the large sizes of modern embedding tables. This paper proposes GRACE-a lightweight and scalable graph-based algorithm-system co-design framework to significantly improve the embedding layer performance of recommendation models. GRACE proposes a novel Item Co-occurrence Graph (ICG) that scalably records item co-occurrences. GRACE then presents a new system-aware ICG clustering algorithm to find frequently accessed item combinations of arbitrary lengths to compute and memoize their partial sums. High-frequency partial sums are stored in a software-managed cache space to reduce memory traffic and improve the throughput of computing sparse features. We further present a cache data layout and low-cost address computation logic to efficiently lookup item embeddings and their partial sums. Our evaluation shows that GRACE significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art techniques SPACE and MERCI by 1.5x and 1.4x, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏嵌入层的高内存带宽需求仍然是扩展推荐模型性能的关键挑战。虽然先前的工作已经利用了异构存储系统设计和部分嵌入和记忆技术，但它们提供的好处有限。这是因为先前的设计要么针对非常小的嵌入子集来简化分析，要么会产生很高的处理成本来考虑所有嵌入，而这无法随着现代嵌入表的大尺寸进行扩展。本文提出了GRACE——一种轻量级、可扩展的基于图的算法系统协同设计框架，以显着提高推荐模型的嵌入层性能。 GRACE 提出了一种新颖的项目共现图（ICG），可扩展地记录项目共现。然后，GRACE 提出了一种新的系统感知 ICG 聚类算法，用于查找频繁访问的任意长度的项目组合，以计算和记忆它们的部分和。高频部分和存储在软件管理的缓存空间中，以减少内存流量并提高计算稀疏特征的吞吐量。我们进一步提出了缓存数据布局和低成本地址计算逻辑，以有效地查找项目嵌入及其部分和。我们的评估表明，GRACE 的性能明显优于最先进的技术 SPACE 和 MERCI，分别高出 1.5 倍和 1.4 倍。

items.title: LEGO: Empowering Chip-Level Functionality Plug-and-Play for Next-Generation IoT Devices.
items.abstract: Versatile Internet of Things (IoT) applications call for re-configurable IoT devices that can easily extend new functionality on demand. However, the heterogeneity of functional chips brings difficulties in device customization, leading to inadequate flexibility. In this paper, we propose LEGO, a novel architecture for chip-level re-configurable IoT devices that supports plug-and-play with Commercial Off-The-Shelf (COTS) chips. To combat the heterogeneity of functional chips, we first design a novel Unified Chip Description Language (UCDL) with meta-operation and chip specifications to access various types of functional chips uniformly. Then, to achieve chips plug-and-play, we build up a novel platform and shift all chip control logic to the gateway, which makes IoT devices entirely decoupled from specific applications and does not need to make any changes when plugging in new functional chips. Finally, to handle communications overheads, we built up a novel orchestration architecture for gateway instructions, which minimizes instruction transmission frequency in remote chip control. We implement the prototype and conduct extensive evaluations with 100+ types of COTS functional chips. The results show that new functional chips can be automatically accessed by the system within 0.13 seconds after being plugged in, and only bringing 0.53 kb of communication load on average, demonstrating the efficacy of LEGO design.
items.abstract_zh: 多功能物联网 (IoT) 应用需要可重新配置的物联网设备，这些设备可以根据需要轻松扩展新功能。然而，功能芯片的异构性给设备定制带来了困难，导致灵活性不足。在本文中，我们提出了 LEGO，这是一种用于芯片级可重新配置物联网设备的新型架构，支持与商用现成 (COTS) 芯片的即插即用。为了解决功能芯片的异构性，我们首先设计了一种新颖的统一芯片描述语言（UCDL），具有元操作和芯片规范，可以统一访问各种类型的功能芯片。然后，为了实现芯片的即插即用，我们建立了一个新颖的平台，将所有芯片控制逻辑转移到网关，这使得物联网设备与特定应用完全解耦，在插入新的功能芯片时不需要做任何改变。最后，为了处理通信开销，我们建立了一种新颖的网关指令编排架构，最大限度地减少了远程芯片控制中的指令传输频率。我们使用 100 多种 COTS 功能芯片实现了原型并进行了广泛的评估。结果表明，新功能芯片在插入后0.13秒内即可被系统自动访问，平均仅带来0.53 kb的通信负载，展示了乐高设计的功效。

items.title: Occamy: Elastically Sharing a SIMD Co-processor across Multiple CPU Cores.
items.abstract: SIMD extensions are widely adopted in multi-core processors to exploit data-level parallelism. However, when co-running workloads on different cores, compute-intensive workloads cannot take advantage of the underutilized SIMD lanes allocated to memoryintensive workloads, reducing the overall performance. This paper proposes Occamy, a SIMD co-processor that can be shared by multiple CPU cores, so that their co-running workloads can spatially share its SIMD lanes. The key idea is to enable elastic spatial sharing by dynamically partitioning all the SIMD lanes across different workloads based on their phase behaviors, so that each workload may execute in variable-length SIMD mode. We also introduce an Occamy compiler to support such variable-length vectorization by analyzing such phase behaviors and generating the vectorized code that works with varying vector lengths. We demonstrate that Occamy can improve SIMD utilization, and consequently, performance over three representative SIMD architectures, with negligible chip area cost.
items.abstract_zh: SIMD 扩展在多核处理器中被广泛采用，以利用数据级并行性。然而，当在不同内核上共同运行工作负载时，计算密集型工作负载无法利用分配给内存密​​集型工作负载的未充分利用的 SIMD 通道，从而降低了整体性能。本文提出了 Occamy，一种可以由多个 CPU 内核共享的 SIMD 协处理器，以便它们共同运行的工作负载可以在空间上共享其 SIMD 通道。关键思想是根据不同工作负载的阶段行为动态划分所有 SIMD 通道，从而实现弹性空间共享，以便每个工作负载可以在可变长度 SIMD 模式下执行。我们还引入了 Occamy 编译器，通过分析此类相位行为并生成适用于不同矢量长度的矢量化代码来支持此类可变长度矢量化。我们证明 Occamy 可以提高 SIMD 利用率，从而提高三种代表性 SIMD 架构的性能，而芯片面积成本可以忽略不计。

items.title: Untangle: A Principled Framework to Design Low-Leakage, High-Performance Dynamic Partitioning Schemes.
items.abstract:
Partitioning a hardware structure dynamically among multiple security domains leaks some information but can deliver high performance. To understand the performance-security tradeoff of dynamic partitioning, it would be useful to formally quantify the leakage of these schemes. Unfortunately, this is hard, as what partition resizing decisions are made and when they are made are entangled.

In this paper, we present Untangle, a novel framework for constructing low-leakage and high-performance dynamic partitioning schemes. Untangle formally splits the leakage into leakage from deciding what resizing action to perform (action leakage) and leakage from deciding when the resizing action occurs (scheduling leakage). Based on this breakdown, Untangle introduces a set of principles that decouple program timing from the action leakage. Moreover, Untangle introduces a new way to model the scheduling leakage without analyzing program timing. With these techniques, Untangle quantifies the leakage in a dynamic resizing scheme more tightly than prior work. To demonstrate Untangle, we apply it to dynamically partition the last-level cache. On average, workloads leak 78% less under Untangle than under a conventional dynamic partitioning approach, for the same workload performance.
items.abstract_zh:
在多个安全域之间动态划分硬件结构会泄露一些信息，但可以提供高性能。为了理解动态分区的性能与安全权衡，正式量化这些方案的泄漏将很有用。不幸的是，这很困难，因为分区调整大小的决定是什么以及何时做出这些决定是纠缠在一起的。

在本文中，我们提出了 Untangle，一种用于构建低泄漏和高性能动态分区方案的新颖框架。 Untangle 正式将泄漏分为决定执行什么调整大小操作的泄漏（操作泄漏）和决定何时发生调整大小操作的泄漏（调度泄漏）。基于这种分解，Untangle 引入了一组将程序时序与动作泄漏分离的原则。此外，Untangle 引入了一种新方法来对调度泄漏进行建模，而无需分析程序时序。通过这些技术，Untangle 比之前的工作更严格地量化了动态大小调整方案中的泄漏。为了演示 Untangle，我们应用它来动态分区最后一级缓存。平均而言，在相同的工作负载性能下，Untangle 下的工作负载泄漏比传统的动态分区方法减少了 78%。

items.title: Vidi: Record Replay for Reconfigurable Hardware.
items.abstract:
Developers are turning to heterogeneous computing devices, such as Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs), to accelerate data center and cloud computing workloads. FPGAs enable rapid prototyping and should facilitate an agile software-like development workflow to fix correctness bugs, performance issues, and security vulnerabilities. Unfortunately, hardware development still does not have a vast ecosystem of tools needed to support the agile hardware development vision. The capability to record and replay FPGA executions would constitute a key building block that will inspire the development of many tools, similar to what record/replay did for software. However, building a practical record/replay tool for FPGA is challenging; existing approaches either record too much or too little information and cannot support real-world executions.

In this paper, we present VIDI, the first record/replay system for real-world FPGA applications running on hardware. VIDI is based on the observation that widely-used communication protocols have well-defined input/output transactions to hide cycle-specific information from developers, which enables a more efficient design than heavyweight cycle-accurate record/replay approaches. VIDI proposes (1) the transaction determinism insight to track and enforce only necessary orderings of transaction events across record and replay, and (2) the coarse-grained input recording mechanism to record transaction-level information. We evaluate VIDI on Amazon EC2 F1 instances with 10 applications and two use cases (debugging, testing) and find that it incurs on average low performance slowdown (1.98%) and resource overhead (5.48%), making it practical for real-world deployments.
items.abstract_zh:
开发人员正在转向异构计算设备，例如现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA)，以加速数据中心和云计算工作负载。 FPGA 支持快速原型设计，并应促进敏捷的类似软件的开发工作流程，以修复正确性错误、性能问题和安全漏洞。不幸的是，硬件开发仍然没有支持敏捷硬件开发愿景所需的庞大工具生态系统。记录和重放 FPGA 执行的能力将构成一个关键构建块，它将激发许多工具的开发，类似于软件的记录/重放。然而，为 FPGA 构建实用的记录/回放工具具有挑战性；现有的方法要么记录太多或太少的信息，并且无法支持现实世界的执行。

在本文中，我们介绍了 VIDI，这是第一个用于在硬件上运行的实际 FPGA 应用程序的记录/重放系统。 VIDI 基于这样的观察：广泛使用的通信协议具有明确定义的输入/输出事务，可以向开发人员隐藏特定于周期的信息，从而实现比重量级周期精确记录/重放方法更有效的设计。 VIDI 提出 (1) 事务确定性见解，用于在记录和重放过程中跟踪和强制执行事务事件的必要排序，以及 (2) 粗粒度输入记录机制，用于记录事务级信息。我们使用 10 个应用程序和两个用例（调试、测试）对 Amazon EC2 F1 实例上的 VIDI 进行评估，发现它平均会产生较低的性能下降 (1.98%) 和资源开销 (5.48%)，使其适用于实际部署。

items.title: FreePart: Hardening Data Processing Software via Framework-based Partitioning and Isolation.
items.abstract:
Data processing oriented software, especially machine learning applications, are heavily dependent on standard frameworks/libraries such as TensorFlow and OpenCV. As those frameworks have gained significant popularity, the exploitation of vulnerabilities in the frameworks has become a critical security concern. While software isolation can minimize the impact of exploitation, existing approaches suffer from difficulty analyzing complex program dependencies or excessive overhead, making them ineffective in practice.

We propose FreePart, a framework-focused software partitioning technique specialized for data processing applications. It is based on an observation that the execution of a data processing application, including data flows and usage of critical data, is closely related to the invocations of framework APIs. Hence, we conduct a temporal partitioning of the host application's execution based on the invocations of framework APIs and the data objects used by the APIs. By focusing on data accesses at runtime instead of static program code, it provides effective and practical isolation from the perspective of data. Our evaluation on 23 applications using popular frameworks ( e.g. , OpenCV, Caffe, PyTorch, and TensorFlow) shows that FreePart is effective against all attacks composed of 18 real-world vulnerabilities with a low overhead (3.68%).
items.abstract_zh:
面向数据处理的软件，尤其是机器学习应用程序，严重依赖于 TensorFlow 和 OpenCV 等标准框架/库。随着这些框架的广泛流行，利用框架中的漏洞已成为一个关键的安全问题。虽然软件隔离可以最大限度地减少漏洞利用的影响，但现有方法难以分析复杂的程序依赖关系或过多的开销，导致它们在实践中无效。

我们提出了 FreePart，一种专门用于数据处理应用程序的以框架为中心的软件分区技术。基于这样的观察，数据处理应用程序的执行，包括数据流和关键数据的使用，与框架API的调用密切相关。因此，我们根据框架 API 的调用和 API 使用的数据对象对主机应用程序的执行进行时间分区。通过关注运行时的数据访问而不是静态程序代码，它从数据的角度提供了有效且实用的隔离。我们对使用流行框架（例如 OpenCV、Caffe、PyTorch 和 TensorFlow）的 23 个应用程序进行的评估表明，FreePart 可以有效抵御由 18 个现实世界漏洞组成的所有攻击，且开销较低 (3.68%)。

items.title: Veil: A Protected Services Framework for Confidential Virtual Machines.
items.abstract: Confidential virtual machines (CVMs) enabled by AMD SEV provide a protected environment for sensitive computations on an untrusted cloud. Unfortunately, CVMs are typically deployed with huge and vulnerable operating system kernels, exposing the CVMs to attacks that exploit kernel vulnerabilities. Veil is a versatile CVM framework that efficiently protects critical system services like shielding sensitive programs, which cannot be entrusted to the buggy kernel. Veil leverages a new hardware primitive, virtual machine privilege levels (VMPL), to install a privileged security monitor inside the CVM. We overcome several challenges in designing Veil, including (a) creating unlimited secure domains with a limited number of VMPLs, (b) establishing resource-efficient domain switches, and (c) maintaining commodity kernel backwards-compatibility with only minor changes. Our evaluation shows that Veil incurs no discernible performance slowdown during normal CVM execution while incurring a modest overhead (2 -- 64%) when running its protected services across real-world use cases.
items.abstract_zh: AMD SEV 支持的机密虚拟机 (CVM) 为不受信任的云上的敏感计算提供了受保护的环境。不幸的是，CVM 通常部署有庞大且易受攻击的操作系统内核，从而使 CVM 面临利用内核漏洞的攻击。 Veil 是一个多功能的 CVM 框架，可以有效地保护关键系统服务，例如屏蔽敏感程序，这些程序不能委托给有缺陷的内核。 Veil 利用新的硬件原语、虚拟机特权级别 (VMPL) 在 CVM 内安装特权安全监视器。我们克服了设计 Veil 时的几个挑战，包括 (a) 使用有限数量的 VMPL 创建无限的安全域，(b) 建立资源高效的域交换机，以及 (c) 只需进行微小的更改即可保持商品内核的向后兼容性。我们的评估表明，Veil 在正常 CVM 执行期间不会出现明显的性能下降，而在实际用例中运行受保护的服务时会产生适度的开销 (2 - 64%)。

items.title: Predict; Don't React for Enabling Efficient Fine-Grain DVFS in GPUs.
items.abstract:
With the continuous improvement of on-chip integrated voltage regulators (IVRs) and fast, adaptive frequency control, dynamic voltage-frequency scaling (DVFS) transition times have shrunk from the microsecond to the nanosecond regime, providing immense opportunity to improve energy efficiency. The key to unlocking the continued improvement in V/f circuit technology is the creation of new, smarter DVFS mechanisms that better adapt to rapid fluctuations in workload demand.

It is particularly important to optimize fine-grain DVFS mechanisms for graphics processing units (GPUs) as the chips become ever more important workhorses in the datacenter. However, GPU's massive amount of thread-level parallelism makes it uniquely difficult to determine the optimal V/f state at run-time. Existing solutions---mostly designed for single-threaded CPUs and longer time scales---fail to consider the seemingly chaotic, highly varying nature of GPU workloads at short time scales.

This paper proposes a novel prediction mechanism, PCSTALL, that is tailored for emerging DVFS capabilities in GPUs and achieves near-optimal energy efficiency. Using the insights from our fine-grained workload analysis, we propose a wavefront-level program counter (PC) based DVFS mechanism that improves program behavior prediction accuracy by 32% on average as compared to the best performing prior predictor for a wide set of GPU applications at 1μs DVFS time epochs. Compared to the current state-of-art, our PC-based technique achieves 19% average improvement when optimized for Energy-Delay 2 Product (ED 2 P) at 50μs time epochs, reaching 32% when operated with 1μs DVFS technologies.
items.abstract_zh:
随着片上集成电压调节器 (IVR) 和快速自适应频率控制的不断改进，动态电压频率缩放 (DVFS) 转换时间已从微秒缩短到纳秒，为提高能效提供了巨大的机会。实现 V/f 电路技术持续改进的关键是创建新的、更智能的 DVFS 机制，以更好地适应工作负载需求的快速波动。

随着芯片成为数据中心中越来越重要的主力，优化图形处理单元 (GPU) 的细粒度 DVFS 机制尤为重要。然而，GPU 的大量线程级并行性使得在运行时确定最佳 V/f 状态变得特别困难。现有的解决方案（主要是为单线程 CPU 和较长的时间尺度而设计）未能考虑短时间尺度下 GPU 工作负载看似混乱且高度变化的性质。

本文提出了一种新颖的预测机制 PCSTALL，该机制专为 GPU 中新兴的 DVFS 功能量身定制，并实现近乎最佳的能效。利用我们细粒度工作负载分析的见解，我们提出了一种基于波前级程序计数器 (PC) 的 DVFS 机制，与 1μs DVFS 时间周期内各种 GPU 应用程序的最佳性能先验预测器相比，该机制将程序行为预测准确度平均提高了 32%。与当前最先进的技术相比，我们基于 PC 的技术在针对 50μs 时间周期的能量延迟 2 产品 (ED 2 P) 进行优化时，平均提高了 19%，在使用 1μs DVFS 技术时达到 32%。

items.title: λFS: A Scalable and Elastic Distributed File System Metadata Service using Serverless Functions.
items.abstract:
The metadata service (MDS) sits on the critical path for distributed file system (DFS) operations, and therefore it is key to the overall performance of a large-scale DFS. Common "serverful" MDS architectures, such as a single server or cluster of servers, have a significant shortcoming: either they are not scalable, or they make it difficult to achieve an optimal balance of performance, resource utilization, and cost. A modern MDS requires a novel architecture that addresses this shortcoming.

To this end, we design and implement γFS, an elastic, high-performance metadata service for large-scale DFSes. γFS scales a DFS metadata cache elastically on a FaaS (Function-as-a-Service) platform and synthesizes a series of techniques to overcome the obstacles that are encountered when building large, stateful, and performance-sensitive applications on FaaS platforms. γFS takes full advantage of the unique benefits offered by FaaS---elastic scaling and massive parallelism---to realize a highly-optimized metadata service capable of sustaining up to 4.13X higher throughput, 90.40% lower latency, 85.99% lower cost, 3.33X better performance-per-cost, and better resource utilization and efficiency than a state-of-the-art DFS for an industrial workload.
items.abstract_zh:
元数据服务（MDS）位于分布式文件系统（DFS）操作的关键路径上，因此它是大规模DFS整体性能的关键。常见的“服务器型”MDS 架构（例如单个服务器或服务器集群）有一个显着的缺点：要么不可扩展，要么难以实现性能、资源利用率和成本的最佳平衡。现代 MDS 需要一种新颖的架构来解决这个缺点。

为此，我们设计并实现了γFS，一种用于大规模DFS的弹性、高性能元数据服务。 γFS在FaaS（功能即服务）平台上弹性扩展DFS元数据缓存，并综合了一系列技术来克服在FaaS平台上构建大型、有状态和性能敏感的应用程序时遇到的障碍。 γFS 充分利用 FaaS 提供的独特优势（弹性扩展和大规模并行性）来实现高度优化的元数据服务，与工业工作负载的最先进的 DFS 相比，能够维持高达 4.13 倍的吞吐量、降低 90.40% 的延迟、降低 85.99% 的成本、提高 3.33 倍的性能成本比以及更好的资源利用率和效率。

items.title: VarSaw: Application-tailored Measurement Error Mitigation for Variational Quantum Algorithms.
items.abstract:
For potential quantum advantage, Variational Quantum Algorithms (VQAs) need high accuracy beyond the capability of today's NISQ devices, and thus will benefit from error mitigation. In this work we are interested in mitigating measurement errors which occur during qubit measurements after circuit execution and tend to be the most error-prone operations, especially detrimental to VQAs. Prior work, JigSaw, has shown that measuring only small subsets of circuit qubits at a time and collecting results across all such `subset' circuits can reduce measurement errors. Then, running the entire (`global') original circuit and extracting the qubit-qubit measurement correlations can be used in conjunction with the subsets to construct a high-fidelity output distribution of the original circuit. Unfortunately, the execution cost of JigSaw scales polynomially in the number of qubits in the circuit, and when compounded by the number of circuits and iterations in VQAs, the resulting execution cost quickly turns insurmountable.

To combat this, we propose VarSaw, which improves JigSaw in an application-tailored manner, by identifying considerable redundancy in the JigSaw approach for VQAs: spatial redundancy across subsets from different VQA circuits and temporal redundancy across globals from different VQA iterations. VarSaw then eliminates these forms of redundancy by commuting the subset circuits and selectively executing the global circuits, reducing computational cost (in terms of the number of circuits executed) over naive JigSaw for VQA by 25x on average and up to 1000x, for the same VQA accuracy. Further, it can recover, on average, 45% of the infidelity from measurement errors in the noisy VQA baseline. Finally, it improves fidelity by 55%, on average, over JigSaw for a fixed computational budget. VarSaw can be accessed here: https://github.com/siddharthdangwal/VarSaw
items.abstract_zh:
为了获得潜在的量子优势，变分量子算法 (VQA) 需要超出当今 NISQ 设备能力的高精度，因此将受益于错误缓解。在这项工作中，我们感兴趣的是减轻电路执行后量子位测量期间发生的测量错误，这些错误往往是最容易出错的操作，特别是对 VQA 不利。 JigSaw 之前的工作表明，一次仅测量电路量子位的一小部分子集并收集所有此类“子集”电路的结果可以减少测量误差。然后，运行整个（“全局”）原始电路并提取量子位-量子位测量相关性可以与子集结合使用，以构造原始电路的高保真输出分布。不幸的是，JigSaw 的执行成本与电路中的量子位数量成多项式缩放，当与 VQA 中的电路和迭代数量复合时，所产生的执行成本很快变得难以克服。

为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 VarSaw，它通过识别 VQA 的 JigSaw 方法中的相当大的冗余，以应用程序定制的方式改进了 JigSaw：来自不同 VQA 电路的子集之间的空间冗余，以及来自不同 VQA 迭代的全局变量之间的时间冗余。然后，VarSaw 通过交换子集电路并选择性地执行全局电路来消除这些形式的冗余，在相同的 VQA 精度下，VQA 的计算成本（就执行的电路数量而言）比简单的 JigSaw 平均降低了 25 倍，最高可达 1000 倍。此外，它平均可以从噪声 VQA 基线中的测量误差中恢复 45% 的不忠。最后，在固定计算预算的情况下，与 JigSaw 相比，它的保真度平均提高了 55%。 VarSaw 可以在这里访问：https://github.com/siddharthdangwal/VarSaw

items.title: Explainable-DSE: An Agile and Explainable Exploration of Efficient HW/SW Codesigns of Deep Learning Accelerators Using Bottleneck Analysis.
items.abstract: Effective design space exploration (DSE) is paramount for hardware/software codesigns of deep learning accelerators that must meet strict execution constraints. For their vast search space, existing DSE techniques can require excessive trials to obtain a valid and efficient solution because they rely on black-box explorations that do not reason about design inefficiencies. In this paper, we propose Explainable-DSE - a framework for the DSE of accelerator codesigns using bottleneck analysis. By leveraging information about execution costs from bottleneck models, our DSE is able to identify bottlenecks and reason about design inefficiencies, thereby making bottleneck-mitigating acquisitions in further explorations. We describe the construction of bottleneck models for DNN accelerators. We also propose an API for expressing domain-specific bottleneck models and interfacing them with the DSE framework. Acquisitions of our DSE systematically cater to multiple bottlenecks that arise in executions of multi-functional workloads or multiple workloads with diverse execution characteristics. Evaluations for recent computer vision and language models show that Explainable-DSE mostly explores effectual candidates, achieving codesigns of 6X lower latency in 47X fewer iterations vs. non-explainable DSEs using evolutionary or ML-based optimizations. By taking minutes or tens of iterations, it enables opportunities for runtime DSEs.
items.abstract_zh: 有效的设计空间探索 (DSE) 对于必须满足严格执行约束的深度学习加速器的硬件/软件协同设计至关重要。对于巨大的搜索空间，现有的 DSE 技术可能需要大量的试验才能获得有效且高效的解决方案，因为它们依赖于黑盒探索，而不会推理设计效率低下。在本文中，我们提出了Explainable-DSE——一种使用瓶颈分析的加速器协同设计的DSE框架。通过利用瓶颈模型中有关执行成本的信息，我们的 DSE 能够识别瓶颈并解释设计效率低下的原因，从而在进一步的探索中进行缓解瓶颈的收购。我们描述了 DNN 加速器瓶颈模型的构建。我们还提出了一个 API，用于表达特定领域的瓶颈模型并将其与 DSE 框架连接。我们的 DSE 的收购系统地解决了多功能工作负载或具有不同执行特性的多个工作负载执行中出现的多个瓶颈。对最近计算机视觉和语言模型的评估表明，可解释的 DSE 主要探索有效的候选者，与使用进化或基于 ML 的优化的不可解释的 DSE 相比，在 47 倍的迭代次数中实现了 6 倍低延迟的协同设计。通过几分钟或数十次迭代，它为运行时 DSE 提供了机会。

items.title: Manticore: Hardware-Accelerated RTL Simulation with Static Bulk-Synchronous Parallelism.
items.abstract:
The demise of Moore's Law and Dennard Scaling has revived interest in specialized computer architectures and accelerators. Verification and testing of this hardware depend heavily upon cycle-accurate simulation of register-transfer-level (RTL) designs. The fastest software RTL simulators can simulate designs at 1--1000 kHz, i.e., more than three orders of magnitude slower than hardware. Improved simulators can increase designers' productivity by speeding design iterations and permitting more exhaustive exploration.

One possibility is to exploit low-level parallelism, as RTL expresses considerable fine-grain concurrency. Unfortunately, state-of-the-art RTL simulators often perform best on a single core since modern processors cannot effectively exploit fine-grain parallelism.

This work presents Manticore : a parallel computer designed to accelerate RTL simulation. Manticore uses a static bulk-synchronous parallel (BSP) execution model to eliminate fine-grain synchronization overhead. It relies entirely on a compiler to schedule resources and communication, which is feasible since RTL code contains few divergent execution paths. With static scheduling, communication and synchronization no longer incur runtime overhead, making fine-grain parallelism practical. Moreover, static scheduling dramatically simplifies processor implementation, significantly increasing the number of cores that fit on a chip. Our 225-core FPGA implementation running at 475 MHz outperforms a state-of-the-art RTL simulator running on desktop and server computers in 8 out of 9 benchmarks.
items.abstract_zh:
摩尔定律和登纳德缩放比例的消亡重新燃起了人们对专用计算机架构和加速器的兴趣。该硬件的验证和测试在很大程度上取决于寄存器传输级 (RTL) 设计的周期精确仿真。最快的软件 RTL 仿真器可以以 1--1000 kHz 的频率仿真设计，即比硬件慢三个数量级以上。改进的模拟器可以通过加速设计迭代并允许更详尽的探索来提高设计人员的生产力。

一种可能性是利用低级并行性，因为 RTL 表达了相当大的细粒度并发性。不幸的是，最先进的 RTL 模拟器通常在单核上表现最佳，因为现代处理器无法有效利用细粒度并行性。

这项工作提出了 Manticore：一种旨在加速 RTL 仿真的并行计算机。 Manticore 使用静态批量同步并行 (BSP) 执行模型来消除细粒度同步开销。它完全依赖编译器来调度资源和通信，这是可行的，因为 RTL 代码包含很少的不同执行路径。通过静态调度，通信和同步不再产生运行时开销，从而使细粒度并行性变得实用。此外，静态调度极大地简化了处理器的实现，显着增加了芯片上的内核数量。我们以 475 MHz 运行的 225 核 FPGA 实现在 9 项基准测试中有 8 项优于在台式机和服务器计算机上运行的最先进的 RTL 模拟器。

items.title: Sleuth: A Trace-Based Root Cause Analysis System for Large-Scale Microservices with Graph Neural Networks.
items.abstract:
Cloud microservices are being scaled up due to the rising demand for new features and the convenience of cloud-native technologies. However, the growing scale of microservices complicates the remote procedure call (RPC) dependency graph, exacerbates the tail-of-scale effect, and makes many of the empirical rules for detecting the root cause of end-to-end performance issues unreliable. Additionally, existing open-source microservice benchmarks are too small to evaluate performance debugging algorithms at a production-scale with hundreds or even thousands of services and RPCs.

To address these challenges, we present Sleuth, a trace-based root cause analysis (RCA) system for large-scale microservices using un-supervised graph learning. Sleuth leverages a graph neural network to capture the causal impact of each span in a trace, and trace clustering using a trace distance metric to reduce the amount of traces required for root cause localization. A pre-trained Sleuth model can be transferred to different microservice applications without any retraining or with few-shot fine-tuning. To quantitatively evaluate the performance and scalability of Sleuth, we propose a method to generate microservice benchmarks comparable to a production-scale. The experiments on the existing benchmark suites and synthetic large-scale microservices indicate that Sleuth has significantly outperformed the prior work in detection accuracy, performance, and adaptability on a large-scale deployment.
items.abstract_zh:
由于对新功能的需求不断增长以及云原生技术的便利性，云微服务正在不断扩大。然而，微服务规模的不断增长使远程过程调用（RPC）依赖图变得复杂，加剧了规模尾效应，并使许多用于检测端到端性能问题根本原因的经验规则变得不可靠。此外，现有的开源微服务基准测试太小，无法在具有数百甚至数千个服务和 RPC 的生产规模上评估性能调试算法。

为了应对这些挑战，我们推出了 Sleuth，这是一种基于跟踪的根本原因分析 (RCA) 系统，用于使用无监督图学习的大规模微服务。 Sleuth 利用图神经网络来捕获跟踪中每个跨度的因果影响，并使用跟踪距离度量进行跟踪聚类，以减少根本原因定位所需的跟踪量。预先训练的 Sleuth 模型可以转移到不同的微服务应用程序，而无需任何重新训练或几次微调。为了定量评估 Sleuth 的性能和可扩展性，我们提出了一种生成与生产规模相当的微服务基准的方法。在现有基准套件和合成大规模微服务上的实验表明，Sleuth 在大规模部署的检测精度、性能和适应性方面显着优于先前的工作。

items.title: Supporting Descendants in SIMD-Accelerated JSONPath.
items.abstract: Harnessing the power of SIMD can bring tremendous performance gains in data processing. In querying streamed JSON data, the state of the art leverages SIMD to fast forward significant portions of the document. However, it does not provide support for descendant, which excludes many real-life queries and makes formulating many others hard. In this work, we aim to change this: we consider the fragment of JSONPath that supports child, descendant, wildcard, and labels. We propose a modular approach based on novel depth-stack automata that process a stream of events produced by a state-driven classifier, allowing fast forwarding parts of the input document irrelevant at the current stage of the computation. We implement our solution in Rust and compare it with the state of the art, confirming that our approach allows supporting descendants without sacrificing performance, and that reformulating natural queries using descendants brings impressive performance gains in many cases.
items.abstract_zh: 利用 SIMD 的强大功能可以在数据处理方面带来巨大的性能提升。在查询流式 JSON 数据时，最先进的技术利用 SIMD 快进文档的重要部分。然而，它不提供对后代的支持，这排除了许多现实生活中的查询，并使制定许多其他查询变得困难。在这项工作中，我们的目标是改变这一点：我们考虑支持子代、后代、通配符和标签的 JSONPath 片段。我们提出了一种基于新型深度堆栈自动机的模块化方法，该方法处理由状态驱动分类器产生的事件流，允许快速转发与当前计算阶段不相关的输入文档部分。我们在 Rust 中实现了我们的解决方案，并将其与最先进的技术进行比较，确认我们的方法允许在不牺牲性能的情况下支持后代，并且使用后代重新制定自然查询在许多情况下带来了令人印象深刻的性能提升。

items.title: BaCO: A Fast and Portable Bayesian Compiler Optimization Framework.
items.abstract: We introduce the Bayesian Compiler Optimization framework (BaCO), a general purpose autotuner for modern compilers targeting CPUs, GPUs, and FPGAs. BaCO provides the flexibility needed to handle the requirements of modern autotuning tasks. Particularly, it deals with permutation, ordered, and continuous parameter types along with both known and unknown parameter constraints. To reason about these parameter types and efficiently deliver high-quality code, BaCO uses Bayesian optimization algorithms specialized towards the autotuning domain. We demonstrate BaCO's effectiveness on three modern compiler systems: TACO, RISE & ELEVATE, and HPVM2FPGA for CPUs, GPUs, and FPGAs respectively. For these domains, BaCO outperforms current state-of-the-art auto-tuners by delivering on average 1.36X--1.56X faster code with a tiny search budget, and BaCO is able to reach expert-level performance 2.9X--3.9X faster.
items.abstract_zh: 我们介绍贝叶斯编译器优化框架 (BaCO)，这是一个通用自动调节器，适用于针对 CPU、GPU 和 FPGA 的现代编译器。 BaCO 提供了处理现代自动调整任务要求所需的灵活性。特别是，它处理排列、有序和连续参数类型以及已知和未知参数约束。为了推理这些参数类型并高效地交付高质量代码，BaCO 使用专门针对自动调整领域的贝叶斯优化算法。我们展示了 BaCO 在三种现代编译器系统上的有效性：TACO、RISE & ELEVATE 以及分别针对 CPU、GPU 和 FPGA 的 HPVM2FPGA。对于这些领域，BaCO 通过以极小的搜索预算提供平均 1.36 倍--1.56 倍的更快代码，从而超越当前最先进的自动调谐器，并且 BaCO 能够以更快 2.9 倍--3.9 倍的速度达到专家级性能。

items.title: Exploiting the Regular Structure of Modern Quantum Architectures for Compiling and Optimizing Programs with Permutable Operators.
items.abstract: A critical feature in today's quantum circuit is that they have permutable two-qubit operators. The flexibility in ordering the permutable two-qubit gates leads to more compiler optimization opportunities. However, it also imposes significant challenges due to the additional degree of freedom. Our Contributions are two-fold. We first propose a general methodology that can find structured solutions for scalable quantum hardware. It breaks down the complex compilation problem into two sub-problems that can be solved at small scale. Second, we show how such a structured method can be adapted to practical cases that handle sparsity of the input problem graphs and the noise variability in real hardware. Our evaluation evaluates our method on IBM and Google architecture coupling graphs for up to 1,024 qubits and demonstrate better result in both depth and gate count - by up to 72% reduction in depth, and 66% reduction in gate count. Our real experiments on IBM Mumbai show that we can find better expected minimal energy than the state-of-the-art baseline.
items.abstract_zh: 当今量子电路的一个关键特征是它们具有可置换的两个量子位运算符。排序可置换的两个量子位门的灵活性带来了更多编译器优化机会。然而，由于额外的自由度，它也带来了重大挑战。我们的贡献是双重的。我们首先提出了一种通用方法，可以为可扩展的量子硬件找到结构化解决方案。它将复杂的编译问题分解为两个可以小规模解决的子问题。其次，我们展示了如何将这种结构化方法应用于处理输入问题图的稀疏性和实际硬件中的噪声变化的实际案例。我们的评估在最多 1,024 个量子位的 IBM 和 Google 架构耦合图上评估了我们的方法，并在深度和门数方面展示了更好的结果 - 深度减少了 72%，门数减少了 66%。我们在 IBM Mumbai 上进行的真实实验表明，我们可以找到比最先进的基线更好的预期最小能量。

items.title: DREAM: A Dynamic Scheduler for Dynamic Real-time Multi-model ML Workloads.
items.abstract: Emerging real-time multi-model ML (RTMM) workloads such as AR/VR and drone control involve dynamic behaviors in various granularity; task, model, and layers within a model. Such dynamic behaviors introduce new challenges to the system software in an ML system since the overall system load is not completely predictable, unlike traditional ML workloads. In addition, RTMM workloads require real-time processing, involve highly heterogeneous models, and target resource-constrained devices. Under such circumstances, developing an effective scheduler gains more importance to better utilize underlying hardware considering the unique characteristics of RTMM workloads. Therefore, we propose a new scheduler, DREAM, which effectively handles various dynamicity in RTMM workloads targeting multi-accelerator systems. DREAM quantifies the unique requirements for RTMM workloads and utilizes the quantified scores to drive scheduling decisions, considering the current system load and other inference jobs on different models and input frames. DREAM utilizes tunable parameters that provide fast and effective adaptivity to dynamic workload changes. In our evaluation of five scenarios of RTMM workload, DREAM reduces the overall UXCosT, which is an equivalent metric of the energy-delay product (EDP) for RTMM defined in the paper, by 32.2% and 50.0% in the geometric mean (up to 80.8% and 97.6%) compared to state-of-the-art baselines, which shows the efficacy of our scheduling methodology.
items.abstract_zh: AR/VR 和无人机控制等新兴实时多模型 ML (RTMM) 工作负载涉及各种粒度的动态行为；任务、模型和模型中的层。这种动态行为给机器学习系统中的系统软件带来了新的挑战，因为与传统机器学习工作负载不同，整个系统负载并不完全可预测。此外，RTMM工作负载需要实时处理，涉及高度异构的模型，并且目标是资源受限的设备。在这种情况下，考虑到 RTMM 工作负载的独特特征，开发有效的调度程序对于更好地利用底层硬件变得更加重要。因此，我们提出了一种新的调度程序 DREAM，它可以有效地处理针对多加速器系统的 RTMM 工作负载中的各种动态性。 DREAM 量化了 RTMM 工作负载的独特要求，并利用量化的分数来推动调度决策，同时考虑当前系统负载以及不同模型和输入帧上的其他推理作业。 DREAM 利用可调参数，可以快速有效地适应动态工作负载变化。在我们对 RTMM 工作负载的五种场景的评估中，与最先进的基线相比，DREAM 将整体 UXCosT（论文中定义的 RTMM 能量延迟乘积 (EDP) 的等效指标）的几何平均值降低了 32.2% 和 50.0%（高达 80.8% 和 97.6%），这显示了我们的调度方法的有效性。

items.title: LightRidge: An End-to-end Agile Design Framework for Diffractive Optical Neural Networks.
items.abstract: To lower the barrier to diffractive optical neural networks (DONNs) design, exploration, and deployment, we propose LightRidge , the first end-to-end optical ML compilation framework, which consists of ( 1 ) precise and differentiable optical physics kernels that enable complete explorations of DONNs architectures, ( 2 ) optical physics computation kernel acceleration that significantly reduces the runtime cost in training, emulation, and deployment of DONNs, and ( 3 ) versatile and flexible optical system modeling and user-friendly domain-specific-language (DSL). As a result, LightRidge framework enables efficient end-to-end design and deployment of DONNs, and significantly reduces the efforts for programming, hardware-software codesign, and chip integration. Our results are experimentally conducted with physical optical systems, where we demonstrate: ( 1 ) the optical physics kernels precisely correlated to low-level physics and systems, ( 2 ) significant speedups in runtime with physics-aware emulation workloads compared to the state-of-the-art commercial system, ( 3 ) effective architectural design space exploration verified by the hardware prototype and on-chip integration case study, and ( 4 ) novel DONN design principles including successful demonstrations of advanced image classification and image segmentation task using DONNs architecture and topology.
items.abstract_zh: 为了降低衍射光学神经网络 (DONN) 设计、探索和部署的障碍，我们提出了 LightRidge，这是第一个端到端光学 ML 编译框架，它由 (1) 精确且可微分的光学物理内核组成，可实现 DONN 架构的完整探索；(2) 光学物理计算内核加速，可显着降低 DONN 训练、仿真和部署的运行时成本；(3) 多功能且灵活的光学系统建模和用户友好的领域特定语言（DSL）。因此，LightRidge 框架能够实现 DONN 的高效端到端设计和部署，并显着减少编程、软硬件协同设计和芯片集成的工作量。我们的结果是通过物理光学系统进行实验进行的，我们证明：（1）光学物理内核与低级物理和系统精确相关，（2）与最先进的商业系统相比，物理感知仿真工作负载在运行时显着加速，（3）通过硬件原型和片上集成案例研究验证了有效的架构设计空间探索，以及（4）新颖的DONN设计原理，包括使用DONN成功演示高级图像分类和图像分割任务架构和拓扑。

items.title: ShapleyIQ: Influence Quantification by Shapley Values for Performance Debugging of Microservices.
items.abstract:
Years of experience in operating large-scale microservice systems strengthens our belief that their individual components, with inevitable anomalies, still demand a quantification of the influences on the end-to-end performance indicators. On a causal graph that represents the complex dependencies between the system components, the scatteredly detected anomalies, even when they look similar, could have different implications with contrastive remedial actions. To this end, we design ShapleyIQ , an online monitoring and diagnosis service that can effectively improve the system stability. It is guided by rigorous analysis on Shapley values for a causal graph. Notably, a new property on splitting invariance addresses the challenging exponential computation complexity problem of generic Shapley values by decomposition.

This service has been deployed on a core infrastructure system on Alibaba Cloud, for over a year with more than 15,000 operations for 86 services across 2,546 machines. Since then, it has drastically improved the DevOps efficiency, and the system failures have been significantly reduced by 83.3%. We also conduct an offline evaluation on an open source microservice system TrainTicket, which is to pinpoint the root causes of the performance issues in hindsight. Extensive experiments and test cases show that our system can achieve 97.3% accuracy in identifying the top-1 root causes for these datasets, which significantly outperforms baseline algorithms by at least 28.7% in absolute difference.
items.abstract_zh:
多年运营大型微服务系统的经验使我们更加坚信，其各个组件不可避免地会出现异常，仍然需要量化对端到端性能指标的影响。在表示系统组件之间复杂依赖关系的因果图上，分散检测到的异常即使看起来相似，也可能对对比性补救措施产生不同的影响。为此，我们设计了ShapleyIQ，一种可以有效提高系统稳定性的在线监控和诊断服务。它以对因果图的 Shapley 值的严格分析为指导。值得注意的是，分裂不变性的新属性通过分解解决了通用 Shapley 值的挑战性指数计算复杂性问题。

该服务已部署在阿里云核心基础设施系统上，一年多来，2546台机器上的86个服务超过15000次操作。此后，DevOps 效率大幅提升，系统故障显着减少 83.3%。我们还对开源微服务系统TrainTicket进行了离线评估，以事后找出性能问题的根本原因。大量的实验和测试用例表明，我们的系统在识别这些数据集的前 1 个根本原因方面可以达到 97.3% 的准确度，这在绝对差异方面明显优于基线算法至少 28.7%。

items.title: DataFlower: Exploiting the Data-flow Paradigm for Serverless Workflow Orchestration.
items.abstract:
Serverless computing that runs functions with auto-scaling is a popular task execution pattern in the cloud-native era. By connecting serverless functions into workflows, tenants can achieve complex functionality. Prior research adopts the control-flow paradigm to orchestrate a serverless workflow. However, the control-flow paradigm inherently results in long response latency, due to the heavy data persistence overhead, sequential resource usage, and late function triggering.

Our investigation shows that the data-flow paradigm has the potential to resolve the above problems, with careful design and optimization. We propose DataFlower, a scheme that achieves the data-flow paradigm for serverless workflows. In DataFlower, a container is abstracted to be a function logic unit and a data logic unit. The function logic unit runs the functions, and the data logic unit handles the data transmission asynchronously. Moreover, a host-container collaborative communication mechanism is used to support efficient data transfer. Our experimental results show that compared to state-of-the-art serverless designs, DataFlower reduces the 99%-ile latency of the benchmarks by up to 35.4%, and improves the peak throughput by up to 3.8X.
items.abstract_zh:
以自动伸缩方式运行函数的无服务器计算是云原生时代流行的任务执行模式。通过将无服务器功能连接到工作流程中，租户可以实现复杂的功能。先前的研究采用控制流范例来编排无服务器工作流程。然而，由于大量的数据持久性开销、顺序资源使用和延迟函数触发，控制流范例本质上会导致较长的响应延迟。

我们的研究表明，通过仔细的设计和优化，数据流范式有可能解决上述问题。我们提出了 DataFlower，这是一种实现无服务器工作流程的数据流范例的方案。在DataFlower中，容器被抽象为功能逻辑单元和数据逻辑单元。功能逻辑单元运行功能，数据逻辑单元异步处理数据传输。此外，采用主机-容器协作通信机制来支持高效的数据传输。我们的实验结果表明，与最先进的无服务器设计相比，DataFlower 将基准测试的 99%-ile 延迟降低了 35.4%，并将峰值吞吐量提高了 3.8 倍。

items.title: CPS: A Cooperative Para-virtualized Scheduling Framework for Manycore Machines.
items.abstract:
Today's cloud platforms offer large virtual machine (VM) instances with multiple virtual CPUs (vCPU) on manycore machines. These machines typically have a deep memory hierarchy to enhance communication between cores. Although previous researches have primarily focused on addressing the performance scalability issues caused by the double scheduling problem in virtualized environments, they mainly concentrated on solving the preemption problem of synchronization primitives and the traditional NUMA architecture. This paper specifically targets a new aspect of scalability issues caused by the absence of runtime hypervisor-internal states (RHS). We demonstrate two typical RHS problems, namely the invisible pCPU (physical CPU) load and dynamic cache group mapping. These RHS problems result in a collapse in VM performance and low CPU utilization because the guest VM lacks visibility into the latest runtime internal states maintained by the hypervisor, such as pCPU load and vCPU-pCPU mappings. Consequently, the guest VM makes inefficient scheduling decisions.

To address the RHS issue, we argue that the solution lies in exposing the latest scheduling decisions made by both the guest and host schedulers to each other. Hence, we present a cooperative para-virtualized scheduling framework called CPS, which facilitates the proactive exchange of timely scheduling information between the hypervisor and guest VMs. To ensure effective scheduling decisions for VMs, a series of techniques are proposed based on the exchanged information. We have implemented CPS in Linux KVM and have designed corresponding solutions to tackle the two RHS problems. Evaluation results demonstrate that CPS significantly improves the performance of PARSEC by 81.1% and FxMark by 1.01x on average for the two identified problems.
items.abstract_zh:
当今的云平台在多核计算机上提供具有多个虚拟 CPU (vCPU) 的大型虚拟机 (VM) 实例。这些机器通常具有深层内存层次结构，以增强内核之间的通信。虽然之前的研究主要集中在解决虚拟化环境中双重调度问题引起的性能可扩展性问题，但主要集中在解决同步原语和传统NUMA架构的抢占问题。本文专门针对由于缺乏运行时管理程序内部状态 (RHS) 而导致的可扩展性问题的新方面。我们演示了两个典型的 RHS 问题，即不可见的 pCPU（物理 CPU）负载和动态缓存组映射。这些 RHS 问题会导致 VM 性能崩溃和 CPU 利用率低，因为来宾 VM 缺乏对虚拟机管理程序维护的最新运行时内部状态（例如 pCPU 负载和 vCPU-pCPU 映射）的可见性。因此，来宾虚拟机做出低效的调度决策。

为了解决 RHS 问题，我们认为解决方案在于向对方公开来宾和主机调度程序做出的最新调度决策。因此，我们提出了一种称为 CPS 的协作式半虚拟化调度框架，它有助于虚拟机管理程序和来宾虚拟机之间主动交换及时的调度信息。为了确保虚拟机的有效调度决策，基于交换的信息提出了一系列技术。我们在Linux KVM中实现了CPS，并设计了相应的解决方案来解决这两个RHS问题。评估结果表明，对于两个已识别的问题，CPS 将 PARSEC 的性能平均显着提高了 81.1%，将 FxMark 的性能平均提高了 1.01 倍。

items.title: FITS: Inferring Intermediate Taint Sources for Effective Vulnerability Analysis of IoT Device Firmware.
items.abstract:
Finding vulnerabilities in firmware is vital as any firmware vulnerability may lead to cyberattacks to the physical IoT devices. Taint analysis is one promising technique for finding firmware vulnerabilities thanks to its high coverage and scalability. However, sizable closed-source firmware makes it extremely difficult to analyze the complete data-flow paths from taint sources ( i.e. , interface library functions such as recv) to sinks.

We observe that certain custom functions in binaries can be used as intermediate taint sources (ITSs). Compared to interface library functions, using custom functions as taint sources can significantly shorten the data-flow paths for analysis. However, inferring ITSs is challenging due to the complexity and customization of firmware. Moreover, the debugging information and symbol table of binaries in firmware are stripped; therefore, prior techniques of inferring taint sources are not applicable except laborious manual analysis. To this end, this paper proposes FITS to automatically infer ITSs. Specifically, FITS represents each function with a novel behavioral feature representation that captures the static and dynamic properties of the function, and ranks custom functions as taint sources through behavioral clustering and similarity scoring.

We evaluated FITS on 59 large, real-world firmware samples. The inference results of FITS are accurate: at least one of top-3 ranked custom functions can be used as an ITS with 89% precision. ITSs helped Karonte find 15 more bugs and helped the static taint engine find 339 more bugs. More importantly, 21 bugs have been awarded CVE IDs and rated high severity with media coverage.
items.abstract_zh:
查找固件中的漏洞至关重要，因为任何固件漏洞都可能导致对物理物联网设备的网络攻击。由于其高覆盖率和可扩展性，污点分析是一种很有前途的查找固件漏洞的技术。然而，相当大的闭源固件使得分析从污点源（即接口库函数，如recv）到接收器的完整数据流路径变得极其困难。

我们观察到二进制文件中的某些自定义函数可以用作中间污染源（ITS）。与接口库函数相比，使用自定义函数作为污点源可以显着缩短分析的数据流路径。然而，由于固件的复杂性和定制性，推断 ITS 具有挑战性。此外，固件中的二进制调试信息和符号表被剥离；因此，除了费力的手动分析之外，现有的推断污染源的技术不适用。为此，本文提出 FITS 来自动推断 ITS。具体来说，FITS 使用新颖的行为特征表示来表示每个函数，该表示捕获函数的静态和动态属性，并通过行为聚类和相似性评分将自定义函数列为污点源。

我们在 59 个大型真实固件样本上评估了 FITS。 FITS 的推理结果准确：排名前 3 的自定义函数中至少有一个可以用作 ITS，精度为 89%。 ITS 帮助 Karonte 发现了另外 15 个错误，并帮助静态污点引擎发现了另外 339 个错误。更重要的是，21 个错误已被授予 CVE ID，并被媒体报道评为高严重性。

items.title: HIR: An MLIR-based Intermediate Representation for Hardware Accelerator Description.
items.abstract:
The emergence of machine learning, image and audio processing on edge devices has motivated research towards power-efficient custom hardware accelerators. Though FPGAs are an ideal target for custom accelerators, the difficulty of hardware design and the lack of vendor agnostic, standardized hardware compilation infrastructure has hindered their adoption.

This paper introduces HIR, an MLIR-based intermediate representation (IR) and a compiler to design hardware accelerators for affine workloads. HIR replaces the traditional datapath + FSM representation of hardware with datapath + schedules. We implement a compiler that automatically synthesizes the finite-state-machine (FSM) from the schedule description. The IR also provides high-level language features, such as loops and multi-dimensional tensors. The combination of explicit schedules and high-level language abstractions allow HIR to express synchronization-free, fine-grained parallelism, as well as high-level optimizations such as loop pipelining and overlapped execution of multiple kernels.

Built as a dialect in MLIR, it draws from best IR practices learnt from communities like those of LLVM. While offering rich optimization opportunities and a high-level abstraction, the IR enables sharing of optimizations, utilities and passes with software compiler infrastructure. Our evaluation shows that the generated hardware design is comparable in performance and resource usage with Vitis HLS. We believe that such a common hardware compilation pipeline can help accelerate the research in language design for hardware description.
items.abstract_zh:
边缘设备上机器学习、图像和音频处理的出现推动了对高能效定制硬件加速器的研究。尽管 FPGA 是定制加速器的理想目标，但硬件设计的难度以及缺乏与供应商无关的标准化硬件编译基础设施阻碍了其采用。

本文介绍了 HIR、一种基于 MLIR 的中间表示 (IR) 和一个编译器，用于为仿射工作负载设计硬件加速器。 HIR 用数据路径+调度取代了传统的数据路径+FSM 硬件表示。我们实现了一个编译器，可以根据调度描述自动合成有限状态机（FSM）。 IR 还提供高级语言功能，例如循环和多维张量。显式调度和高级语言抽象的结合使 HIR 能够表达无同步、细粒度并行性以及高级优化，例如循环流水线和多个内核的重叠执行。

它作为 MLIR 的方言构建，借鉴了从 LLVM 等社区学到的最佳 IR 实践。在提供丰富的优化机会和高级抽象的同时，IR 还可以与软件编译器基础设施共享优化、实用程序和通道。我们的评估表明，生成的硬件设计在性能和资源使用方面与 Vitis HLS 相当。我们相信，这样一个通用的硬件编译管道可以帮助加速硬件描述语言设计的研究。

items.title: MiniMalloc: A Lightweight Memory Allocator for Hardware-Accelerated Machine Learning.
items.abstract: We present a new approach to static memory allocation , a key problem that arises in the compilation of machine learning models onto the resources of a specialized hardware accelerator. Our methodology involves a recursive depth-first search that limits exploration to a special class of canonical solutions, dramatically reducing the size of the search space. We also develop a spatial inference technique that exploits this special structure by pruning unpromising partial assignments and backtracking more effectively than otherwise possible. Finally, we introduce a new mechanism capable of detecting and eliminating dominated solutions from consideration. Empirical results demonstrate orders of magnitude improvement in performance as compared to the previous state-of-the-art on many benchmarks, as well as a substantial reduction in library size.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的静态内存分配方法，这是将机器学习模型编译到专用硬件加速器的资源上时出现的关键问题。我们的方法涉及递归深度优先搜索，将探索限制为一类特殊的规范解决方案，从而大大减小了搜索空间的大小。我们还开发了一种空间推理技术，通过修剪无希望的部分分配和比其他方式更有效的回溯来利用这种特殊结构。最后，我们引入了一种新机制，能够检测并消除考虑中的主导解决方案。实证结果表明，在许多基准测试中，与之前最先进的技术相比，性能有了数量级的提高，并且库大小也大幅减小。

items.title: RECom: A Compiler Approach to Accelerating Recommendation Model Inference with Massive Embedding Columns.
items.abstract: Embedding columns are important for deep recommendation models to achieve high accuracy, but they can be very time-consuming during inference. Machine learning (ML) compilers are used broadly in real businesses to optimize ML models automatically. Unfortunately, no existing work uses compilers to automatically accelerate the heavy embedding column computations during recommendation model inferences. To fill this gap, we propose RECom, the first ML compiler that aims at optimizing the massive embedding columns in recommendation models on the GPU. RECom addresses three major challenges. First, generating an efficient schedule on the GPU for the massive operators within embedding columns is difficult. Existing solutions usually lead to numerous small kernels and also lack inter-subgraph parallelism. We adopt a novel codegen strategy that fuses massive embedding columns into a single kernel and maps each column into a separate thread block on the GPU. Second, the complex shape computations under dynamic shape scenarios impede further graph optimizations. We develop a symbolic expression-based module to reconstruct all shape computations. Third, ML frameworks inevitably introduce redundant computations due to robustness considerations. We develop a subgraph optimization module that performs graph-level simplifications based on the entire embedding column context. Experiments on both in-house and open-source models show that RECom can achieve 6.61X and 1.91X over state-of-the-art baselines in terms of end-to-end inference latency and throughput, respectively. RECom's source code is publicly available at https://github.com/AlibabaResearch/recom.
items.abstract_zh: 嵌入列对于深度推荐模型实现高精度非常重要，但在推理过程中它们可能非常耗时。机器学习 (ML) 编译器在实际业务中广泛用于自动优化 ML 模型。不幸的是，现有的工作还没有使用编译器来自动加速推荐模型推理期间的大量嵌入列计算。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了 RECom，这是第一个 ML 编译器，旨在优化 GPU 上推荐模型中的大量嵌入列。 RECom 解决了三大挑战。首先，在 GPU 上为嵌入列中的大量算子生成有效的调度是很困难的。现有的解决方案通常会导致大量的小内核，并且缺乏子图间的并行性。我们采用了一种新颖的代码生成策略，将大量嵌入列融合到单个内核中，并将每个列映射到 GPU 上的单独线程块中。其次，动态形状场景下复杂的形状计算阻碍了进一步的图优化。我们开发了一个基于符号表达式的模块来重建所有形状计算。第三，出于鲁棒性的考虑，机器学习框架不可避免地引入冗余计算。我们开发了一个子图优化模块，该模块基于整个嵌入列上下文执行图级简化。在内部和开源模型上进行的实验表明，RECom 在端到端推理延迟和吞吐量方面分别比最先进的基准实现了 6.61 倍和 1.91 倍。 RECom 的源代码可在 https://github.com/AlibabaResearch/recom 上公开获取。

items.title: Accurate Disassembly of Complex Binaries Without Use of Compiler Metadata.
items.abstract: Accurate disassembly of stripped binaries is the first step in binary analysis, instrumentation and reverse engineering. Complex instruction sets such as the x86 pose major challenges in this context because it is very difficult to distinguish between code and embedded data. To make progress, many recent approaches have either made optimistic assumptions (e.g., absence of embedded data) or relied on additional compiler-generated metadata (e.g., relocation info and/or exception handling metadata). Unfortunately, many complex binaries do contain embedded data, while lacking the additional metadata needed by these techniques. We therefore present a novel approach for accurate disassembly that uses statistical properties of data to detect code, and behavioral properties of code to flag data. We present new static analysis and data-driven probabilistic techniques that are then combined using a prioritized error correction algorithm to achieve results that are 3X to 4X more accurate than the best previous results.
items.abstract_zh: 准确反汇编剥离的二进制文件是二进制分析、检测和逆向工程的第一步。 x86 等复杂指令集在这种情况下构成了重大挑战，因为很难区分代码和嵌入数据。为了取得进展，许多最近的方法要么做出乐观的假设（例如，缺少嵌入数据），要么依赖于额外的编译器生成的元数据（例如，重定位信息和/或异常处理元数据）。不幸的是，许多复杂的二进制文件确实包含嵌入数据，但缺乏这些技术所需的附加元数据。因此，我们提出了一种精确反汇编的新方法，该方法使用数据的统计属性来检测代码，并使用代码的行为属性来标记数据。我们提出了新的静态分析和数据驱动的概率技术，然后使用优先纠错算法将这些技术结合起来，以获得比之前最佳结果准确 3 到 4 倍的结果。

items.title: Fast Instruction Selection for Fast Digital Signal Processing.
items.abstract: Modern vector processors support a wide variety of instructions for fixed-point digital signal processing. These instructions support a proliferation of rounding, saturating, and type conversion modes, and are often fused combinations of more primitive operations. While these are common idioms in fixed-point signal processing, it is difficult to use these operations in portable code. It is challenging for programmers to write down portable integer arithmetic in a C-like language that corresponds exactly to one of these instructions, and even more challenging for compilers to recognize when these instructions can be used. Our system, Pitchfork, defines a portable fixed-point intermediate representation, FPIR, that captures common idioms in fixed-point code. FPIR can be used directly by programmers experienced with fixed-point, or Pitchfork can automatically lift from integer operations into FPIR using a term-rewriting system (TRS) composed of verified manual and automatically-synthesized rules. Pitchfork then lowers from FPIR into target-specific fixed-point instructions using a set of target-specific TRSs. We show that this approach improves runtime performance of portably-written fixed-point signal processing code in Halide, across a range of benchmarks, by geomean 1.31x on x86 with AVX2, 1.82x on ARM Neon, and 2.44x on Hexagon HVX compared to a standard LLVM-based compiler flow, while maintaining or improving existing compile times.
items.abstract_zh: 现代矢量处理器支持多种定点数字信号处理指令。这些指令支持舍入、饱和和类型转换模式的扩散，并且通常是更原始操作的融合组合。虽然这些是定点信号处理中的常见习惯用法，但很难在可移植代码中使用这些操作。对于程序员来说，用类 C 语言编写与这些指令之一完全对应的可移植整数算术是一项挑战，对于编译器来说识别何时可以使用这些指令更是一项挑战。我们的系统 Pitchfork 定义了一种可移植的定点中间表示形式 FPIR，它捕获定点代码中的常见习惯用法。 FPIR 可以由具有定点经验的程序员直接使用，或者 Pitchfork 可以使用由经过验证的手动和自动合成规则组成的术语重写系统 (TRS) 自动从整数运算提升到 FPIR。然后，Pitchfork 使用一组特定于目标的 TRS 将 FPIR 降级为特定于目标的定点指令。我们证明，与基于 LLVM 的标准编译器流程相比，这种方法提高了 Halide 中可移植编写的定点信号处理代码的运行时性能，在一系列基准测试中，geomemean 在带有 AVX2 的 x86 上提高了 1.31 倍，在 ARM Neon 上提高了 1.82 倍，在 Hexagon HVX 上提高了 2.44 倍，同时保持或改进了现有的编译时间。

items.title: Flame: A Centralized Cache Controller for Serverless Computing.
items.abstract:
Caching function is a promising way to mitigate coldstart overhead in serverless computing. However, as caching also increases the resource cost significantly, how to make caching decisions is still challenging. We find that the prior "local cache control" designs are insufficient to achieve high cache efficiency due to the workload skewness across servers.

In this paper, inspired by the idea of software defined network management, we propose Flame, an efficient cache system to manage cached functions with a "centralized cache control" design. By decoupling the cache control plane from local servers and setting up a separate centralized controller, Flame is able to make caching decisions considering a global view of cluster status, enabling the optimized cache-hit ratio and resource efficiency. We evaluate Flame with real-world workloads and the evaluation results show that it can reduce the cache resource usage by 36% on average while improving the coldstart ratio by nearly 7x than the state-of-the-art method.
items.abstract_zh:
缓存功能是减轻无服务器计算中冷启动开销的一种有前途的方法。然而，由于缓存也显着增加了资源成本，因此如何做出缓存决策仍然具有挑战性。我们发现，由于服务器之间的工作负载偏差，先前的“本地缓存控制”设计不足以实现高缓存效率。

在本文中，受软件定义网络管理思想的启发，我们提出了Flame，一种高效的缓存系统，通过“集中式缓存控制”设计来管理缓存功能。通过将缓存控制平面与本地服务器解耦并设置单独的集中控制器，Flame 能够考虑集群状态的全局视图来制定缓存决策，从而实现优化的缓存命中率和资源效率。我们用实际工作负载对Flame进行了评估，评估结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，它可以平均减少36%的缓存资源使用率，同时将冷启动率提高近7倍。
